title: Use Approved Apps
text:
Learn about Docusign approved extension apps and who can install and use.

Approved extension apps are a type of Docusign Packaged app that is available for use by all users in your organization.

title: Use Approved Apps
text:
The following types of extension apps are available on the Docusign App Center:

- Packaged
  - Docusign built apps using Docusign user credentials with a partner system
  - Require no user authentication
  - Example: Smarty: Address entry and verification
- Partner
  - Docusign partner-built app
  - Requires user authentication with the partner system
  - Example: Stripe: Accept online payments

You can manually approve any App Center app. If you are already an administrator for an account that access IAM plans that include Docusign-built Data Verification and File Storage apps, these apps are automatically approved.

title: Use Approved Apps
text:
Previously, only Docusign Admins could install extension apps. App installation is required before any organization user in a Docusign account can use the app.

Now, upon purchasing a Docusign plan that includes packaged apps, all Docusign users can install and use approved apps in eSignature, Webforms, Workflow Builder, and Agreement Manager. Additionally:

- If you already administer an account that has access to an IAM plan that includes approved apps, those apps are automatically approved for your accounts.
- If you add IAM plans to either a new or existing account, these apps are approved for your account within ten minutes.

In these cases, you receive an in-product and email notification in the product alerting you that these apps are available for account users.

Docusign Account administrators can:

- View the approved apps page, including all approved apps and apps available for approval
- Install any app included in your plan, regardless of its pre-approval status
- Approve new apps
- Manage approved app settings
  - Permit users to install apps
  - View an approved app's detail page
  - Remove an app from approval

    Note: Existing users can continue to use the app. To restrict all access to an app, uninstall the app.
  - Uninstall apps
- Reinstall apps

  Docusign Workflow Builder workflows and eSignature templates are affected when you uninstall and reinstall apps and their connections.

  - If you uninstall and reinstall an app, you must reinstall and reconfigure the eSignature template or the app step in the Workflow Builder workflow.
  - If you delete an app's connection, you must create a new connection. Then, you must reconfigure the app step with this new connection. See the [Create Docusign App Connections](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=zsb1714159452358.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create Docusign apps connections for different user credentials in Docusign agreement workflows. You can create connections that are shared by all account users or used privately by the user who created the app connection.") article for details.
  - You can refresh an installed app's connection without affecting a workflow or template. See the [Reconnect a Docusign App Connection](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=qkv1716320270335.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use the Docusign app Reconnect a connection feature to reestablish the Docusign app’s connection to workflows.") article for details.

**Account (non-admin) users**  can:

- View apps approved for their use:
  - Use the Approved for you filter as described in Use the Approved for you filter to customize your apps in the [Locate Docusign Apps for Your Workflow Processes](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=ljy1744998611944.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to locate apps you can use in your workflow processes by using the Docusign Search feature and Works With and Industry filters.") article.
  - Visit the [Detail Page](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xkg1702568563800.html&_LANG=enus "Use a Docusign app's detail page to view important information such as an app summary, features, permissions, and resources.") for an approved app and see that it is approved available for to install
- Install apps
- Manage app connections

title: Download Documents from the Agreement List Table
heading_path: Download Documents from the Agreement List Table
text:
This topic answers the question: How do I download agreements from Agreement Manager?

Use the Download Documents feature to download a group of selected agreements from the agreement list table. A zipped folder containing the agreements is downloaded to your local Downloads folder.

Note: You can download up to 25 agreements at a time.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed.
4. Perform a search and apply filters to locate the relevant agreements:
   1. Enter a keyword or string in the search field and select a suggestion from the dropdown or press the Enter key.

      The agreements containing the keyword or search string that you entered are displayed in the table.
   2. Use the filters to refine the list of search results. For example, use the Parties filter to view a list of agreements for a specific party.

      1. Expand the Filters option and select the filter that you want to apply.
      2. Choose a filter value.
      3. Select the Apply option.

      The agreements that match the applied filters are displayed in the table.
5. Select the agreements that you want to download:

   ![A snippet of the agreement list table that shows selected agreements and options to download documents or export agreement data.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-table_Download-or-export-selected-agreements.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0OTMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hU9K8VBBjMx-Z4zPhdNDPwmLpaXMCM6eMSYXF6kPXqU&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the agreement list table that shows selected agreements and options to download documents or export agreement data.")

   - Select the individual agreements.
   - Select the Choose all checkbox from the header row to select all the agreements on that page of results.

     Tip: The Choose all option only selects agreements on the current page of search results. It does not select any agreements on subsequent pages of results.
   - Expand the Selected dropdown and select the Select all that match your filters option. All the agreements in the table that matched your applied filters are selected.

     Tip: The Select all that match your filters option is only available if filters are applied to the agreement list table.

   When you select at least one document, an actions bar displays. The Download Documents and Export to CSV options are available.

   Tip: The Selected dropdown indicates the number of selected agreements.
6. Select the Download Documents (arrow) icon from the actions bar.

   A zipped folder containing the selected agreements is downloaded to your local Downloads folder.

You have successfully downloaded a selected group of documents from the agreement list table.

title: Agreement Manager Overview and Onboarding
text:
Read about Docusign Agreement Manager, including an overview of how it works, key use cases, and navigation features.

Agreement Manager solves the problem of organizations not having clear visibility into their agreements. This lack of visibility can cause wasted time, revenue loss, and unnecessary exposure to risk. Worst of all, organizations are unable to take advantage of the data trapped inside their agreements.

The primary use case for Agreement Manager is that it empowers you to store, find, understand, and report on signed agreements.

When the documents are imported or uploaded into Agreement Manager, AI-assisted insights are gleaned from the agreements. These insights help you find, manage, and report on agreements, including managing renewals and obligations, and locating data to assist in negotiations.

title: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
heading_path: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
text:
Read about the job monitoring hub that is used to track the progress for agreement uploads and processing jobs.

The *job monitoring hub* gives you access to job details for agreement uploads and processing jobs. It provides a centralized location to view and track the status of these jobs.

Access this function from the Settings (gear) menu on the Agreement Manager homepage: ![A screenshot of the Settings (gear) dropdown menu that highlights the Uploads and Processing Status option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-view_Actions_Monitor-All-Jobs-option.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Settings (gear) dropdown menu that highlights the Uploads and Processing Status option.")

Once selected, the All Jobs page opens. The job details and status information for agreement upload and processing jobs are displayed.

Use the Uploaded and Processing tabs to switch between agreement upload jobs and processing jobs.

![A screenshot of the All jobs view that shows the job details and status information for uploaded agreements.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-view_Monitor-All-Jobs_All-JobsUploaded-tab.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the All jobs view that shows the job details and status information for uploaded agreements.")

title: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
heading_path: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
text:
The Uploaded tab displays the job details and status for agreement uploads and imports:

![A snippet of the All jobs view that highlights the Uploaded tab and shows job details and status information for upload jobs.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Monitor-All-Jobs_Uploaded-tab_Uploaded-agreements.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the All jobs view that highlights the Uploaded tab and shows job details and status information for upload jobs.")

The Uploaded Agreements table, located on the Uploaded tab, displays job details for all uploaded agreements, including:

- Created date
- Job name
- Source
- Files (number of documents)
- Status

Use the filters to locate job details for relevant upload jobs. You can filter the Uploaded Agreements table by:

![A snippet of the Uploaded Agreements table that highlights the Created date, Status, and Source filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Monitor-uploads_All-jobs_Filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Uploaded Agreements table that highlights the Created date, Status, and Source filters.")

- Created date
- Status
- Source

Tip: Use the sorting arrows located in the column headers to sort the Uploaded Agreements table by the corresponding column.

After locating the relevant job, expand the Actions dropdown and choose from the available actions:

![A snippet of the All jobs view that shows the additional actions that are available for each job.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-view_Monitor-All-Jobs_Uploaded-agreements_Actions-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the All jobs view that shows the additional actions that are available for each job.")

- Browse Files: displays a list of agreements that were uploaded as a result of the selected job.
- View Details: displays upload status results, including successful uploads, upload exceptions, and assigned permissions.
- Export Agreement Data exports a pre-formatted spreadsheet to bulk update the metadata for the agreements in the selected job.
- Delete: removes the upload details for the selected job. Upload details are removed from the Uploaded Agreements table. Once deleted, the upload details cannot be recovered.

  Note: The Delete function only removes the upload details for a selected job. The uploaded files are not deleted.

title: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
heading_path: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
text:
The Processing tab displays the status of AI processing jobs:

![A screenshot of the Processing tab that shows the job details for the processing jobs in the table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Monitor-All-Jobs_Processing_Processing-agreements.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Processing tab that shows the job details for the processing jobs in the table.")

The Processing agreements table, located on the Processing tab, displays job details and status information for processing jobs, including:

- Created date
- Job name
- User
- Insight
- Files
- Status

Note: The Processing tab is dependent on regional availability and is tied to the roll out of custom field detection. If you do not have access to this feature, the tab is not displayed.

Use the available filters to locate details for relevant processing jobs. You can filter the Processing agreements table by:

![A snippet of the Processing agreements table that highlights the Created date, Status and Job Type filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Monitor-All-Jobs_Processing_Processing-agreements_Filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Processing agreements table that highlights the Created date, Status and Job Type filters.")

- Created date
- Status
- Job type

Tip: Use the sorting arrows located in the column headers to sort the Processing agreements table by the corresponding column.

After locating the job, select the corresponding View details option. The processing details page opens for the selected job. Review the Processing status and Job details, including a list of processed files:

![A screenshot of the job details page that shows the processing status and job details for a selected job.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Monitor-All-Jobs_Proessing_Processing-with-Docusign-AI_Processing-status.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the job details page that shows the processing status and job details for a selected job.")

The Processing status section displays the file name, error message, and status for the processed files. You can use the View File option to view the document in the Agreement preview page.

Note: Filter the table to locate specific error messages.![A screenshot of the Error Message filter that shows the options by which you can filter the table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Job-monitoring_Processing_Processing-status-details_Error-Message-filter.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.02iiSnWAWIKlRX-ZL4IxzT6tw2FatYLV5AbPlhXuzho&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Error Message filter that shows the options by which you can filter the table.")

Expand the  Error Message dropdown, select the relevant messages, and click Apply.

The files that match the applied filter are displayed in the table.

title: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
heading_path: Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing
text:
The job monitoring hub tracks the progress and status of agreement uploads and processing jobs. Each type of job has its own triggers that will kick off a job:

- Uploaded: jobs are initiated when agreements are added to Agreement Manager from a computer or third-party storage provider. This includes single agreement and bulk uploads.
- Processing: jobs are initiated when historical agreements are processed for new attributes or fields. For example:
  - An agreement's type is updated and processing is necessary to surface the new attributes. This applies to single and bulk agreement type changes.
  - AI detection is enabled for a new custom agreement type. Agreements are processed for the new type.
  - AI detection is enabled for a new custom fields. Agreements are processed to surface the new data points.

title: Agreement Manager for Contract Managers and Analyzers
heading_path: Agreement Manager for Contract Managers and Analyzers
text:
Read about how analyzers and contract managers interact with Agreement Manager, including example job titles and use cases. This topic answers the question: How do contract managers and analyzers use Agreement Manager to do their jobs?

Contract managers and analyzers use Agreement Manager to understand their agreements. This includes reviewing, updating, and verifying suggested attribute values that were surfaced in your agreements. These users might also use the Renewals dashboard to analyze agreements for upcoming renewal opportunities.

Typical tasks include:

- Verify suggested attribute (or field) values for processed agreements
- Locate agreements for a specific customer when preparing a new agreement
- Filter agreements to gain insight into relationships with employees, customers, partners, and investors
- Manage parties to ensure party normalization
- Verify the number of expiring or renewing agreements to manage renewals and terminations
- Manage agreement obligations and obligation types
- Create agreement sets to organize and share sets of agreements with users and groups
- Create custom agreement types and fields that reflect your organization's specific agreements
- Kick-off and monitor agreement processing jobs

Table 1. Example Job Titles for Analyzers and Contract Managers

| **Segment** | **Job title** |
| --- | --- |
| Sell-side | - Legal Operations - Sales Operations - Account Director - VP of Finance (small- to mid-size organizations) |
| Buy-side | - VP of Finance (mid- to large-size organizations) - Procurement roles - Finance roles |
| Human Resources (HR) | - HR Business Partners - Recruiting Operations - Head of HR - Recruiters - Talent Acquisition |

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
text:
Look up frequently asked questions related to providing feedback and reporting bugs and
unexpected issues.

Your feedback helps us improve Docusign experiences for users like you. When you share any issues or suggestions, it allows us to understand what is not working and make the necessary improvements.

You can submit feedback on bugs and unexpected issues directly in Docusign.

**What to include in your feedback:**

Provide the following information to help us improve your experience:

- **What you were doing:** Describe the steps or actions that you took before encountering the issue.
- **What you expected to happen:** Explain the intended outcome that you were trying to achieve.
- **What actually happened:** Describe the issue that you encountered.

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
What happens after I submit my feedback?
text: Your feedback is used to help Docusign discover and troubleshoot issues and to help prioritize product enhancements and changes.

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
Will I be contacted about the feedback I submit?
text:
Docusign may get in touch via email, if consent was granted.

If you need help from customer support, use the [Docusign Support site](https://support.docusign.com/s/contactSupport) or [create a support case](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=mhs1741642403695.html).

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
What data is shared with Docusign when I submit feedback?
text:
Docusign collects the following:

- Data you submit in the feedback form.
- Docusign-generated product data related to the particular feature that you are using. For example, the session ID or timestamp data.
- Feature-specific data points such as playbooks, chat contents, model results, or user prompts and queries.

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
Who will have access to my data?
text: Only the team involved in troubleshooting your issue will access the data you submit.

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
How do I know that my feedback has been received?
text: In-product messaging lets you know that your response was submitted.

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
How will I know if an issue has been fixed?
text: Enhancements and fixes are included in Docusign release notes and other product notices.

title: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
heading_path: Reporting Bugs and Unexpected Issues FAQ
Is the data I submit considered Customer Data, Feedback, or AI Improvement Data?
text:
No, the data that you submit is not considered Customer Data, Feedback, or AI
Improvement Data under Docusign's [Master Services Agreement](https://www.docusign.com/legal/terms-and-conditions/msa) or the [Sites & Services Terms and Conditions](https://www.docusign.com/legal/terms-and-conditions). However, the data that we
receive is handled securely for the purpose of improving Docusign services.

title: Access Your Completed Envelopes and Documents
heading_path: Access Your Completed Envelopes and Documents
text:
Learn how to access your completed envelopes and documents in Docusign.

Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) users can now access
their completed documents, as well as their completed eSignature envelopes, from the
same place. The Select a View dropdown makes it easy to switch
between completed envelopes and Agreement Manager documents.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Agreements page opens. The Inbox view is displayed by default.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreements page that highlights the Completed option in the navigation pane.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Access_Navigator_agreements_Agreements_Select_Completed.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwNzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.HBV95eEBGmDYSMm-TN0sztjiyaABIxse6FWEZjiQOdE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreements page that highlights the Completed option in the navigation pane.")
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Completed Documents view opens. A list of documents to which the logged-in user has access is displayed in the table.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Manager homepage that displays the Completed Documents view.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Docusign-Navigator_Completed-documents-view.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwNzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.HBV95eEBGmDYSMm-TN0sztjiyaABIxse6FWEZjiQOdE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Manager homepage that displays the Completed Documents view.")

   Use the Select a View dropdown to display your completed eSignature envelopes. This function is part of the page title.

   Tip: The Envelope ID column displays the envelope ID that is associated with the corresponding document. Select the Envelope ID link to view the envelope details page.
4. View your completed eSignature envelopes. Expand the Select a View dropdown and select the Envelopes option:

   ![A screenshot of the expanded Select a view dropdown that shows the Envelopes option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents_View-switcher_expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwNzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.HBV95eEBGmDYSMm-TN0sztjiyaABIxse6FWEZjiQOdE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the expanded Select a view dropdown that shows the Envelopes option.")

   The Completed Documents view refreshes and a list of completed eSignature envelopes is displayed.

   ![A screenshot of the Completed Documents view that shows a list of completed eSignature envelopes for the logged-in user.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Access-Navigator-agreements_switch-to-Completed-envelopes.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwNzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.HBV95eEBGmDYSMm-TN0sztjiyaABIxse6FWEZjiQOdE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Completed Documents view that shows a list of completed eSignature envelopes for the logged-in user.")

title: Use Case: Locate Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) for a Customer
heading_path: Use Case: Locate Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) for a Customer
text:
Learn how to use Agreement Manager filters to locate a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) for a customer.

As a contract viewer, you want to verify the non-disclosure agreement (NDA) for a customer. The NDA might be a separate agreement or combined as part of a master service agreement (MSA). Different NDAs are needed based on the type of discussions that you have with customers and vendors.

Use the available filters to locate NDAs for a specific customer.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed. The total document count is displayed the bottom-right corner of the view. This count is updated when you perform a search or apply filters.

   Filter this view to locate NDAs for a specific customer.
4. Expand the Filters option and select the Parties filter.

   The Parties filter opens.
5. Enter the name of the party in the Search field.

   The results list updates to match the search term you entered.
6. Choose the relevant party and select Apply.

   The table updates and agreements that are tied to the selected party or group are displayed. The document count is also updated based on the applied filter.
7. Locate NDA information for the selected customer:
   - Expand the Agreement Type filter and enter Non-Disclosure Agreement in the Search field. The results list updates to match the search term you entered. Select the Non-Disclosure Agreement option and select Apply.
   - Enter NDA or Non-Disclosure Agreement in the search field and select Enter.

   The table displays NDAs for the selected customer. The document count is also updated to reflect the applied filters or entered search criteria.

   Tip: If you suspect that the NDA is part of an MSA, perform a keyword search to locate all NDA information for the selected customer. Unlike applying filters, keyword searches look at the full agreement content to locate the search term.
8. Review the list and select the agreement that you want to review.

   The Agreement preview page opens for the selected agreement. The Details pane is displayed by default and contains a list of attributes and suggested field values.
9. Review the agreement to locate the NDA clause.
   1. Select the Search (magnifying glass) icon from the top-right corner of the preview pane.
   2. Enter a keyword or search string in the Find in Document field. If the value exists, the keyword or search string is highlighted in the agreement.
   3. Use the Next and Previous arrows to scroll through the results.

   Tip: Select (click) an attribute to view the value within the context of the agreement. The agreement jumps to the location of the value and highlights it.
10. Select the Close (x) arrow in the top-left corner.

    The Completed Documents view opens. Your previously entered search criteria and applied filters are still in effect.

You have successfully located the NDA for a selected customer.

title: Import Documents from Email Attachments
text:
This topic answers the question: How do I add documents from email attachments to Agreement Manager? Learn how to import documents from email attachments to Agreement Manager for processing.

Executed agreements can be imported directly from email attachments into Agreement Manager for
processing. Keep in mind that:

- File names must be fewer than 255 characters
- Only supported file types can be ingested

Attention: The maximum file size for email attachment ingestion is
limited by your email provider. The common file size limit for popular providers,
like Gmail, Outlook, and Yahoo is 25 MB. Some providers, like Outlook, might have
lower limits for certain account types, such as accounts with internet service
providers (ISPs). For these accounts, the file size limit is 20 MB.

Important: **License and permission requirements**

By default, all users can upload or import up to five agreements at a time. However, to ingest email attachments, the email must come from a registered account user. Only registered account users with the appropriate upload permissions can use this feature.

The Upload up to 1,000 files at a time permission is required to ingest more than five email attachments at a time. This toggle is turned on from the user profile page by an administrator.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed.
4. Expand the Add (+) dropdown and select the Import from Email option:

   ![A screenshot of the Add (+) dropdown menu that highlights the Import from Email option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Add-documents-dropdown_Import-from-Email.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3MzQsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.bWFzSudRo6F-Bw5bgsS7VmKhGu83M_q1TEvSZEn8yiE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Add (+) dropdown menu that highlights the Import from Email option.")The Import agreements straight from your inbox dialog box opens. The unique email address that is associated with your account is displayed in the Agreement Manager email address field.![A screenshot of the Import agreements straight from your inbox dialog box that highlights the Copy Address option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Email-ingestion_Copy-Addresss-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3MzQsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.bWFzSudRo6F-Bw5bgsS7VmKhGu83M_q1TEvSZEn8yiE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Import agreements straight from your inbox dialog box that highlights the Copy Address option.")When an email is sent to this address, the attachments are imported to Agreement Manager.
5. Select the Copy Address option.

   The email address is copied to your clipboard.
6. Select Ok to close the dialog box.
7. Go to your email provider and send an email to the copied address. Paste (Ctrl+v) the email address into the To field.

   Tip: **Agreement Manager email addresses**

   - Add the repository email address to your Contacts list for ongoing use.

     The next time you import agreements to Agreement Manager, the email address is already in your Contacts
     list. You do not have to copy the email address every time
     you want to import email attachments.
   - Add the Agreement ManagerUploader@docusign.net email alias to your Safe Senders list.

title: Import Documents from Email Attachments
text:
ts
     list. You do not have to copy the email address every time
     you want to import email attachments.
   - Add the Agreement ManagerUploader@docusign.net email alias to your Safe Senders list.

     If your ingestion fails, this email alias will send you a notification. Depending on your security policies, the email may be blocked or marked as spam. Add the email address to your Safe Senders list to ensure that you receive failure notifications.
8. Attach the files that you want to import to Agreement Manager and send the email.

   A confirmation email is sent once the files are imported and processed:![A snippet of the confirmation email indicates that the files were imported and processed.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Email-import_email-confirmation.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3MzQsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.bWFzSudRo6F-Bw5bgsS7VmKhGu83M_q1TEvSZEn8yiE&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the confirmation email indicates that the files were imported and processed.")

   Tip: Select the Manage Files option to view
   the files that were imported. The Completed view opens and
   the imported files are displayed in the agreement list table.
9. Select the View Job option to view the job status and details of the processing job.

   The job monitoring hub opens, and the status and details for the job are displayed.![A screenshot of the job status and details for a seleted import job.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Email-import_job-status-details.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3MzQsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.bWFzSudRo6F-Bw5bgsS7VmKhGu83M_q1TEvSZEn8yiE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the job status and details for a seleted import job.")

   Note: If any of your files failed to import, expand the Download and Fix dropdown and select the Download
   CSV option to review the files and try again.![A snippet of the import status that prompts you to download the CSV to view files that failed to import.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Upload-documents_Bulk-upload_Upload-status_Failed-documents.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3MzQsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.bWFzSudRo6F-Bw5bgsS7VmKhGu83M_q1TEvSZEn8yiE&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the import status that prompts you to download the CSV to view files that failed to import.")See the [View Upload Results and Exceptions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=srq1712255787588.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to view processing results and details for an upload job.") topic to learn more about job
   monitoring.
10. Select the Manage Files option.

    The Completed view opens and the imported files are displayed in the agreement list table.

title: Enter Values for Empty Attribute Fields
heading_path: Enter Values for Empty Attribute Fields
text:
Learn how to locate and enter values for attributes with missing or empty values.

When documents are synced or imported to Agreement Manager, key data points are surfaced. If the system is unable to locate a value within the agreement, the attribute (field) value is empty. In these cases, review the agreement and add a value or verify that the value does not exist within the agreement.

Note: See the [AI-Assisted
Insights for Agreement Manager Agreements](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=uwk1702945852405.html&_LANG=enus "Look up the names and definitions for the attributes and values that are surfaced in Agreement Manager agreements with AI. This topic answers the question: What data is being extracted from my Agreement Manager agreements?") topic for a full list of the attributes
(fields) that are surfaced in your agreements.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed. Use the available filters to locate agreements requiring review.
4. Use the Filters option to locate the agreements that you want to review:
   1. Select the Filters option.

      The Filters menu expands.
   2. Select the AI Suggestions filter.

      The AI Suggestions filter opens.

      ![A screenshot of the expanded AI Suggestions dialog box that shows the two filter options, Needs Review and No Suggestions.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-table_AI-Suggestions-dialog-box.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.j9PfD_nkfCPLN3akSXO7VirdiQWa5Im_SPkW8FRGSZY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the expanded AI Suggestions dialog box that shows the two filter options, Needs Review and No Suggestions.")
   3. Choose the Needs Review option and select Apply.

   The filter closes and the agreements that match the applied filter are displayed in the agreement list table.

   Tip: ![An image of the spark icon used to denote the use of AI.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/AI-Spark-icon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.j9PfD_nkfCPLN3akSXO7VirdiQWa5Im_SPkW8FRGSZY&_LANG=enus "An image of the spark icon used to denote the use of AI.") The spark icon indicates that the agreement contains suggested values. Review, edit, and approve these values to ensure accurate agreement data for reporting, forecasting, and other business purposes.
5. Select (click) the agreement that you want to review from the list.

   The Agreement preview page opens for the selected agreement. The Details pane is displayed by default and shows a list of attributes and suggested values. These attributes and values are displayed based on the identified agreement type.

   A summary displays at the top of the Details pane. The summary includes the identified agreement type and the number of fields and suggestions to review:

   ![A snippet of the Details pane that shows the identified agreement type and the number of suggestions that require review.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-Preview-page_Details-pane_summary-statement-snippet.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.j9PfD_nkfCPLN3akSXO7VirdiQWa5Im_SPkW8FRGSZY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Details pane that shows the identified agreement type and the number of suggestions that require review.")

title: Enter Values for Empty Attribute Fields
heading_path: Enter Values for Empty Attribute Fields
text:
MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.j9PfD_nkfCPLN3akSXO7VirdiQWa5Im_SPkW8FRGSZY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Details pane that shows the identified agreement type and the number of suggestions that require review.")

   Tip: Use the Find details search field to locate specific attributes or values.

   Validate the suggested values for each attribute. If a field value is missing, review the agreement to locate the value.
6. Place the Details pane into *edit* mode.
   - Select the Edit (pencil) icon.
   - Select the Review All option.

   Note: You must have Organize and manage all agreements access to perform data reviews. For all other users, the Edit (pencil) icon and the Review All option are grayed out.

   The Review & edit details pane opens for updates.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement preview page that shows the Review & edit details pane with editable attribute value fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Review-and-edit-details-pane_Agreement-details-open-for-edits.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.j9PfD_nkfCPLN3akSXO7VirdiQWa5Im_SPkW8FRGSZY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement preview page that shows the Review & edit details pane with editable attribute value fields.")

   Important: When you accept or edit the suggested attribute values, the content in the agreement does not change.
7. Accept or edit the suggested values until each attribute is validated.
8. If the field value is missing, find the value in the agreement and update the attribute.

   ![A snippet of the Agreement preview page that shows an example search term that was found within the document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-preview-page_Search-dialog-box.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2MjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.j9PfD_nkfCPLN3akSXO7VirdiQWa5Im_SPkW8FRGSZY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Agreement preview page that shows an example search term that was found within the document.")

   1. Select the Search (magnifying glass) icon from the top right. A dialog box opens.
   2. Enter a keyword or search string in the Find in Document field. If the value exists, the keyword or search string is highlighted in the agreement.
   3. Once you locate the value, enter it as the attribute value.

      Tip: If the value does not exist in the agreement, leave the field blank and move to the next attribute.
   4. Continue reviewing and updating attribute values until all the attributes have been verified against the agreement.

      Attributes are grouped based on usage and purpose. A progress bar is displayed at the top of each group and shows the number of suggestions that require review.
9. Select Save.

   The agreement details are saved. The Details pane is reverted to read-only mode.
10. Select the Close (X) icon from the top left.

    You are returned to the Completed Documents view. Your search criteria and filters are still applied and agreements requiring review are displayed in the table.

You have successfully entered a value for an empty attribute field. If the attribute value was not surfaced during processing, locate the value in the agreement and enter it as the field value in the Details pane.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text: This topic answers the question: Where can I find data visualizations and reports for all the agreements in my Docusign account?

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
The Agreements Dashboard gives users a visual summary of all executed and completed agreements in your account, including agreement insights and charts or reports.

Note: Dashboards are collections of standard and custom reports. These reports are individual data visualizations, such as bar charts, pie charts, and graphs. Each dashboard can contain up to 20 reports.

![A screenshot of the Agreements Dashboard that shows top-level insights and reports for the agreements in your account.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements_Agreements-Dashboard.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

Top-level insights:

- All agreements in the repository
- Expiring agreements over the next 90 days
- Renewing agreements with renewal dates within the next 90 days

Available reports:

| **Reports** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| Active agreements over time | This chart shows the aggregated agreement count over a designated time period, grouped by effective date. |
| Agreement types | This chart shows a breakdown and aggregated count of all the active agreements, grouped by agreement type. |
| Top parties by contract value | This chart shows the aggregated contract value sum for all the active agreements, grouped by party. |
| Agreements taking effect | This chart shows the number of agreements taking over the next 12 months. |
| Duration of agreements | This chart shows a count of all agreements in your account grouped by duration. |
| Upcoming expiring agreements | This chart shows an aggregated count of the agreements that are expiring over the next six months. |
| Contract value by agreement type | This chart shows the aggregated sum of all the active agreements, grouped by agreement type. |
| Payment terms | This chart shows an aggregated count of all the active agreements, grouped by payment term.  Important: For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated values, like Payment Term, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown. See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") topic to learn more about this limitation. |
| Agreements with governing laws | This chart shows an aggregated count of all the active agreements with an identified governing law, grouped by governing law. |
| Top liabilities by agreement types | This chart shows the maximum dollar amount that you could pay for damages or other liabilities; grouped by agreement type. |
| Agreements with late fee clauses | This chart shows a breakdown and an aggregated count of all the active agreements that can charge late payment fees. |
| Assignment rights by agreement | This chart shows a breakdown and an aggregated count of all the active agreements where parties can assign rights and obligations to another party. |

Filters display at the top of the Agreements dashboard. Filters applied at the dashboard level are applied to all top-level insights and charts. Available filters:

![A snippet of the Agreements Dashboard that shows the default filters, Agreement Type, Sets, Parties, and Time Period.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements-Dashboard_Filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

- Agreement Type
- Sets
- Parties
- Time period

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

- Agreement Type
- Sets
- Parties
- Time period

The top-level insights and charts on the dashboard update in actual time as the filters are applied. You can also apply filters at the report level.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
The Party Role is surfaced during agreement processing. This extraction identifies the role that a specific party plays within the context of an agreement.

Once surfaced, you can filter the Agreements Dashboard to view insights based on a specific role for the selected party.

The Party Role filter is located under the Parties filter:![A screenshot of the Parties filter that highlights the Party Role dropdown and available roles.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Filter-by-party-role_Parties-filter_Party-Role_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

Important: When using the Parties filter, you must also select a Party Role value. If you do not know which role to select, choose the All option. If no role is selected, the search returns agreements where the party is not the buyer or the seller.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
The top-level insights and individual charts on the Agreements Dashboard display a summary of the agreements that match any applied filters.

For detailed insights and charts, expand the More actions (three dots) menu and select View Report or click anywhere on the chart:

![A snippet of the Expiring agreements insight that shows the View Report option in the More actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements_snippet-ellipsesView-Report.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

For details about a specific month, select a segment of the bar, pie, or donut chart to view the agreements that make up that segment:

![A snippet of the Upcoming expiring agreements chart that shows the hover text for a segment or bar in an agreement dashboard chart.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements-Dashboard_Hover-on-bar-chart.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

Note: When viewing charts, you have the option to View as Bar Chart or View as Stacked Bar Chart and Download as png.![A snippet of an agreement dashboard chart that shows the expanded More actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Rpeorts_Agreement-dashboard_Chart-options-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

- Select View as table to display the data in a table instead of a chart.
- Select Download as png to download an image of the chart to your local Downloads folder.

After selecting the View Report option, the detailed report view opens. The report includes a list of agreements, filters, and a visual representation of the agreements that matched the applied filters.

![A screenshot of the Upcoming expiring agreements report that shows the expiring agreements by month reflected in the chart and listed n the table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements_Agreements-by-expiration-date_report-view.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

The report view displays a list of the agreements that are represented in the bar chart. From this view, you can:

- Apply filters to refine the agreement list and chart. For example, use the Sets filter to display data for the agreements in a selected set.
- Sort the agreement list. Use the sorting arrows in the column headers to sort the table.
- Customize the information that is displayed in the agreement list. Use the Customize columns (toggle) icon to update the columns that are displayed in the table.
- Download the agreement data. Use the Download option in the More actions (three dot) menu to export the report data to an output file.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
le) icon to update the columns that are displayed in the table.
- Download the agreement data. Use the Download option in the More actions (three dot) menu to export the report data to an output file.

  Note: When you download or export a report, all attributes and available values are included in the output file. This includes both custom and standard fields.
- Save the report. Use the Save As option in the Report Actions (vertical ellipsis) menu to save the report for future use.
- Set up one-time or recurring email reports. Use the Subscribe option to subscribe to receive notifications about the agreements in the selected report.
- Add the report to Your Favorites list on the Overview dashboard. Use the Favorite (star) icon to "star" your frequently used dashboards and reports.
- View the Details, Obligations, and Agreement sets for an agreement. Select (click) an agreement to view the document in the Agreement preview.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
The Agreement Type, Sets, Parties, and Time Period filters are displayed at the top of the Agreements Dashboard by default. You can apply additional filters from the individual report pages.![A snippet of an Agreements Dashboard report that highlights the report filters, including the All Filters option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreement-Dashboard_report-view_filters-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

A number of filters are displayed at the top of the report by default, such as: Agreement Type, Parties, and Sets.

Use the All Filters option to apply additional filters to the chart:

![A screenshot of the All Filters dialog box showing additional filters that can be applied to the selected report.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements-Dashboard_Report-View_All-Filters-dialog-box.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

Expand a filter, choose a filter value or enter a date, and select the
Apply option. After applying your filters, select
Save. The dialog box closes and the report is updated to
reflect the applied filters.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
When downloading reports to CSV files from the Insights reporting hub, there is an agreement limit of 25,000 agreements for all IAM reports. This count includes your custom reports.

**Suggested workaround:** Adjust the report filters to run the report in batches until all the relevant agreements are downloaded. For example, run the report in batches according to varying date ranges. Once downloaded, combine the data into one CSV file.

Note: The eSignature reports have a different set of limitations. See the [Using Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=wou1578456440763.html) article to learn more about eSignature reports for senders and signers.

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
The Favorite (star) icon is displayed on all the dashboards and on the detailed report view for each of the dashboard reports and insights. Use this feature to "star" the insights that you regularly track:

![A snippet of a detailed report view that highlights the Favorite (star) icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreements-dashboard_Report-details_Favorite-icon-selected_generic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

Your "starred" dashboards and reports are displayed in the Your Favorites list on the Overview dashboard:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights the Your Favorites section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reporting-hub_Overview_Your-Favorties_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

title: Agreements Dashboard
text:
Features that use Docusign Iris display the AI-Assisted denotation badge within the product. This denotation badge is clickable. Select the badge to access additional information about how Docusign uses AI functionality:

![A screenshot of the expanded AI-Assisted denotation badge that provides a link to learn about how Docusign uses AI functionality.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_AIAssisted-pillexpanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY5MDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.iEbOJDzOiaRYqAJt_Jisvw6XYegN8SYGinOtBaL1ljQ&_LANG=enus)

Review the [AI Denotation in Agreement Manager](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=rsz1722973735168.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: In what way does Docusign indicate AI-assisted insights or AI functionality in Agreement Manager?") topic to learn more about how Docusign denotes AI functionality.

title: Access Docusign Apps
text:
Learn how to browse for and connect to Docusign extension apps from
various Docusign feature locations.

You can browse for, install, and connect to Docusign extension
apps through various methods.

title: Access Docusign Apps
text:
Enter this URL in your browser for direct access to the Docusign App Center page.

https://apps.docusign.com/app-center

![A screenshot of the Docusign App Center page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/ac-newest-dash.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTgyNTcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k4u_3NCeuSLgGKsgY7gTxveqiBd_LKhiiEiiQoncStY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign App Center page.")

heading_path: Access from the Docusign App Center Featured Apps and Connectors Menu
text:
Use the App Center Featured Apps and Connectors menu to refine your apps search.

![A screenshot of the Docusign App Center Featured apps and Connector menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/ac-feat-apps-conn-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTgyNTcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k4u_3NCeuSLgGKsgY7gTxveqiBd_LKhiiEiiQoncStY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign App Center Featured apps and Connector menu.")

You can specify these app types:

- AI connectors: AI-powered connectors that enhance your Docusignworkflows
- eSignature integrations: Third-party integrations that add Docusignfunctionality to your favorite software tools without
  leaving them
- Extension apps: Extend the Docusign platform by integrating
  third-party capabilities
- Workflow templates: Workflow Builder pre-built workflows for
  specific use cases
- FedRAMP-certified: FedRAMP certified when used within Docusign FedRAMP
  boundary

title: Access Docusign Apps

Access apps from the side navigation menu in the Manage Apps tab.

- Approved Apps: Displays apps your Docusign

title: Use Case: Give Groups Permission to View All Agreements in an Account
heading_path: Use Case: Give Groups Permission to View All Agreements in an Account
text:
This topic answers the question: How do I enable access to Agreement Manager agreements for a group of users?

By default, users can only view their own shared, received, sent, and uploaded agreements in Agreement Manager. An administrator can grant access for groups to view all agreements in the account.

Note: User permissions are managed at the account-level. Make sure that you are updating records from Accounts administration instead of Organization administration.

1. Log in to your Docusign account using administrator credentials.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Admin from the global header.

   The Admin page opens.

   Important: User and group permissions are managed at the *account*-level. Make sure that you are updating records from Accounts administration instead of Organization administration.If your organization has multiple accounts, verify that you are updating the correct account. If necessary, select Accounts from the pane on the left and choose the appropriate account.
3. Select Groups from the USERS AND GROUPS section in the navigation pane.

   The Groups view opens.
4. Locate the group whose Agreement Manager permissions you want to update:

   1. Enter the group name in the Enter Keyword field.
   2. Select Search.

   The table displays groups matching the search criteria that you entered.
5. Expand the Actions dropdown associated with the group that you want to update and select Manage Agreement Manager Access.

   The group profile view opens for the selected group. The Agreement Manager Access tab is displayed by default.
6. Turn on the View all agreements in this account toggle (blue position) from the Agreement Manager access section.

   By turning on this toggle, you are giving the group, and all group members, access to view all agreements in the account.

   Note: Turn this toggle off (gray position) to remove the group's access to view all agreements in the account.
7. Select Save Changes.

   Next, go to the audit log to verify the changes.
8. Select Audit Logs from the AUDITING section in the navigation pane.

   The Audit Logs view opens. The audit log table displays records of changes to your account.
9. Locate the change in the table to verify the group's settings were successfully updated.

title: IAM Party Hub
text:
Read about the IAM party hub, a centralized location for party-related pages. This topic answers the question: Where can I find a unified summary of all agreements and obligations for a customer or vendor?

The IAM party hub is a centralized location for party-related pages. Together, these pages
provide a unified summary of all agreements and obligations that are tied to a party or
alias group. For example, the party Overview dashboard shows high-level insights for a selected party or group:

![A screenshot of the party hub's Overview dashboard that shows high-level insights for a selected party or group.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-management_Party-hub_Overview_Fontara-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the party hub's Overview dashboard that shows high-level insights for a selected party or group.")

The data used to populate the party hub pages, including the Parties list, is refreshed every five minutes. If you've made recent changes, you will see the updated data shortly.

Tip: Select the Favorites (star) icon to add the party or group to your Starred list. You can "star" up to 50 parties or groups. Your favorite parties and groups are listed under the Starred tab on the Parties page. See the [The Parties List](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=uzq1744241293689.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the enhanced Parties list, including access points and features.") topic to learn more about this feature.

title: IAM Party Hub
text:
The party hub is accessed by selecting a party name from various places within Agreement Manager. For
example, from the party list table in
the Parties view:

![A screenshot of the Parties view that highlights a party in the party list table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Parties-view_NAME-column-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Parties view that highlights a party in the party list table.")

Tip: Go to Home  >  Agreements  >  Parties > All to access the Parties view.

Here are other access points for the party hub:

- From the Parties column in the agreement list table (on the Completed Documents page):![A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the Parties column as an entry point for the party hub.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Entry-point_Completed-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the Parties column as an entry point for the party hub.")
- From the Details pane on the Agreement preview page:![A snippet of the Agreement preview page that highlights the PARTIES field in the Details pane.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Entry-point_Details-pane.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Agreement preview page that highlights the PARTIES field in the Details pane.")

You can also access the party hub pages from Docusign CLM:![A snippet of the Docusign CLM document viewer that highlights two ways to access the IAM party hub pages.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_entry-points-CLM.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Docusign CLM document viewer that highlights two ways to access the IAM party hub pages.")

- Select the Parties option from the global header at the top of the page. The IAM party hub opens and the Parties view is displayed.
- Select the PARTY name from the Attributes pane in the CLM document viewer. The IAM party hub opens and the Overview dashboard is displayed for the selected party or group.

title: IAM Party Hub
text:
As new or updated AI models are released, the previously ingested agreements can be processed again to surface these data points. Depending on the type of new insights that are available, users can choose to:

- Opt in for reprocessing from the Track obligations badge (obligation-related attributes and insights)
- Reprocess all the outdated agreements for the account (new or updated AI model)
- Reprocess selected agreements (custom agreement types and fields)

Note: See the [Agreement Manager Reprocessing Experience](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con44590246-0f0e-43b4-9692-caadb57335ac.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the Agreement Manager reprocessing experience, including its purpose, trigger points, and job size considerations.") article to learn more about these reprocessing features.

Processing happens in the background. While it does not impact your current experience, processing may take some time depending on the number and size of agreements. Once started, processing cannot be canceled.

title: IAM Party Hub
text:
The party hub's Overview dashboard displays a visual summary of all active
agreements that are tied to a specific party or merged party group. This dashboard
contains party and agreement insights, including a party summary and recent
activity.

**Dashboard filters**

The filters on the Overview dashboard are applied at the dashboard level. You can filter the dashboard by: Agreement Type, Time Period, and Party Role.

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights the Agreement Type, Time Period, and Party Role filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights the Agreement Type, Time Period, and Party Role filters.")

The selected filters are applied to the entire dashboard, including various insights and charts. For example:

- Update the dashboard to reflect data from a specific Agreement Type:![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Agreement Type filter.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Agreement-Type-filter.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Agreement Type filter.")Choose one or more agreement types and select the Apply option.
- Update the dashboard to reflect data from a specific Time Period. Select a pre-defined option or enter a custom date range.
- Update the dashboard to show agreement data where the party plays a specific role in an agreement: ![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Party Role filter.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Party-Role-filter.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Party Role filter.")

  Expand the Party Role filter and choose the relevant role, Buyer, Seller, or Other. Select the Apply option.

**Party Summary**

The Party Summary section displays high-level insights for the selected party or group, including:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Party Summary section for a specific party or alias group.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Party-Summary.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Party Summary section for a specific party or alias group.")

- Summary statement about the selected party or group
- Agreement counts based on the next 90 days:
  - All active agreements
  - Expiring soon
  - Up for renewal

Select the tiles in the In the Next 90 Days section to view a list of the associated agreements. For example, view a list of Active agreements:

text:

  - Expiring soon
  - Up for renewal

Select the tiles in the In the Next 90 Days section to view a list of the associated agreements. For example, view a list of Active agreements:

![A screenshot of the In the Next 90 Days section that shows the cursor hovering over the Active agreement tile.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_In-the-Next-90-Days_tile-selected.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the In the Next 90 Days section that shows the cursor hovering over the Active agreement tile.")

The Active agreements report opens. A list of agreements that are active
over the next 90-day time period is displayed.

**Recent activity**

The Recent activity section shows your ten most recently active agreements over a 12-month period:

![A screenshot of the Recent activity section that lists the party's most recently active agreements over a 12-month period.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Recenty-activity-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Recent activity section that lists the party's most recently active agreements over a 12-month period.")

Your most recently active agreements are calculated based on the effective and expiration dates over a 12-month period. Documents without effective or expiration dates are not included in the Recent activity chart.

Tip: Select the View All option to view all the agreements that are associated with the selected party or group:![A snippet of the Recent activity section that highlights the View All option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Recenty-activity-section_View-All_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Recent activity section that highlights the View All option.")

Hover your cursor over an item in the chart to view high-level agreement details, such as:

![A snippet of the Recent activity section that displays agreement details modal that opens when you hover over an item in the chart.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Recent-activity_agreement-details_hover.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Recent activity section that displays agreement details modal that opens when you hover over an item in the chart.")

- Total contract value
- Agreement name
- Effective dates
- Renewal types
- Renewal term

Use the View Agreement option to view the document from the Agreement preview page.

**Dashboard charts**

The dashboard charts provide a visual summary of all executed and completed agreements that are associated with the selected party or group:

title: IAM Party Hub
text:
ent from the Agreement preview page.

**Dashboard charts**

The dashboard charts provide a visual summary of all executed and completed agreements that are associated with the selected party or group:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows charts for Agreement types, Renewal types, Payment terms, and Obligations by due date.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Charts.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows charts for Agreement types, Renewal types, Payment terms, and Obligations by due date.")

- Agreement types:

  This chart shows a count of all active agreements by agreement type over a selected time period.
- Renewal types:

  This chart shows a breakdown of renewal
  types for all agreements that renew over a time period.
- Payment terms:

  This chart shows a breakdown of payment terms for all agreements in the repository.
- Obligations by due date:

  This chart shows the number of obligations with upcoming due dates by month for the next six months.

  Note: The Time Period filter does not work with the Obligations by due date chart. You cannot change the default time period.

  Important: For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated values, like Payment Term, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown. See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") topic to learn more about this limitation.

Tip: The segments in these charts are clickable. Select a segment to view the associated agreements.

The report view opens. The chart and a list of associated agreements are displayed.

Use the breadcrumb navigation at the top of the page to return to the dashboard.

Use the More actions (three dots) menu or select the chart name to go to the detailed report view for the chart:

![A snippet of the Renewals types chart that highlights the View Report option in the More actions (three dots) menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Actions-menu_View-Report.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc3OTksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.JUb8tVkw23wmBFqgED13fn4RMrN_KeVASrAsrV7Ku80&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Renewals types chart that highlights the View Report option in the More actions (three dots) menu.")

Note: The More actions (three dots) menu also has the option to View as table or Download as png:

- Select View as table to display the data in a table instead of a chart.
- Select Download as png to download an image of the chart to your local Downloads folder.
