- **Workflow Builder:** Since types are captured at both document and envelope levels, downstream steps can be conditionally driven by agreement type.

Note: IAM platform limits include caps on custom agreement types and fields per account. See the [Custom Extractions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=yrx1747083411531.html&_LANG=enus "Read about custom extractions, including how these data points bring value to our organization.") article to learn more about the custom extraction and AI detection limits.

title: Agreement Types Across the IAM Platform
heading_path: Agreement Types Across the IAM Platform
text:
At each stage of the agreement type lifecycle, IAM reuses the same agreement type and field definitions. This ensures that AI-assisted detection, workflows, and analytics stay aligned to a single consistent classification.

Consider these phases of the agreement type lifecycle:

![An infographic that shows the lifecycle of an agreement type in the IAM platform.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-type-life-cycle_Docusign-IAM_infographic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc0NjIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hxsJgs780GQ7_DGewJKHrtmC8CITbF_qXMIy48RxeoY&_LANG=enus "An infographic that shows the lifecycle of an agreement type in the IAM platform.")

**Phase 1: Centralize types and fields in Agreement Manager**

In Agreement Manager, administrators centrally manage standard agreement types, create custom types, and define the specific fields that are associated with each category.

**Phase 2: Auto-detect during Agreement Preparation**

When a document is uploaded, the agreement type is detected and sender fields are suggested for tagging in the template. For example, parties, contract value, and expiration date.

**Phase 3: Standardize execution and review**

In eSignature, the selected agreement type aligns the recommended tab fields. The type is captured at both the document and envelope levels to ensure downstream consistency and accurate reporting.

CLM adopts these defined types and fields to drive negotiation workflows. The AI-Assisted Review organizes playbooks by agreement type to standardize reviews and markups.

**Phase 4: Automate management and reporting**

Completed documents are ingested into Agreement Manager with the captured agreement type and extracted attributes. Users can filter, sort, and build reports based on the agreement type.

Since agreement types are captured consistently, they can trigger conditional logic for downstream Workflow Builder workflows. For example, routing approvals or sending renewal alerts.

title: Agreement Hierarchies
text:
Read about agreement hierarchies, including their purpose, use cases, entry points, and common tasks.

 

When you view agreements as single, standalone documents, you are not seeing the entire picture.
The actual arrangement between the parties is typically much larger and more complex
than a standalone document can show.

This relationship is represented better as a structured collection of legally related
documents, or a contract hierarchy:

![A diagram of an agreement hierarchy for a master services agreement that shows the relationship between the related documents.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Contract-hierarchy-generic-example_diagram.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.NSYxWeJHerx3Wh0i471unl3q2VhrkBnw3r_84ZRpdPI&_LANG=enus "A diagram of an agreement hierarchy for a master services agreement that shows the relationship between the related documents.")

The Hierarchies feature provides a way to create and manage agreement hierarchies. For example, create a hierarchy to capture the relationship between an MSA and supporting agreements. Agreements can be added to or removed from the hierarchy at any time.

title: Agreement Hierarchies
text:
Agreement hierarchies provide a way to view and engage with legally related documents. This engagement is critical for understanding the terms and obligations of your agreements. Agreement hierarchies help you to:

**Understand how your agreements evolve over time.** Agreements evolve over time to track changing business needs. For example, expiration dates are extended, pricing schedules are changed, and substantive business terms are updated.

Agreement hierarchies help you to understand how your agreements relate to one another. They can surface amendments and other legally related documents that may change the substantive agreement between the parties.

**Track down legally related documents.** Agreement hierarchies help you to identify
amendments, addenda, statements of work, and other legally related
documents. For example, they can help you locate the legally related
amendments, statements of work, and other documents for an MSA.

Hierarchies save you time when tracking down legally related agreements.

title: Agreement Hierarchies
text:
Once created, your agreement hierarchies are visible from these primary locations in the IAM platform:

- IAM party hub (Hierarchies tab):

  ![A screenshot of the Hierarchies tab in the party hub for a selected party.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Contract-hierarchy_Hierarchies-tab_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.NSYxWeJHerx3Wh0i471unl3q2VhrkBnw3r_84ZRpdPI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Hierarchies tab in the party hub for a selected party.")
- Agreement Manager (Agreement preview page, Related agreements pane):

  ![A snippet of the Agreement preview page that highlights the Related agreements pane.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-Preview-page_Related-agreements_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.NSYxWeJHerx3Wh0i471unl3q2VhrkBnw3r_84ZRpdPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Agreement preview page that highlights the Related agreements pane.")

title: Agreement Hierarchies
text:
Hierarchies are created and managed from the IAM party hub under the Hierarchies tab. From this page, you are prompted to create new hierarchies or update existing ones.

Common tasks and functionality include:

- Create new hierarchies
- Update hierarchy details, such as the title and description
- Add documents to the hierarchy
- Remove documents from the hierarchy
- Update the primary document
- Rearrange the relationships of the documents
- View a document from the Agreement preview page

Restriction: Currently, you cannot delete a hierarchy once created.

title: Agreement Hierarchies
text:
Access to various hierarchy-related functionalities is based on a
user's document-level access. For example:

- **Viewing documents in a hierarchy.** Users can view the documents in a hierarchy if they have Can View, Can Edit, or Can Manage access to the document.

  If you do not have the appropriate document-level access, the documents are not visible in the
  hierarchy.
- **Adding documents.** When creating and updating hierarchies, users can only add documents to which they have Can Edit or Can Manage access.

  If you do not have the appropriate document-level access, you cannot add the agreement to the hierarchy.
- **Editing hierarchies.** Users can only edit a hierarchy if they have Can Edit or Can Manage access to all the documents in the hierarchy.

  If you do not have the appropriate document-level access, you cannot edit the hierarchy. For
  example, you cannot update details, add documents,
  or remove documents.
- **Rearranging document relationships in a hierarchy.** Users must have Can Edit or Can Manage access to all the documents in a hierarchy to rearrange or change the relationship between documents.

  If you do not have the appropriate document-level access, you cannot rearrange or update the document relationships for a hierarchy.

title: Brazilian Portuguese Language Support
text:
Read about the Agreement Manager AI models and features that are supported in Portuguese agreements for customers in Brazil.

Agreement Manager is available to customers globally, however, the features and insights vary by region and language. Read about the supported agreement types and attributes that provide insights into Portuguese agreements for customers in Brazil.

CAUTION: The accuracy and appropriateness of AI-assisted insights may vary depending on the agreement language and customer use case. Customers should review all suggested data points for accuracy and to determine if a value is appropriate for its particular circumstances.

Important:

As new or updated AI models are released, your historical agreements can be processed again to surface these data points. Depending on the type of new insights that are available, users can choose to:

- Opt in for reprocessing from the New Insights Available badge (obligation-related attributes and insights)
- Reprocess all the outdated agreements for the account (new or updated AI model)
- Reprocess selected agreements (standard or custom fields)

See the [Agreement Manager Reprocessing Experience](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con44590246-0f0e-43b4-9692-caadb57335ac.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the Agreement Manager reprocessing experience, including its purpose, trigger points, and job size considerations.") article to learn more about this experience.

See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") article to view supported agreement types, attributes, and data points for other languages and regions.

title: Brazilian Portuguese Language Support
text:
During agreement processing, attributes and field values are surfaced in your agreements. Review the table to see which attributes are surfaced in Portuguese agreements for customers in Brazil.

Important: English (global) is applied to all customers deployed across Docusign datacenters located in the United States (NA), Europe (EU), Canada (CA), Australia (AU), and Japan (JP).

| Attribute | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Compensation and Payment Insights** | |
| Total Contract Value | The total monetary value of the contract or agreement between two or more parties. In other words, it is the lifetime value of a contract. |
| **Governing Law, Jurisdiction, and Dispute Resolution Insights** | |
| Governing Law | The rules and laws that will govern the agreement if legal issues or disputes arise. The clause typically identifies whose laws will govern the interpretation and enforcement of the agreement. |
| **Objective Information Insights** | |
| Languages | Indicates which languages are present in the agreement. |
| Parties | Contracting parties. Refers to a provision naming the individuals, organizations, or entities that enter into a legally binding agreement (contract). |
| Type (Agreement type) | Classification of documents based on their title and certain commonalities in their subject matter. For example, Master Services Agreement (MSA), Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA), and Statement of Work (SOW). |
| **Renewal Insights** | |
| Automatic Renewal (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions stating that an agreement automatically renews at the end of its term unless one or both parties take action to terminate, opt out, or modify it. |
| Evergreen (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to clauses that contemplate a perpetual continuation of the contract term unless a party takes action to terminate it. |
| Option to Renew (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions that set out a party's option to extend the term of the contract. |
| NonRenewal Notice Period | Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent not to renew an agreement. |
| Renewal - Extension Period | Refers to provisions setting out the additional period of time (duration) that a contract is to be extended beyond its initial term. |
| Renewal Notice Period | Comprised of two data extractions: Renewal Notice Period and NonRenewal Notice Period. Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent to renew an agreement. |
| Term - Renewal Automatic | Refers to provisions that specify the duration of the auto-renewal period. |
| Term - Renewal Option | Refers to provisions setting out a party's option to extend the contract for a specific term. |
| **Term Insights** | |
| Effective Date | Refers to the date on which the contract became legally binding and enforceable. It is the date agreed upon by the parties for beginning the period of performance under the contract. |
| Expiration Date | Refers to the date on which the contract comes to an end and is no longer in force. |
| Term Length | Indicates the length of the term of the agreement (how long the agreement is in effect). Signing parties are obligated to adhere to the terms and conditions within the agreement until the expiration or end date. |
| **Termination Insights** | |
| Termination for Cause - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for cause. For example, for material breach or other events of default. |
| Termination for Convenience - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

title: Brazilian Portuguese Language Support
text:
e notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

See the [Extracted Agreement Insights and Definitions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=uwk1702945852405.html&_LANG=enus "Look up the names and definitions for the attributes and values that are surfaced in Agreement Manager agreements with AI. This topic answers the question: What data is being extracted from my Agreement Manager agreements?") to learn more about the attributes and field values that are surfaced in your agreements.

title: Brazilian Portuguese Language Support
heading_path: Limitation: "Dropdown" attributes (fields) with pre-populated value sets
text:
For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated value sets, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute value only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown.

When processing cannot locate the value within the agreement, the extracted value is *Other*. For example, if an agreement's payment term is 50 days, the surfaced Payment Term value is *Other*:

![A screenshot of the Party Term filter that shows the pre-populated value set for the attribute (field).](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Payment-term-filter_All-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYxMDIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YrpoQPqDN8goxCQxbyu2YMjxlKbXDr9C8BsqT16Khpc&_LANG=enus)

This limitation applies to these attributes (fields) and values:

| Attribute (Field) | Value Set |
| --- | --- |
| Assignment (Change of Control) | No, or consent required; Yes, notice required; Yes, restrictions apply; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (General) | No, or consent required; Yes; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (Termination Rights) | Yes |
| Employment Type | Fixed Term; Full Time; Intern; Part Time |
| Late Fees Apply | Yes; No |
| NDA Type | Mutual; One Way |
| Party Role | Buyer, Seller |
| Payment Term | 15 days; 30 days; 45 days; 60 days; 7 days; 90 days; >90 days; On Receipt; Other; Under 7 days |
| Renewal Type | Auto-Renew; Evergreen; Fixed Term; Renewal Option; Unspecified |

title: Brazilian Portuguese Language Support
text:

title: IAM Agreement Types Manager
text:
Read about the Agreement Types manager, including its purpose, use, and role within the Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform.

The *Agreement Types Manager* is the central location for configuring and maintaining agreement types and their fields. These agreement types are used across the IAM platform, not just in Agreement Manager.

Tip: See the [Agreement Types Across the IAM Platform](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con0213702d-d2af-424a-9512-1dfae7765cc5.html&_LANG=enus "Read about how agreement types are used across the Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform.") topic to learn
more about how agreement types fit into the IAM platform.

Access this feature from the Agreement Manager homepage. Expand the Settings (gear) menu located on the Completed Documents page and select the Agreement Types option:

![A screenshot of the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Agreement Types option in the Settings (gear) menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-types-manager_Settings-menu_Agreement-Types_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Agreement Types option in the Settings (gear) menu.")

The Manage Agreement Types page opens. A list of standard and custom agreement types for the account is displayed in the Agreement Types table:

![A screenshot of the Manage Agreement Types page that shows custom and standard agreement types for the account.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-type-manager_generic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Manage Agreement Types page that shows custom and standard agreement types for the account.")

title: IAM Agreement Types Manager
text:
The Agreement Types table lists all the standard and custom agreement types that are associated with the account:

![A snippet of the Manage Agreement Types page that shows the Agreement Types table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Manage-Agreement-Types_Agreement-Types-table_snippet.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Manage Agreement Types page that shows the Agreement Types table.")

- The Agreement Type column displays the name of the agreement type and the number of fields that are associated with it.

  Tip:

  Use the Sort items (arrows) icon to sort the table by agreement type. Select the field count link to view the Fields list for the agreement type.
- The Documents column shows the number of documents in your repository that are classified as each agreement type.
- The Category column indicates the classification of the agreement type. For example, Business Services, Human Resources, or Miscellaneous.
- The Created by column indicates whether the agreement type is custom (User) or standard (Docusign).
- The AI detection column displays the AI status for the agreement type. For
  example, whether the agreement type is Active or
  it must be Set Up. You can also
  Activate the agreement type from this
  column.

For custom agreement types, the More actions (three dots) menu is available. The menu options are dependent on the AI detection status for the custom aagreement type. For example, if the AI detection status is Set Up, you can Edit Details or Delete the agreement type.

Once the setup is complete, theMore actions (three dots) menu includes
actions related to the AI detection:

![A snippet of the Agreement Types table that highlights the More actions (three dots) menu, including available AI detection options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Manage-Agreement-Types_More-actions-options_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Agreement Types table that highlights the More actions (three dots) menu, including available AI detection options.")

title: IAM Agreement Types Manager
text:
Use the search field and table filters to locate the relevant agreement types:

![A snippet of the Manage Agreement Types page that shows the search field and filter options for the Agreement Types table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Manage-Agreement-Types_Agreement-Types_search-filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Manage Agreement Types page that shows the search field and filter options for the Agreement Types table.")

- Enter a search term in the Search types... field. As you type the keyword, the table updates and the types that match the search term are displayed.
- Use the Created By filter to view standard (Docusign) or custom (User) agreement types.
- Use the Category filter to view agreement types by classification. For example, Business Services, Human Resources, or Miscellaneous.
- Use the AI Status filter to view agreement types based on their AI detection status, Active or Needs Setup.

title: IAM Agreement Types Manager
text:
Locate and select (click) the relevant type from the Agreement Types table. The Fields table opens for the selected type. This table lists the custom and standard fields that are associated with the selected agreement type:

![A screenshot of the Fields table that shows the custom and standard fields associated with the selected agreement type.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Manage-Agreement-Types_Agreement-Types_Fields-table.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Fields table that shows the custom and standard fields associated with the selected agreement type.")

Review the custom and standard fields that are associated with the selected agreement type. The table provides the Field name, Category, Created By, and AI detection details for all the fields.

Use the Search fields... field to search for a specific field or use the filters to refine the Fields table. Filter options include:

![A snippet of the Fields table that shows the search field and the available filter options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Manage-Agreement-Types_Agreement-Types_Fields_search-filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Fields table that shows the search field and the available filter options.")

- Created By: Filter the table to display custom (User) or standard (Docusign) fields.
- Category: Filter the table by field classification. Supported categories include: General, Payment, Legal and Compliance, Renewal, Termination, Other, and Human Resources.
- Field Type: Filter the table to show specific types of fields. Supported field types include: Currency, Dropdown, Contains Multiple, Number, Short Text, Date, Duration, and Text.
- AI Status: Filter the table to display fields with Active AI detection or fields that Need Setup.

Note: Administrators and contract managers can use the + Add Fields option to add custom and standard fields to the agreement type.

The More actions (three dots) menu contains options to Edit Details for custom fields or Remove fields from the type. The options in the More actions (three dots) menu are dependent on the AI detection status:

![A snippet of the Fields table that shows the More actions (three dots) menu, including available AI detection options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-Types-Manager_Fields_More-actions_expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc1MDcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.sGcpbwOW9PcnIwqQp7FzZCL9er3WzjTh80rf2VFMMGM&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Fields table that shows the More actions (three dots) menu, including available AI detection options.")

Once the AI detection is set up, the menu contains actions related to the AI detection. For example, you can Refine Results or Test for Accuracy.

title: IAM Agreement Types Manager
text:
Administrators and contract managers can use the *Agreement Types Manager* to:

- Review custom and standard agreement types for the account
- Create custom agreement types
- Edit agreement type details
- Add or remove fields on custom and standard agreement types
- Delete or retire unused custom types
- Support AI detection for custom types

Tip: See the [Custom Agreement Type Extractions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con6f74f3c5-e52b-4611-9d7b-8455c97725b4.html&_LANG=enus "Read about custom agreement type extractions, including their use, purpose, and entry points in Agreement Manager.") topic to learn more about creating custom agreement types.

title: English (U.S.) Language Support
text:
Read about the Agreement Manager AI models and features that are supported in English agreements for customers located in the United States (U.S.).

Agreement Manager is available to customers globally, however, the features and insights vary by region and language. Read about the supported agreement types and attributes that provide insights into English agreements for customers in the United States (U.S.).

CAUTION: The accuracy and appropriateness of AI-assisted insights may vary depending on the agreement language and customer use case. Customers should review all suggested data points for accuracy and to determine if a value is appropriate for its particular circumstances.

See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") article to view supported agreement types, attributes, and data points for other languages and regions.

title: English (U.S.) Language Support
text:
During agreement processing, attributes and field values are surfaced in your agreements. Review the table to see which attributes are surfaced in English (U.S.) agreements.

Important: English (global) is applied to all customers deployed across Docusign datacenters located in the United States (NA), Europe (EU), Canada (CA), Australia (AU), and Japan (JP).

title: English (U.S.) Language Support
text:
) agreements.

Important: English (global) is applied to all customers deployed across Docusign datacenters located in the United States (NA), Europe (EU), Canada (CA), Australia (AU), and Japan (JP).

| Attribute | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Assignment and Change of Control Insights** | |
| Assignment (Change of Control) | Indicates whether the agreement allows for the assignment of rights and obligations to another party. For example, in case of a merger and acquisition (M&A) or other change of control activity. |
| Assignment (General) | Indicates whether the agreement allows one of the parties to assign its rights and obligations to another party. |
| Assignment (Termination Rights) | Indicates whether the agreement allows for termination if one of the parties assigns its rights and obligations to another party. |
| **Compensation and Payment Insights** | |
| Annual Contract Value | The average yearly revenue generated from a contract or customer subscription. It is commonly used in subscription-based businesses to measure the annualized value of a contract, helping organizations track recurring revenue over time. |
| Total Contract Value | The total monetary value of the contract or agreement between two or more parties. In other words, it is the lifetime value of a contract. |
| Late Fees Apply | Indicates whether the agreement explicitly states that if payment is late fees, charges, or interest will be added. |
| Late Fee % | The percentage of the contract value that is charged when late fees are incurred. |
| Payment Terms | The conditions set by a seller regarding when and how payment for goods or services is expected from the buyer. These terms typically specify the time frame for payment, for example, *Net 30* means payment is due 30 days after the invoice date. |
| Price Cap Increase % | The maximum allowable price increase under the agreement. |
| **Confidentiality Insights** | |
| Duration of Confidentiality | Indicates the length of time that the obligations of an NDA remain in effect. |
| **Governing Law, Jurisdiction, and Dispute Resolution Insights** | |
| Governing Law | The rules and laws that will govern the agreement if legal issues or disputes arise. The clause typically identifies whose laws will govern the interpretation and enforcement of the agreement. |
| Jurisdiction | The legal jurisdiction of an agreement in case of a future dispute. This value is typically listed as a specific county or city. |
| **Limitation of Liability Insights** | |
| Liability Cap Amount | The maximum amount or limit that a party will pay for damages or any liability in a specific dollar amount. |
| Liability Cap Duration | Indicates the length of time during which claims can be made under the liability cap within the agreement. |
| Liability Cap Multiplier | The limit a party will pay for damages or any liability, including a multiplier that can increase the cap amount under certain conditions. |
| **Objective Information Insights** | |
| Execution Date | The official date that the agreement was signed by all parties. |
| Languages | Indicates which languages are present in the agreement. |
| NDA Type | Indicates the type of NDA that is in place for the agreement. For example, mutual or one-way. |
| Parties | Contracting parties. Refers to a provision naming the individuals, organizations, or entities that enter into a legally binding agreement (contract). |
| Title | The official title of the agreement. |
| Type (Agreement Type) | Classification of documents based on their title and certain commonalities in their subject matter. For example, Master Services Agreement (MSA), Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA), and Statement of Work (SOW). |
| **Payment Obligation Insights** | |
| Deposit or Initial Payment Amount | The first sum of money that is paid upfront when entering into an agreement. |
| Deposit or Initial Payment Amount - Calculated | The calculated amount paid upfront when entering into an agreement. This value uses text to calculate the amount if not explicitly written in the agreement. |
| Deposit or Initial Payment Amount - Due Date | The date the deposit or initial payment is due. |
| Deposit or Initial Payment Amount - Period Due | The duration of time within which a deposit or initial payment is due. |
| Late Payment Penalties | The penalty for late payments. |
| Late Payment Interest | The interest rate levied on late payments. |
| One Time Payment Amount | A single payment made on a single occasion. The payment is only made once for a specific amount. The payment is not part of a recurring payment schedule. |
| One Time Payment - Due Date | The specific date by which a single, non-recurring payment must be made in full to avoid late fees or penalties. |
| One Time Payment - Period Due | The duration of time within which a one-time payment is due. |
| Early Payment Discounts | A financial incentive for making a payment before the due date. |
| Promisor | The party that is responsible for fulfilling an obligation. |
| **Renewal Insights** | |
| Automatic Renewal (Renewal Type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions stating that an agreement automatically renews at the end of its term unless one or both parties take action to terminate, opt out, or modify it. |
| Evergreen (Renewal Type) | Renewal type. Refers to clauses that contemplate a perpetual continuation of the contract term unless a party takes action to terminate it. |
| Option to Renew (Renewal Type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions that set out a party's option to extend the term of the contract. |
| NonRenewal Notice Period | Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent not to renew an agreement. |
| Renewal - Extension Period | Refers to provisions setting out the additional period of time (duration) that a contract is to be extended beyond its initial term. |
| Renewal Notice Period | Comprised of two data extractions: Renewal Notice Period and NonRenewal Notice Period. Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent to renew an agreement. |
| Term - Renewal Automatic | Refers to provisions that specify the duration of the auto-renewal period. |
| Term - Renewal Option | Refers to provisions setting out a party's option to extend the contract for a specific term. |
| **Term Insights** | |
| Effective Date | Refers to the date on which the contract became legally binding and enforceable. It is the date agreed upon by the parties for beginning the period of performance under the contract. |
| Expiration Date | Refers to the date on which the contract comes to an end and is no longer in force. |
| Term Length | Indicates the length of the term of the agreement (how long the agreement is in effect). Signing parties are obligated to adhere to the terms and conditions within the agreement until the expiration or end date. |
| **Termination Insights** | |
| Termination for Cause - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for cause. For example, for material breach or other events of default. |
| Termination for Convenience - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

title: English (U.S.) Language Support
text:
e notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

See the [Extracted Agreement Insights and Definitions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=uwk1702945852405.html&_LANG=enus "Look up the names and definitions for the attributes and values that are surfaced in Agreement Manager agreements with AI. This topic answers the question: What data is being extracted from my Agreement Manager agreements?") to learn more about the attributes and field values that are surfaced in your agreements.

title: English (U.S.) Language Support
heading_path: Limitation: "Dropdown" attributes (fields) with pre-populated value sets
text:
For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated value sets, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute value only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown.

When processing cannot locate the value within the agreement, the extracted value is *Other*. For example, if an agreement's payment term is 50 days, the surfaced Payment Term value is *Other*:

![A screenshot of the Party Term filter that shows the pre-populated value set for the attribute (field).](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Payment-term-filter_All-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYxMjgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.MSA1VA4ykwjY5kPqUhyq-w88R6HrB1_F6oThwS0D84g&_LANG=enus)

This limitation applies to these attributes (fields) and values:

| Attribute (Field) | Value Set |
| --- | --- |
| Assignment (Change of Control) | No, or consent required; Yes, notice required; Yes, restrictions apply; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (General) | No, or consent required; Yes; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (Termination Rights) | Yes |
| Employment Type | Fixed Term; Full Time; Intern; Part Time |
| Late Fees Apply | Yes; No |
| NDA Type | Mutual; One Way |
| Party Role | Buyer, Seller |
| Payment Term | 15 days; 30 days; 45 days; 60 days; 7 days; 90 days; >90 days; On Receipt; Other; Under 7 days |
| Renewal Type | Auto-Renew; Evergreen; Fixed Term; Renewal Option; Unspecified |

title: English (U.S.) Language Support
text:
During agreement processing, the supported agreement types are identified in your agreements. Once identified, the fields that are associated with the agreement type are surfaced in the agreement.

Review the table to see which agreement types are supported in English (U.S.) agreements. The types are grouped under three categories: *Business Services*, *Human Resources*, and *Miscellaneous*.

| Stock Purchase Agreement | Subscription | Supply/Distribution |

| Human Resources |  |  |

See these topics to learn more about agreement type management and agreement types:

- [IAM Agreement Type and Field Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=uie1724446326038.html&_LANG=enus "Read about how agreement type management is being used to unify the way Docusign capitalizes on agreement types and associated fields. This topic answers the question: What is agreement type management and how does it benefit me?")
- [Agreement Type Definitions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=cfy1747077418341.html&_LANG=enus "Look up definitions for Docusign-provided agreement types.")
- [Standard Fields for Agreement and Non-Agreement Types](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=smm1727282189861.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: What fields are associated with Docusign-provided agreement types? Look up the standard fields that are associated with each agreement and non-agreement type.")

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
Read about the Overview dashboard, including key components and available resources.

The Overview dashboard is the landing page for the Insights hub:

![A screenshot of the Insights hub that displays the Overview dashboard.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Insights-reporting-hub_Overview_cropped.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Insights hub that displays the Overview dashboard.")This dashboard is updated in actual time to provide personalized and actionable
insights at a glance, including:

- Recently viewed (Your Recents) reports
- Starred (Your Favorites) reports
- AI-generated custom report recommendations (Suggested Reports)
- Agreement counts (Weekly Insights) for all the agreements in the account, including newly ingested and expiring agreements
- Agreement dashboard and charts (Review your agreements)
- Additional Docusign insights (Explore Docusign Insights) for upcoming renewals, envelope metric, and custom dashboard and reports
- Help documentation and the + Suggest a feature option (Resources)

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
Use the search bar at the top of the page to Find reports or dashboards:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights the search bar at the top of the page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Search-bar_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights the search bar at the top of the page.")

As you enter a search term, the type-ahead dropdown opens:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the reports and dashboards that match the entered search query.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Search-bar_gov-law-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the reports and dashboards that match the entered search query.")

The items that match the search criteria are listed in the dropdown, grouped by Reports and Dashboards:

- Select a Report to access the detailed report view, including a data
  visualization and an agreement list.
- Select a relevant Dashboard to view a collection of related reports. Dashboards can hold up to 20 reports.

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Your Recents section provides a list of your recently accessed reports, including when you last viewed them:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights a report in the Your Recents section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Your-Recents-section_report-higlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights a report in the Your Recents section.")

The five agreements that you most recently viewed are displayed. From this section, you can:

- Access all the recently viewed reports. Select the View all option to view
  all of your recently viewed reports.
- Go to the detailed report view for a selected report. Select a report name to access the detailed
  report view, including a data visualization and an agreement list.

  Tip: See these topics to learn more about viewing,
  downloading, and customizing reports:
  - [View and Download an Agreement Report](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=izo1702945825083.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to view an agreement chart, drill down to the detailed report view, apply filters, and download agreement data. This topic answers the question: What are my reporting options for Agreement Manager agreements, including applying filters and downloading results?")
  - [Customize and Save Reports for Future Use](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=osx1727376530640.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to customize and save an agreement report for future use.")

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Your Favorites section gives you quick access to your personalized list of starred dashboards and reports:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights a report in the Your Favorites section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Your-Favorites_report-higlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights a report in the Your Favorites section.")

- Access all of the starred dashboards and reports. Select the View all option to view all of your favorite dashboards and reports.
- View to a specific dashboard or report. Select (click) a dashboard or report to access the
  corresponding view, either the dashboard or the report view. Data
  visualizations and agreement lists are displayed in the report
  view.

Select the Favorite (star) icon to "star" the dashboards and reports that you frequently use:

![A snippet of a detailed report view that highlights the Favorite (star) icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreements-dashboard_Report-details_Favorite-icon-selected_generic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of a detailed report view that highlights the Favorite (star) icon.")

Your "starred" dashboards and reports are displayed in the Your Favorites section. See the [Star Your Favorite Reports and Dashboards](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tsk78ef32ef-890c-4e97-96e6-87f9a251d640.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to add your frequently used dashboards and reports to the Your Favorites section on the Overview dashboard.") topic to learn more about this feature.

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Suggested Reports section provides AI-generated custom report recommendations based on the
custom fields in your account. These auto-generated recommendations require a minimum of five data points. When fields (custom or standard) are located in at least five agreements, they are included when generating custom report suggestions.

Use the horizontal scroll bar to view all of the auto-generated custom report recommendations:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Suggested Reports (Beta) section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Insights-reporting-hub_Overview_Suggested-Reports_scrollbar-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Suggested Reports (Beta) section.")

Use these suggestions to create custom reports. Select the report heading for the report that you want to create and use the Save option from the report view:

![A snippet of the report view for an AI-generated report that highlights the Save option in the More actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Insights-reporting_suggested-report_save-from-report-view.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the report view for an AI-generated report that highlights the Save option in the More actions menu.")

Note: The Favorite (star) option is not available for the custom report suggestions. Save the custom report and then use the Favorite (star) icon to add the report to the Your Favorites list.

See the [Create Custom Reports from Suggested Reports (Beta)](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskfc9f9485-65b6-4a2c-95e3-15bd13ce8562.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a custom report from one of the reports in the Suggested Reports (Beta) section on the Overview dashboard.") topic to learn more about this feature.

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Weekly Insights section displays the agreement counts for all the agreements in the account, including All agreements, Expiring agreements, and Upcoming renewals.

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Weekly Insights section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Insights-reporting-hub_Overview_Weekly-Insights-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows the Weekly Insights section.")

Select the report heading to view the agreements that were included in the corresponding insight. See the [View and Download an Overview Report](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tska721c00d-28c9-4949-9ff2-ad0ba7a3d0e8.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to view reports from the Overview dashboard, including accessing and downloading the detailed report view.") topic to learn more about viewing Overview reports.

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Review your agreements section provides a view into your agreements, including Agreements by renewal date and Agreement types:

![A screenshot of the Review your agreement section that shows the cursor hovered over a segment in the Agreement types chart.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Review-your-agreements_hover-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Review your agreement section that shows the cursor hovered over a segment in the Agreement types chart.")

Use this section to locate more specific agreement data. For example:

- View the document count for a segment of a bar or pie chart: Hover the cursor over a chart segment to see the document count and segment name.
- View the detailed report view, filtered for a selected chart segment: Select a segment in the bar or pie chart to go to the report view. The report opens and it is filtered to show the agreements that are associated with the selected segment.
- View a visual summary of all executed and completed agreements in your account: Select the
  View Agreements Dashboard option. The
  Agreements Dashboard opens, and various
  insights and reports are displayed.

See these topics to learn more about these features:

- [Agreements Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=bec1702945765624.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: Where can I find data visualizations and reports for all the agreements in my Docusign account?")
- [View and Download an Agreement Report](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=izo1702945825083.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to view an agreement chart, drill down to the detailed report view, apply filters, and download agreement data. This topic answers the question: What are my reporting options for Agreement Manager agreements, including applying filters and downloading results?")

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Explore DocusignInsights section prompts you to explore additional insights and features:

![A screenshot of the Explore Docusign Insights section that shows options for exploring additional insights and features.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Explore-Docusign-Insights_section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Explore Docusign Insights section that shows options for exploring additional insights and features.")

- Review Upcoming Renewal tile: Select the Review option at the bottom of the tile to go to the Renewals dashboard. See the [Renewals Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=vir1712251054892.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: What does the Renewals dashboard show me and how does it work? Read about the Renewals dashboard, including how to use the charts to filter for agreements and available sorting options.") topic to learn more about this dashboard.
- Review Envelope Dashboard tile: Select the Review option at the bottom of the tile to go to the My dashboard view. Use this dashboard to discover key metrics on your envelopes. See the [My Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=fhl1661468469364.html) topic to learn more about this dashboard.
- Create custom dashboards tile: Select the Create option from the bottom of the tile to create a custom dashboard. The Untitled dashboard page opens. See the [Custom Dashboards and Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conac48cc6c-d92c-4187-a733-08968c218a74.html&_LANG=enus "Read about custom dashboards and reports, including use cases and limitations.") topic to learn more about creating custom dashboards.
- Create custom reports tile: Select the Create option from the bottom of the tile to create a custom report. The Untitled report page opens. See the [Create Custom Reports from Scratch](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskfa65c658-fd7d-4ce8-b26b-08a9ec950aad.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a custom report from scratch, including choosing the relevant data, metrics, and visualization options.") topic to learn more about creating custom reports.

title: Overview Dashboard
text:
The Resources section, at the bottom of the Overview dashboard, includes options to suggest features and access help documentation:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows Resources to suggest new features and access help documentation.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Overview_Resources-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NzksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.YljcV3G1HQgE85DGtzUzL4wK5N9NdqREs0rXSOpgzPI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Overview dashboard that shows Resources to suggest new features and access help documentation.")

- Share your ideas for new features and up-vote other suggestions: Select the + Suggest
  a feature option to share an idea. The Docusign
  Community Ideas page opens, and a list of featured topics are

- Read about IAM dashboards and reports: Select the Agreement dashboard Help Docs option to learn more about using IAM dashboards and reports. For example, the [Agreement Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=jyq1749000353004.html).

title: Japanese Language Support
text:
Read about the Agreement Manager AI models and features that are supported for agreements in Japanese.

Agreement Manager is available to customers globally, however, the features and insights vary by region and language. Read about the supported agreement types, attributes, and data points that provide insights into your Japanese agreements.

CAUTION: The accuracy and appropriateness of AI-assisted insights may vary depending on the agreement language and customer use case. Customers should review all suggested data points for accuracy and to determine if a value is appropriate for its particular circumstances.

Important:

As new or updated AI models are released, your historical agreements can be processed again to surface these data points. Depending on the type of new insights that are available, users can choose to:

- Opt in for reprocessing from the New Insights Available badge (obligation-related attributes and insights)
- Reprocess all the outdated agreements for the account (new or updated AI model)
- Reprocess selected agreements (standard or custom fields)

See the [Agreement Manager Reprocessing Experience](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con44590246-0f0e-43b4-9692-caadb57335ac.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the Agreement Manager reprocessing experience, including its purpose, trigger points, and job size considerations.") article to learn more about this experience.

See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") article to view supported agreement types, attributes, and data points for other languages and regions.

title: Japanese Language Support
text:
During agreement processing, attributes and field values are surfaced in your agreements. Review the table to see which attributes are surfaced in Japanese agreements.

Important: English (global) is applied to all customers deployed across Docusign datacenters located in the United States (NA), Europe (EU), Canada (CA), Australia (AU), and Japan (JP).

| Attribute | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Compensation and Payment Insights** | |
| Total Contract Value | The total monetary value of the contract or agreement between two or more parties. In other words, it is the lifetime value of a contract. |
| **Governing Law, Jurisdiction, and Dispute Resolution Insights** | |
| Governing Law | The rules and laws that will govern the agreement if legal issues or disputes arise. The clause typically identifies whose laws will govern the interpretation and enforcement of the agreement. |
| **Objective Information Insights** | |
| Languages | Indicates which languages are present in the agreement. |
| Parties | Contracting parties. Refers to a provision naming the individuals, organizations, or entities that enter into a legally binding agreement (contract). |
| Type (Agreement type) | Classification of documents based on their title and certain commonalities in their subject matter. For example, Master Services Agreement (MSA), Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA), and Statement of Work (SOW). |
| **Renewal Insights** | |
| Automatic Renewal (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions that state an agreement automatically renews at the end of its term unless one or both parties take action to terminate, opt out, or modify it. |
| Evergreen (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to clauses that contemplate a perpetual continuation of the contract term unless a party takes action to terminate it. |
| Option to Renew (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions that set out a party's option to extend the term of the contract. |
| NonRenewal Notice Period | Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent not to renew an agreement. |
| Renewal - Extension Period | Refers to provisions setting out the additional period of time (duration) that a contract is to be extended beyond its initial term. |
| Renewal Notice Period | Comprised of two data extractions: Renewal Notice Period and NonRenewal Notice Period. Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent to renew an agreement. |
| Term - Renewal Automatic | Refers to provisions that specify the duration of the auto-renewal period. |
| Term - Renewal Option | Refers to provisions setting out a party's option to extend the contract for a specific term. |
| **Term Insights** | |
| Effective Date | Refers to the date on which the contract became legally binding and enforceable. It is the date agreed upon by the parties for beginning the period of performance under the contract. |
| Expiration Date | Refers to the date on which the contract comes to an end and is no longer in force. |
| Term Length | Indicates the length of the term of the agreement (how long the agreement is in effect). Signing parties are obligated to adhere to the terms and conditions within the agreement until the expiration or end date. |
| **Termination Insights** | |
| Termination for Cause - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for cause. For example, for material breach or other events of default. |
| Termination for Convenience - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

title: Japanese Language Support
heading_path: Limitation: "Dropdown" attributes (fields) with pre-populated value sets
text:
For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated value sets, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute value only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown.

When processing cannot locate the value within the agreement, the extracted value is *Other*. For example, if an agreement's payment term is 50 days, the surfaced Payment Term value is *Other*:

![A screenshot of the Party Term filter that shows the pre-populated value set for the attribute (field).](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Payment-term-filter_All-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYxODksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.bRfUaEP-XEoy51ecN2tyd88QavO5vkA6W94fYEuNrFA&_LANG=enus)

This limitation applies to these attributes (fields) and values:

| Attribute (Field) | Value Set |
| --- | --- |
| Assignment (Change of Control) | No, or consent required; Yes, notice required; Yes, restrictions apply; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (General) | No, or consent required; Yes; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (Termination Rights) | Yes |
| Employment Type | Fixed Term; Full Time; Intern; Part Time |
| Late Fees Apply | Yes; No |
| NDA Type | Mutual; One Way |
| Party Role | Buyer, Seller |
| Payment Term | 15 days; 30 days; 45 days; 60 days; 7 days; 90 days; >90 days; On Receipt; Other; Under 7 days |
| Renewal Type | Auto-Renew; Evergreen; Fixed Term; Renewal Option; Unspecified |

title: Japanese Language Support
text:
Obligations are surfaced in English (U.S.) agreements only. The AI model that processes obligations is run from a U.S. server and can only process English agreements in this region.

If your language and region are not supported, manually create the obligations to include this information in dashboards, reports, and other insights.

See these support articles to learn more about obligation management:

This topic answers the question: How can I find and track my agreement obligations?")
