title: Spanish Language Support (Mexico, Spain)
text:
During agreement processing, attributes and field values are surfaced in your agreements. Review the table to see which attributes are surfaced in Spanish agreements for customers in Mexico and Spain.

Important: English (global) is applied to all customers deployed across Docusign datacenters located in the United States (NA), Europe (EU), Canada (CA), Australia (AU), and Japan (JP).

| Attribute | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Compensation and Payment Insights** | |
| Total Contract Value | The total monetary value of the contract or agreement between two or more parties. In other words, it is the lifetime value of a contract. |
| **Governing Law, Jurisdiction, and Dispute Resolution Insights** | |
| Governing Law | The rules and laws that will govern the agreement if legal issues or disputes arise. The clause typically identifies whose laws will govern the interpretation and enforcement of the agreement. |
| **Objective Information Insights** | |
| Languages | Indicates which languages are present in the agreement. |
| Parties | Contracting parties. Refers to a provision naming the individuals, organizations, or entities that enter into a legally binding agreement (contract). |
| Type (Agreement type) | Classification of documents based on their title and certain commonalities in their subject matter. For example, Master Services Agreement (MSA), Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA), and Statement of Work (SOW). |
| **Renewal Insights** | |
| Automatic Renewal (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions that state an agreement automatically renews at the end of its term unless one or both parties take action to terminate, opt out, or modify it. |
| Evergreen (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to clauses that contemplate a perpetual continuation of the contract term unless a party takes action to terminate it. |
| Option to Renew (Renewal type) | Renewal type. Refers to provisions that set out a party's option to extend the term of the contract. |
| NonRenewal Notice Period | Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent not to renew an agreement. |
| Renewal - Extension Period | Refers to provisions setting out the additional period of time (duration) that a contract is to be extended beyond its initial term. |
| Renewal Notice Period | Comprised of two data extractions: Renewal Notice Period and NonRenewal Notice Period. Refers to the period of time required for a party to give notice of their intent to renew an agreement. |
| Term - Renewal Automatic | Refers to provisions that specify the duration of the auto-renewal period. |
| Term - Renewal Option | Refers to provisions setting out a party's option to extend the contract for a specific term. |
| **Term Insights** | |
| Effective Date | Refers to the date on which the contract became legally binding and enforceable. It is the date agreed upon by the parties for beginning the period of performance under the contract. |
| Expiration Date | Refers to the date on which the contract comes to an end and is no longer in force. |
| Term Length | Indicates the length of the term of the agreement (how long the agreement is in effect). Signing parties are obligated to adhere to the terms and conditions within the agreement until the expiration or end date. |
| **Termination Insights** | |
| Termination for Cause - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for cause. For example, for material breach or other events of default. |
| Termination for Convenience - Notice Period | Refers to provisions setting out the notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

title: Spanish Language Support (Mexico, Spain)
text:
e notice period required for a party to terminate a contract for convenience. For example, without a specific reason for doing so and without having to show any breach or default by the other party. |

See the [Extracted Agreement Insights and Definitions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=uwk1702945852405.html&_LANG=enus "Look up the names and definitions for the attributes and values that are surfaced in Agreement Manager agreements with AI. This topic answers the question: What data is being extracted from my Agreement Manager agreements?") to learn more about the attributes and field values that are surfaced in your agreements.

title: Spanish Language Support (Mexico, Spain)
heading_path: Limitation: "Dropdown" attributes (fields) with pre-populated value sets
text:
For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated value sets, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute value only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown.

When processing cannot locate the value within the agreement, the extracted value is *Other*. For example, if an agreement's payment term is 50 days, the surfaced Payment Term value is *Other*:

![A screenshot of the Party Term filter that shows the pre-populated value set for the attribute (field).](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Payment-term-filter_All-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYxOTMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.O9pWt2hPHGk_Yy2daIFIy9boRClOGSjDQc4WpsYh5G8&_LANG=enus)

This limitation applies to these attributes (fields) and values:

| Attribute (Field) | Value Set |
| --- | --- |
| Assignment (Change of Control) | No, or consent required; Yes, notice required; Yes, restrictions apply; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (General) | No, or consent required; Yes; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (Termination Rights) | Yes |
| Employment Type | Fixed Term; Full Time; Intern; Part Time |
| Late Fees Apply | Yes; No |
| NDA Type | Mutual; One Way |
| Party Role | Buyer, Seller |
| Payment Term | 15 days; 30 days; 45 days; 60 days; 7 days; 90 days; >90 days; On Receipt; Other; Under 7 days |
| Renewal Type | Auto-Renew; Evergreen; Fixed Term; Renewal Option; Unspecified |

title: Spanish Language Support (Mexico, Spain)
text:
Obligations are surfaced in English (U.S.) agreements only. The AI model that processes obligations is run from a U.S. server and can only process English agreements in this region.

If your language and region are not supported, manually create the obligations to include this information in dashboards, reports, and other insights.

This topic answers the question: How can I find and track my agreement obligations?")

title: Docusign CLM Integration with the IAM Platform
heading_path: Docusign CLM Integration with the IAM Platform
text:
Read about Docusign CLM integration with the Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform. CLM customers can extract more value from agreements and use Docusign Iris for important agreement insights.

CLM accounts that have an IAM plan are integrated with the Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform. This integration helps CLM customers extract more value from their agreements and business processes. The integration also provides access to Docusign Iris to get important AI insights about agreements.

Note:

- Docusign CLM integration with the IAM platform is available for customers with CLM, CLM+, or CLM with AI Extension accounts only.
- For more information about IAM and IAM plans, see the [Intelligent Agreement Management](https://www.docusign.com/intelligent-agreement-management) website or contact your account representative.

CLM customers can select the Switch to IAM Experience button to access the CLM + IAM integration home page. You can then select the Switch to Classic Experience button to return to the CLM view.

![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Updated_CLM_IAM_home.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTgwMzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.VxkFX5O2WYreFDKiq84X5s88WbyjJt-wh5Iur_nXXcQ&_LANG=enus)

The CLM + IAM integration home page provides access to the following IAM features and functionality:

Agreements
:   Docusign Agreement Manager provides a smart repository to centrally store, manage, and analyze agreements. Agreement Manager also provides AI assistance (through Docusign Iris) to surface key agreement data and provide insights about your agreements. Review [Docusign Agreement Manager for CLM](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con6ab4c322-b97d-4c61-bafe-4b3c9b597e7b.html&_LANG=enus "Read about Agreement Manager for CLM customers with IAM Plans.") for more information.

Insights
:   The Insights page provides centralized access to all reports and dashboards, with personalized views based on user roles, preferences, and favorites. You have access to navigation tools, such as a search bar and frequently accessed links, with real-time updates and summaries of key metrics. Review [IAM Dashboards and Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=jyq1749000353004.html&_LANG=enus) for more information.

    You can create custom reports based on your CLM documents and CLM attributes. Review [Custom Dashboards and Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conac48cc6c-d92c-4187-a733-08968c218a74.html&_LANG=enus) for more information.

    Insights includes obligation management and reporting, which lets contract managers and other stakeholders identify and track contractual obligations and commitments. You can manage obligations as you work with documents and parties in Agreement Manager. You can also report on obligations. This experience also provides AI assistance to surface obligation data in agreements. Review [Obligation Management for CLM Accounts with IAM Plans](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conc4eecaf2-14e4-4da4-bfee-e912aa4a3e03.html&_LANG=enus "Read about obligation management for CLM accounts with Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) plans. Stakeholders can use the IAM platform as a central place to capture and track contractual obligations.") for more information.

    Note:

    - Obligation management in Agreement Manager is available in English and in North America sites only.
    - Obligation analysis using AI is available in North America sites only. Supported obligation types for AI analysis are Payment, Renewal, and Termination.

title: Docusign CLM Integration with the IAM Platform
heading_path: Docusign CLM Integration with the IAM Platform
text:
English and in North America sites only.
    - Obligation analysis using AI is available in North America sites only. Supported obligation types for AI analysis are Payment, Renewal, and Termination.

Parties
:   Party management uses the IAM platform as a central place to manage parties and report on party agreements, including parties in CLM. This experience also provides AI assistance to surface party information during agreement ingestion. Review [Party Management for CLM Accounts with IAM Plans](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con40b44395-1791-4003-be9b-cf241e2caaaf.html&_LANG=enus "Read about party management for CLM accounts with IAM plans. Stakeholders use the IAM platform to manage parties, access party reports, and use Docusign AI to surface party information.") for more information.

Tasks
:   You can view and manage your tasks in the IAM Unified Tasks view. Review [Docusign Unified Task Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ikc1746801059132&topicId=bhd1746801493533.html&_LANG=enus) for more information.

title: Custom Dashboards and Reports
text:
Read about custom dashboards and reports, including use cases and limitations.

Agreement Manager provides standard reports and dashboards so customers can access essential agreement
data. However, these preconfigured reports and dashboards are limited when it comes to
reporting on specialized data, such as custom field data.

Customizable dashboards and reports give you control over the agreement insights that you see - giving you the right data to make smarter decisions. This feature is accessed from the Insights page:

![A snippet of the reporting hub that highlights the Create dropdown with options to create reports and dashboards.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Custom-report-dashboard_Create-expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwNTAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.zFnrQwtMuRPhPuVQpF2DBrV8YiWh384sY-I6oz7c4s0&_LANG=enus)

- **Customizable dashboards** collections of standard and custom reports that show a larger
  picture of a particular focus area. The dashboards are:
  - Created from scratch by choosing reports for the dashboard.
  - Built from an existing template.
- **Customizable reports** individual data visualizations, such as bar charts and graphs. The
  primary ways to create custom reports:
  - **From scratch:** Create custom reports from scratch by choosing the
    relevant data, metrics, and visualization options.
  - **From existing reports:** Create custom reports by updating and
    saving standard reports.
  - **From suggested reports:** Create custom reports by updating and
    saving suggested reports.

Important: Users can create up to 100 custom
dashboards. Each dashboard can contain up to 20 custom or standard reports. By default, the user that creates a custom dashboard or report has administrator permissions for it. They can edit, rename, and delete their custom dashboards and reports.

See these support topics to learn more about creating custom dashboards and reports:

- [Customize and Save Reports for Future Use](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=osx1727376530640.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to customize and save an agreement report for future use.")
- [Create Custom Reports from Scratch](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskfa65c658-fd7d-4ce8-b26b-08a9ec950aad.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a custom report from scratch, including choosing the relevant data, metrics, and visualization options.")
- [Create Custom Dashboards from Templates](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tsk34a013ae-ddd3-40b1-8b01-eadf535959a3.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to build a custom dashboard by using an existing Agreement or Renewal dashboard as a template.")
- [Create Custom Dashboards from Scratch](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskf92697bb-7331-42eb-bc1d-01defe89d61a.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a dashboard from scratch by adding standard and custom reports to the dashboard.")

title: Custom Dashboards and Reports
text:
When you first access the Insights page, callouts are used to
highlight new features:

- **Create a custom report:** Build customizable reports and dashboards
  to uncover trends and focus on the data that's important to you.

  ![A screenshot of the Create a custom report callout that highlights the new custom reports and dashboards feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Custom-report-callout-1.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwNTAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.zFnrQwtMuRPhPuVQpF2DBrV8YiWh384sY-I6oz7c4s0&_LANG=enus)
- **Your reports have been updated:** You will find a new organization
  here, and this tab has been renamed from "Reports".![A screenshot of the Your reports have been updated callout that highlights the newly organized Reports tab.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Reports-tab-callout-2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwNTAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.zFnrQwtMuRPhPuVQpF2DBrV8YiWh384sY-I6oz7c4s0&_LANG=enus)

title: Custom Dashboards and Reports
text:
The custom dashboard and report function give organizations a way to report on specialized
agreement data across their agreement repository. Specialized agreement data could
include custom field data, organization-specific terms, or industry-specific terms.

Consider these example use cases:

**Sales operations:**

Create reports to report on custom fields. For example, to track and report on
product usage by party or region. This specialized agreement data can be used to
enhance expansion efforts and to inform the executive team.

**Legal:**

Creates reports to report on industry-specific regulations and high-risk clauses. For
example, to monitor agreements under the U.K. General Data Protection Regulation
(GDPR) or to track agreements with penalty provisions.

**Procurement:**

Creates reports to monitor custom agreement data, such as volume-discount tiers. For
example, to track agreements with volume-discount tiers to maximize cost
savings.

title: Custom Dashboards and Reports
text:
Consider these limitations for custom reports and dashboards:

| Limitation | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Sharing** | Currently, there is no way to share custom reports and dashboards with other users or groups. |
| **Dashboard maintenance** | Users can delete reports from custom dashboards if the report is no longer relevant, however, this function deletes the report. Once deleted, it is no longer available to view or to add to a dashboard. |
| **Metrics** | Custom reports only support numeric values as metrics or key measures. The use of non-numeric fields as measures is not supported. |
| **Single stack bar charts** | Users are unable to build stacked bar charts or charts that have two levels of pivot. For example, distribution of agreements with governing law, grouped by governing law, and segmented by region or party. |
| **Dashboard templates** | Users cannot set custom dashboards as "templates" for other users. Templates help users to build custom dashboards. Currently, users only have access to Agreements and Renewals dashboards as templates. |
| **Standard report options** | Custom dashboards only include standard Agreement Manager and IAM reports. Users cannot add eSignature reports when building custom dashboards. Note: Currently, the custom report building experience is not available for eSignature reports. |

title: Maintain Your Custom Extractions
text:
Read about the typical maintenance tasks related to your custom extractions.

Custom extractions unlock organization and industry-specific agreement data and insights beyond the standard Docusign-provided fields. This includes custom agreement types and custom fields. Once the AI detection is enabled for your custom agreement types and fields, these values are surfaced in your agreements.

Note: Administrators automatically have access to configure agreement data. For non-administrator users, this feature requires Organize and manage all agreements access to Agreement Manager. These tasks are primarily completed by administrators and contract managers.

Update your custom extractions regularly for maintenance purposes:

- **Update extraction details for organizational changes.** For example, when business definitions and classifications evolve, you can update the details for your custom extractions.
- **Refine the AI detection for continued accuracy.** For example, when an extracted value becomes increasingly inaccurate, refine the AI detection for the custom extraction. Refining the detection helps the AI model "learn" from your updates and corrections.
- **Delete the AI setup when extractions are no longer relevant.** For example, when a custom extraction is deprecated or retired, you can delete the AI setup.

Typical custom extraction maintenance tasks include:

- Update the details for custom types and fields
- Update the dropdown options for custom fields
- Delete the AI setup for custom types and fields
- Refine the AI detection for custom types and fields

  Restriction: The Refine with AI option is only available for English (U.S.) and English (global) agreements. This function is used to fine-tune the definition for your custom extractions.

See the topics in the Related Content pane on the right to learn more about
these tasks.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
Read about the unified search field, a global search feature that provides navigational suggestions across the Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform.

The unified Search field is a global search feature that provides navigational suggestions across the IAM platform. Users can search for information across all the IAM features and products, including jumping to key areas.

title: IAM Unified Search
text: Currently, the unified Search feature is available to only a limited number of select accounts. Contact your Docusign account representative to request access to this feature.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
When you click in the Search field, the Recently Updated and Jump To sections are displayed by default:

- The Recently Updated section displays a list of your recently updated envelopes, documents, and requests:

  ![A snippet of the unified search feature that shows the Recently Updated section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search-expanded_Recently-updated-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)
- The Jump to section contains navigational links for quick access to these key areas in the IAM platform:

  ![A snippet of the unified search feature that shows the Jump To section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search-expanded_Jump-To-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

  - Completed Documents (Agreement Manager)
  - Parties (IAM party hub)
  - All Agreements (eSignature)

    Important: The New navigation toggle must be in the on position (blue) to use the All Agreements option as intended. This toggle is located under the Agreements menu (global header) at the bottom of the navigation pane: ![A screenshot of the New navigation toggle that is located at the bottom of the navigation pane under the Agreements menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_All-Agreements-option_New-navigation-toggle.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)When the toggle is in the off position (white), the All Agreements option takes users to their Inbox.
  - Requests (Agreement Desk)

As you enter search criteria in the field, a list of suggestions is generated dynamically: The search returns results from across the IAM platform, including:

- Relevant parties
- Requests that require your attention
- eSignature envelopes
- Completed documents
- Settings in the Admin menu

![A screenshot of the unified search feature that shows search results from across the IAM platform.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search-expanded_Search-term-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

Tip: Enter an agreement type in the Search field to filter your completed documents by type:

![A screenshot of the unified Search feature that highlights the Filter Completed By option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search-expanded_agreement-type-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

Select the agreement type from the Filter Completed By section or press Alt+Enter to search your completed documents using the entered keywords.

title: IAM Unified Search
text: Here are a few sample use cases for using the unified search feature:

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
**Scenario:** As an Executive, I must sign a change request but can't locate the envelope pending my signature:

Locate the envelopes that require your signature. Enter any of these data points into the unified Search field:

- Envelope ID
- Recipient or sender email address
- Party name

As you enter the data point into the field, a list of suggestions displays.

In this example, you want to apply the search criteria to your envelopes. Select the Envelopes option from the Search In section:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that shows search criteria to locate envelopes requiring action.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-envelope_by-party_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

The Inbox opens and the envelopes that matched your search criteria are displayed.

title: IAM Unified Search
heading_path: Find completed agreements in Agreement Manager
text:
**Scenario:** As an Account Executive, I have a vendor meeting and want to check there is an active non-disclosure agreement (NDA) with them.

Type the name of the party into the search field, including the agreement type. Press the Alt+Enter keys to apply the search criteria to all of your completed agreements:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that shows search criteria to locate non-disclosure agreements for a specific party.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_find-in-completed_party-type_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

The Completed Documents page opens and the agreements that matched your search criteria are displayed in the table:

![A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the agreements that match the entered search criteria and applied filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_find-in-completed-agreement-example_results.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

In this example, the Party and Type filters were applied to the agreement list table based on the entered search terms.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
**Scenario:** As an In-House Counsel, I must review changes to the contract language for a deal. The assignment was sent to me as an Agreement Desk request. I must locate the request quickly so I can complete the review.

In this example, use the unified Search field to go to the Requests dashboard. Click in the Search field and select the Requests option from the Jump To section:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that highlights the Requests option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-request_go-to-Requests_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

Remember: The Recently Updated and Jump To sections are displayed by default when you click in the unified Search field. These sections are replaced with suggestions when you enter a keyword or phrase in the field.

From the Requests dashboard, expand the Owner filter, choose your name from the list, and select Apply:

![A screenshot of the Requests dashboard that shows the expanded Owner filter and a selected name.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-request_Owner-filter_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

The Requests list updates and your assignments are displayed in the table. If necessary, apply additional filters to refine the results further.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
**Scenario:** As a Procurement Manager, I'm managing a renewal with one of my vendors and must get an overview of our overall business relationship.

Enter the name of your vendor in the unified Search field. A list of suggestions is displayed, including relevant parties.

Select the vendor's name from the Parties section:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that highlights a party in the Parties section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-specific-party_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

The IAM party hub pages provide an overview of your business relationship with a selected party, including agreements and obligations.

The vendor's Agreements tab opens in the party hub. A list of your agreements with the vendor is displayed:

![A screenshot of the party hub Agreements tab that shows a list of agreements associated with the selected party or group.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-party_party-hub-agreements_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

Select the other tabs to gain additional insights:

- Overview tab: Displays a visual summary of all active agreements for specific parties or groups, including a Party summary and Recent activity.
- Hierarchies tab: Displays a list of agreement hierarchies for the selected party or group. Hierarchies show how agreements are related to each other.
- Obligations tab: Displays a list of all the obligations that are tied to the selected party or group.

Note:

The Details tab shows the display name, party type, and party side for the selected party or group. The Organize and manage all agreements permission is required to update these details.

title: IAM Unified Search
heading_path: Find completed documents for specific agreement types
text:
**Scenario:** As an Internal Auditor, I must audit all the lease agreements that were signed last year.

Type "lease" in the unified Search field. The search results show an option to filter your completed documents by agreement type.

Select the Lease option from the Filter Completed By section:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that highlights the filter option in the search results.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-lease_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

The Completed Documents page opens and your lease agreements are displayed in the table. Use the Filters option to show effective lease agreements for last year.

Locate the Effective Date filter in the All Filters dialog box and apply a custom date range for last year:

![A screenshot of the All Filters dialog box that shows the applied Effective Date filter.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_locate-leases_date-range_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

Your effective leases for the last year are displayed in the table.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
**Scenario:** As an account administrator, I must update the IAM permissions for a new employee.

Type "user" in the unified Search field. The search results show an option to jump directly to the Users page within Account Administration.

Select the Users option from the Jump To section:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that highlights the Users option in the Jump To section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_update-user-permissions_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

The Users page opens within Account Administration. Locate the user that you want to update and select the Actions option:

![A screenshot of the Account Administration Users page that highlights the Actions dropdown.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_user-example_Users-page_Actions_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

Select the relevant action from the dropdown list. For example, to grant the user access to the account's completed documents, select the Manage Agreement Manager Access option.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
The unified Search field supports full-text searches with a single query string:

![A screenshot of the unified Search field that shows an example of a full-text search using a single query string.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Unified-search_advanced-search_query-string-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwODYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.kjVc_AA6feXCEVp4XSHoDrGYpLdt_KXxIAsv89O1HfE&_LANG=enus)

These searches support advanced search features, such as:

- Boolean operators (use AND, OR, and NOT operators to combine search terms)
- Boosting (use a caret (^) to prioritize search terms)
- Exact phrase matching (use quotation marks ("") to find an exact phrase)
- Proximity search (use the tilde (~) followed by a number to find agreements based on word proximity to each other)
- Wildcard search (use the asterisk (\*) to find agreements that contain variations of the entered search term)

See the [Advanced Search Queries](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conce9d9428-f27e-49ad-9001-3c7a0820ae78.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the advanced search query feature that gives you control over how your results are matched and ranked.") article to learn more about using advanced search features with single query strings.

title: IAM Unified Search
text:
This table contains a list of shortcuts for using the unified search feature. These keywords are shortcuts to help you access specific places within the IAM platform.

| Enter these keywords... | ...to go here |
| --- | --- |
| App Center, Apps | Docusign App Center |
| Envelopes, Declined, Voided, Bulk Send, Drafts, Inbox | Docusign eSignature (Envelopes) |
| Completed Documents, Contracts, Extractions, Agreement Manager, Repository | Docusign Agreement Manager (Completed Documents page) |
| Clients, Counterparties, Customers, Entity, Parties, Party, Supplier, Vendor | IAM Party Hub (Parties page) |
| Agreement Desk, Intake, Request, Tickets | Docusign Agreement Desk (Requests page) |
| Box, Dropbox, Google Drive, My Sources, OneDrive | Account Administration (Document Sources page) |
| Address Book, Contacts, Directory | Account Administration (Contacts page) |
| Language, Regional Settings, Time and Date | Account Administration (Regional Settings page) |
| Access Codes, Account Discovery, Account Security, Authentication Settings, Make My Account Searchable, Password Rules, Security Settings, Web App Session Timeout | Account Administration (Security Settings page) |
| Account, Account Name, Account Profile, Administrator Custom Message, Custom Help Contact | Account Administration (Account Profile page) |
| Account Users, Add User, Download Users, Edit User, Reset Password, Users | Account Administration (Users page) |

Important: Access to IAM functionality is controlled by permissions and permission profiles. The suggestions displayed in the search results are based on your assigned permissions.

title: Obligation Management for CLM Accounts with IAM Plans
heading_path: Obligation Management for CLM Accounts with IAM Plans
text:
Read about obligation management for CLM accounts with Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) plans. Stakeholders can use the IAM platform as a central place to capture and track contractual obligations.

Obligations are actions or commitments that parties fulfill as part of agreements. Contract managers and other stakeholders can manage obligations to ensure that contractual commitments get captured, tracked, and fulfilled.

For IAM plan subscribers, Docusign CLM integrates with the Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform. With this integration, you can manage obligations and use Docusign AI as you work with documents in Docusign Agreement Manager. For example, you can identify renewal, payment, and termination terms.

Important: This obligation management experience is available only for CLM accounts that have an IAM plan. For more information about IAM or IAM plans, see the [Intelligent Agreement Management website](https://www.docusign.com/intelligent-agreement-management) or contact your account representative.

Note:

- Obligation management in Agreement Manager is available in English and in North America sites only.
- Obligation analysis using AI is available in North America sites only. Supported obligation types for AI analysis are Payment, Renewal, and Termination.

title: Obligation Management for CLM Accounts with IAM Plans
heading_path: Obligation Management for CLM Accounts with IAM Plans
text:
The obligation management process includes any of the following activities:

- Capturing obligations manually or through AI analysis
- Managing obligations in agreements or by party
- Tracking obligation dates and fulfillment status
- Reporting on obligations

Review [Obligation Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=csm1727128259486.html&_LANG=enus) for more information.

title: Bulk Metadata Editing
text:
Read about the Bulk Metadata Editing feature, including use cases, typical roles and permissions, and a process overview.

The *Bulk Metadata Editing* feature is used to update the agreement data for a group of documents all at once. This is accomplished by using a pre-formatted, Docusign-generated spreadsheet file. Use this spreadsheet as a template for editing your agreement data in bulk.

Important: The values provided by this flow are considered "user-confirmed". The existing values are overwritten and the fields are excluded from future updates. For example, when the document is reprocessed for additional data points.

Download the spreadsheet for a group of selected documents and edit the agreement data in the file:

![A snippet of the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Edit Agreement Data option for selected documents.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Bulk-metadata-editing_Edit-Agreement-Data-for-selected-docs_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3NzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.g5Wf2ZbGtYydwJqWu1mn4Gw1DhIDwLDpScDHunxLIfY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Edit Agreement Data option for selected documents.")

The spreadsheet contains rows for each of the selected agreements and columns for all the custom and standard fields in the account. The spreadsheet does not contain any data values for the selected agreements.

Populate the spreadsheet with the relevant metadata and import it back into Agreement Manager:

![A screenshot of the Import data from a spreadsheet dialog box that shows a selected spreadsheet file.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Bulk-metadata-editing_Import-data-from-a-spreadsheet_dialog.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3NzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.g5Wf2ZbGtYydwJqWu1mn4Gw1DhIDwLDpScDHunxLIfY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Import data from a spreadsheet dialog box that shows a selected spreadsheet file.")

Note: You can use the *Bulk Metadata Editing* feature to edit the metadata for up to 1,000 agreements at a time. For larger jobs, you have the option to edit your documents in batches.

The documents are updated with the user-provided agreement data and existing field values are overwritten with the new metadata. Keep in mind, this only applies to the selected group of documents. Once the upload job is successfully completed, you can search for, filter by, preview, and edit the updated data in Agreement Manager.

title: Bulk Metadata Editing
text:
Document migration is the primary use case for the *Bulk Metadata Editing* feature. When organizations migrate documents from external repositories into Agreement Manager, not all agreement-level data can be brought over. For example, legacy attributes from Docusign CLM and Salesforce fields.

This disconnect leads to missing agreement data in Agreement Manager and incomplete search and reporting. Downstream workflows are also impacted. Use the *Bulk Metadata Editing* feature to update the metadata for the migrated documents.

Before using the feature, an administrator or contract manager must create custom extractions for the missing fields. When you download the pre-formatted spreadsheet, the file includes all the custom and standard fields in the account.

Important: Be sure that the custom fields are linked to all the relevant agreement types. If you provide values for fields that are not associated with the corresponding agreement type, the data is skipped. See the [Rules for Updating the Spreadsheet File](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con3951e9fb-5861-43ad-ba30-253db38295a0.html&_LANG=enus "Read about important rules for updating the pre-formatted spreadsheet file.") topic to learn more about formatting rules and errors.

Download the pre-formatted spreadsheet for the migrated documents and provide the relevant metadata. Import the data back into Agreement Manager to update the values in the selected documents.

**Secondary use cases**

There are a number of secondary use cases for bulk metadata editing, such as:

- **Data cleanup and party name normalization:** Correct party names, normalize internal IDs, and fix inconsistent values across thousands of agreements.
- **Governance and permissions:** Tag your agreements with specific metadata to align with internal governance models. For example, region, business unit, sensitivity level, or owner. Once added to your agreements, these values can drive downstream permissions.
- **Reporting and analytics alignment:** Add classification fields to your agreements to refine the data in your dashboards and reports. For example, industry, segment, product family, or category.

title: Bulk Metadata Editing
text:
**Permission requirements**

The *Bulk Metadata Editing* feature has *feature*-level and *agreement*-level permission requirements:

- **Feature-level permission:** This feature is available to users with bulk upload access to Agreement Manager. The Upload up to 1,000 files at a time toggle is managed from the User profile page. See the [Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=eut1712157553977.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the available Agreement Manager permissions, including how users and groups are granted access to Agreement Manager agreements and example roles for each permission.") topic to learn more about the bulk upload permission.
- **Agreement-level permission:** Users can only use this feature on agreements to which they have "edit" permission. For example, users with Can Manage or Can Edit agreement-level access.

  Note: Users with Organize and manage all agreements access to Agreement Manager can use this feature on all the agreements in their account.

**Typical roles**

While this feature is available to users with *bulk upload* permissions, it is mostly used by administrators and contract managers. These users have Organize and manage all agreements access to Agreement Manager agreements and can bulk upload documents.

The contract manager role can include teams from across the organization, such as Legal and Contract Operations teams.

title: Bulk Metadata Editing
text:
Follow a three-phase process to use the *Bulk Metadata Editing* feature:

![An infographic that shows the phases of the Bulk Metadata Editing process.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Bulk-metadata-editing_process-fllow_infographic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3NzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.g5Wf2ZbGtYydwJqWu1mn4Gw1DhIDwLDpScDHunxLIfY&_LANG=enus "An infographic that shows the phases of the Bulk Metadata Editing process.")

- **Phase 1: Prepare and Scope**

  Plan and prepare for your agreement updates:

  - Plan for the new data points. Set up the new custom fields in Agreement Manager before downloading the pre-formatted spreadsheet. The spreadsheet includes all the custom and standard fields in the account. Be sure to add the new custom fields to all the relevant agreement types.
  - Determine the scope of the updates. Filter the agreement list table to locate the agreements that you want to update. For example, filter the table by upload job, agreement set, party, or agreement type.
- **Phase 2: Download and Edit**

  Download and edit the pre-formatted spreadsheet for the group of selected documents:

  - Download the spreadsheet file. Select the documents that you want to update from the agreement list table on the Agreement Manager homepage. You can edit up to 1,000 agreements at a time in a single upload job. Larger data sets are processed in batches.
  - Edit the spreadsheet to include the new metadata values. When you edit the spreadsheet, follow the formatting rules and do not change the template structure. For example, do not insert columns and rows. And do not edit the first two rows or the first three columns.
- **Phase 3: Upload and Sync**

  Import the updated spreadsheet file and resolve any upload errors.

  Important: When you import the updated agreement data, the current data is overwritten. This action cannot be undone once saved. The user-provided data is final. The cells must contain a valid value to overwrite the current value. If the cell is empty in the spreadsheet, the current field value is retained.

  - Import the updated metadata file. Use the Import Data option to import data from a spreadsheet. This option is located in the Add (+) menu on the Agreement Manager homepage.
  - Agreement data is synced. When you import the new data, the existing values are overwritten, including the AI-extracted values. Agreement Manager applies all valid cell values and flags formatting errors in the job monitoring hub.

    Resolve the flagged formatting errors and re-import the spreadsheet file. Repeat this step until all the cell values are uploaded successfully.

Once the job succeeds, the updated metadata is reflected in Agreement Manager for your selected documents. You can search for, filter by, preview, and report on the new agreement data.

title: Bulk Metadata Editing
text:
When you edit the pre-formatted spreadsheet, it is critical that you follow the formatting requirements and spreadsheet rules. During the data import, only the valid cell values are uploaded to Agreement Manager.

Resolve the cell values that failed due to formatting errors before you import the data again. For example:

![A snippet of the Job status for a data import job that shows the error details for a failed file.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Bulk-metadata-editing_Job-status_example-error_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3NzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.g5Wf2ZbGtYydwJqWu1mn4Gw1DhIDwLDpScDHunxLIfY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Job status for a data import job that shows the error details for a failed file.")

Consider these rules when editing the spreadsheet file:

- Maintain the file structure of the pre-formatted spreadsheet file:

  - Always download a fresh spreadsheet from Agreement Manager for the agreements that you want to update.
  - Do not edit the header row, including updating the header names and inserting additional columns.
  - Do not edit the data in the second row of the spreadsheet. This row contains the mapping data for the fields.
  - Do not add or rename the columns.
  - Do not add extra rows. One row per agreement.
- Adhere to strict field-level formatting rules when editing your agreement data. Specific formatting rules exist for text, date, number, currency, duration, multi-value, party, and dropdown fields.

See these topics to learn more about the spreadsheet rules and formatting requirements:

- [Rules for Updating the Spreadsheet File](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con3951e9fb-5861-43ad-ba30-253db38295a0.html&_LANG=enus "Read about important rules for updating the pre-formatted spreadsheet file.")
- [Formatting Requirements for Metadata Editing](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=refa47e5582-efd8-403b-b39c-45a0c05beb1f.html&_LANG=enus "Look up spreadsheet rules and formatting requirements for using the Bulk Metadata Edit.")

title: Bulk Metadata Editing
heading_path: Entry points for the spreadsheet download
text:
There are two main locations from which you can download the pre-formatted spreadsheet file:

1. **Agreement list table (Agreement Manager homepage):** Apply filters to locate and select the documents that you want to update. Expand the Edit (pencil) dropdown and select the Agreement Data option:

   ![A snippet of the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Agreement Data option for a group of selected documents.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Bulk-metadata-editing_Spreadsheet-download_entry-option-1.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3NzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.g5Wf2ZbGtYydwJqWu1mn4Gw1DhIDwLDpScDHunxLIfY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Agreement Data option for a group of selected documents.")
2. Uploaded Agreements **table (Job monitoring hub):** Download the pre-formatted spreadsheet file for the agreements in an upload job. For example, you migrated agreements from an external repository and some of the metadata is missing.

   ![A snippet of the Uploaded Agreements table that shows the Export Agreement Data option in the Actions menu for an upload job.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Bulk-metadata-editing_Spreadsheet-download_entry-option-2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY3NzIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.g5Wf2ZbGtYydwJqWu1mn4Gw1DhIDwLDpScDHunxLIfY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Uploaded Agreements table that shows the Export Agreement Data option in the Actions menu for an upload job.")

   1. Go to the job monitoring hub. Expand the Settings (gear) menu on the Agreement Manager homepage and select the Uploads and Processing Status option.

      The All Jobs page opens and the Uploaded Agreements view is displayed.
   2. Locate the relevant upload job. Review the Job Name, Source, Files, and Status columns to locate the relevant upload job.

      Tip: Use the Created date, Status, and Source filters to help you locate the relevant upload job.
   3. Expand the Actions menu for the relevant upload job and select the Export Agreement Data option.

      Tip: The Export Agreement Data option is not available for spreadsheet uploads. Use the Source filter to filter out Spreadsheet uploads.

The View or edit agreement data in a spreadsheet dialog box opens. Edit the File name as needed and select the Download and Edit option. The spreadsheet file is downloaded to your local Downloads folder.
