heading_path: Can I restrict which historical agreements are ingested to Agreement Manager?
text:
No. Currently, you cannot choose which Docusign historical agreements are auto-ingested into Agreement Manager. All historical agreements are ingested.

See the [General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=jyn1704248204281.html) support topic for more information.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I use ingestion filtering to sync agreements from eSignature?
text: No. Ingestion filtering is not widely available. Customers must meet specific criteria and complete a request form before being considered for this functionality. Contact your account executive or account team to discuss this function further.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I set access controls for ingested agreements?
text:
Yes. You have the option of adding an agreement set to the sync configuration. Agreement sets are used to organize agreements into groups based on filters:

- Share sets with users or groups
- Limit access to the set agreements by assigning access levels

See the [Agreement Set Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=zed1730843285476.html) support topic to learn more about agreement sets.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I bulk share documents with colleagues?
text:
Yes. Agreements can be shared in bulk with agreement sets. See these support topics to learn more about agreement sets:

- [Agreement Set Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=zed1730843285476.html)
- [Create an Agreement Set](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=jay1736181359265.html)
- [Add Agreements to Sets Based on Attribute Values](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=txb1736186243024.html)
- [Share an Agreement Set](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=pvb1736186431453.html)

Note: Only users that are assigned the Organize and manage all agreements permission can create and manage agreement sets. This toggle is turned on from the user or group profile page by an administrator.

Agreements can also be shared during the bulk upload process:

- Add to agreement sets
- Share files

Note: The bulk upload process is available to users with the Upload up to 1,000 files at a time permission. This toggle is turned on from the user profile page by an administrator.

See these support topics to learn more about sharing agreements from the bulk upload process:

- [Bulk Upload Documents and Set Access Controls](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=leq1712700300298.html)
- [Share an Agreement Set](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=pvb1736186431453.html)
- [Share an Agreement with Others](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=vyz1722979030156.html)

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: If I add more agreements to a set, are the "share" settings updated automatically?
text:
Yes. Once you share an agreement set with other users or groups, they will have access to any agreements that are added in the future. Likewise, if a document is removed from an agreement set, it no longer displays in the agreement list for shared users or groups.

See these support topics to learn more about agreement sets and share settings:

- [Share an Agreement Set](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=pvb1736186431453.html)
- [Share an Agreement with Others](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=vyz1722979030156.html)

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I restrict users with "view" access from downloading agreements?
text:
No. There is no special permission for restricting access to download documents.

See these support topics to learn more about agreement access:

- [User and Group Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=eut1712157553977.html)
- [Direct Sharing and Agreement Downloads](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=hrr1722978886188.html)

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Are received agreements synced to Agreement Manager?
text: Yes. Your completed eSignature envelopes, whether you are the recipient or the sender, are automatically ingested into Agreement Manager. Both the sent and received agreements are ingested if the envelope is completed.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I display the envelope ID in the agreement list table?
text:
Yes. The Envelope ID column is displayed in the agreement list table by default. If this column is not visible, customize the table so the Envelope ID column is displayed.

The envelope value is displayed for any documents that were ingested from completed eSignature envelopes.

See the [Display the Envelope ID in the Agreement List Table](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=sqs1748881628076.html) support topic for more information.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I view report data based on agreements in a set?
text:
Yes. The Sets filter is available for all the insights and charts on the Agreements Dashboard view. Use this filter to view report data for the agreements in a selected set.

See the [View Report Data for Sets of Agreements](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskf1577eb7-c826-4181-8a66-d0e9ff353b86.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to filter an agreement report to display data for a selected set of agreements.") support topic for more information.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I subscribe to dashboard reports?
text:
Use the Subscribe button to subscribe to standard and custom reports. Before setting up a subscription, be sure to customize the report so that the relevant data is displayed.

Tip: If you make changes to the report, expand the dropdown in the top-right corner and select Save As. The report is saved to the REPORT TYPE > Custom section located in the pane on the left.

After customizing the report, select Subscribe and complete the Create subscription form. See the [Subscribe to Receive Report Notifications](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=wfw1734545937270.html) support topic to learn more about report subscriptions.

title: Agreement Manager Help FAQs
heading_path: Can I update my email notification preferences?
text: Yes. Notification preferences give you control over the email notifications that you receive. By default, all the notification types related to the completed agreements in your account are enabled. See the [Customize Notification Settings for Your Completed Agreements](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tsk155b1ed7-7b45-43cd-be92-2a5279630c0f.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to customize your email notification settings from the Notification Preferences page.") topic to learn more about customizing your notification preferences.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
Read about the available Agreement Manager permissions, including how users and groups are granted access to Agreement Manager agreements and example roles for each permission.

Administrators are responsible for safeguarding access to agreements in Agreement Manager. This includes making sure that the appropriate users and groups can view or manage agreements, and perform bulk uploads. Administrators also manage group membership for Agreement Manager groups.

This topic reviews the available Agreement Manager permissions, including how access is assigned to users and groups.

 

Tip: In some cases, you might want to restrict the ability to delete agreements or update attributes to specific users and groups.

Note: See the  [Account Administration Guide](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390) for more information about using the menu to manage users and groups.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
Account administrators automatically have full secure access to all Agreement Manager features by
default. This access includes bulk ingestion and agreement set management
functionality. For example, administrators can use agreement sets to ensure that
only the appropriate users have access to sensitive documents.

Restriction: While administrators automatically have
full access to all the Agreement Manager features, they do not have access to
view the agreements. Access is explicitly assigned to administrators for them to
view any of the agreements in the account. See the [Agreement Sharing and Downloads](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=hrr1722978886188.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: What are my direct sharing and download options for Agreement Manager documents, including the required permissions?") article to learn more about sharing agreements
with others.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
Access to Agreement Manager agreements and features is set at the account-level for users and groups. There are two ways that Agreement Manager access is assigned:

1. **Manually assigned by an account administrator.** Administrators can assign Agreement Manager access from the User or Group profile page under the Admin menu.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Manager access section that shows the available permission levels for Agreement Manager agreements.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Access_Assign-permissions-manually.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)
2. **Managed by an assigned permission profile.** Administrators use permission profiles to
   assign permissions for eSignature, Templates, Workflow Builder, and various IAM
   features. For example, Agreement Manager and Agreement Desk.

   The assigned permission profile dictates the user's Agreement Manager access:

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Manager access section that shows the user's permissions are managed by a permission profile.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Access_Managed-by-permission-profile_info-marker.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
Permission profiles are groups of settings that determine the behavior and actions available for
a user. Administrators assign permission profiles to users when they are added to an
account. These profiles make it easier to manage permission settings for large
numbers of users. Administrators can update the profile settings, which are applied
to all users with that profile, instead of changing permissions for users
individually.

When creating or updating permission profiles, administrators have the option to include Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) permissions, such as Agreement Manager Permissions:

![A screenshot of the Add Permission Profile dialog box that highlights the available Agreement Manager Permissions.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Permission-profile_add-new_Navigator-Permissions_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)

See the [Permission Profiles](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=pof1583277362435.html) article to learn more about using permission profiles.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
"View all agreements" versus "Organize and manage all agreements"
text:
Important:

When organizations purchase an Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) plan with Agreement Manager, by default, all users can access their
own shared, received, sent, and uploaded agreements. However, specific Agreement Manager access is required to view, organize, and manage all the agreements in the account.

There are two options for granting access to the agreements in an account:

![A screenshot of the Agreement Manager access section that highlights the permissions for accessing the account's agreements.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Access_Navigator-agreement-permissions_toggles-enabled.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)

- View all agreements in this account: Authorizes users or groups to view and download all agreements in the account.
- Organize and manage all agreements: Authorizes users or groups to view, edit, download, and delete all agreements in the account. This permission level also grants access to manage agreement sets and custom extractions, like agreement types and fields.

These permissions control access to view Agreement Manager agreements and to perform various management tasks. This applies to administrators as well. While administrators automatically have full access to all the Agreement Manager features, they do not have access to view the Agreement Manager agreements.

Note: Agreements are permanently stored in Agreement Manager unless they are deleted by users with the appropriate permissions:

- Users with Organize and manage all agreements access to Agreement Manager can delete any of the agreements from the repository.
- Other users can delete only the agreements to which they have Can Manage access.

eSignature retention is not applicable to Agreement Manager.

See the [Capabilities by Agreement Manager Permissions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=vhx1743523538507.html&_LANG=enus "Look up the available capabilities for each Agreement Manager permission.") article to learn more about the specific feature access for these permission levels.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
All users can upload up to five third-party agreements to Agreement Manager. However, to upload more than five files to Agreement Manager, an additional permission is required. The Upload up to 1,000 files at a time permission is assigned from the User page under the Admin menu. This permission can also be assigned from a permission profile.

Once this permission is turned on, the user can upload up to 1,000 files at a time to Agreement Manager:

![A screenshot of the Agreement Manager access section that highlights the bulk upload permission and shows that it is turned on.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Access_Bulk-upload-toggle_enabled.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)

Note: The *bulk upload permission* is required to upload documents from
third-party cloud storage locations.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
The primary Agreement Manager roles are: Administrators, contract managers, and contract viewers. Administrators and contract managers share similar Agreement Manager access. Both roles have full access to Agreement Manager features, however, administrators cannot view the agreements in an account.

Note: In-product prompts encourage administrators to assign permissions for contract managers:

![A screenshot of the message box that prompts administrators to assign permissions for contract managers.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Access_Assign-contract-manager_prompt.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)

Administrators and contract managers share similar responsibilities, such as reprocessing agreements for new extractions and creating agreement sets.

Here are typical permissions and example use cases by role:

| Role | Permissions | Use Cases |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Administrators | Administrators have full, secure access to all Agreement Manager features by default, including:  - View all agreements in this account - Organize and manage all   agreements - Upload up to 1,000 files at a   time  **Restriction:** Administrators do not have access to view the agreements in an account. They must be explicitly assigned access to view an agreement. | - Manage permission profiles - Manage user and group access to Agreement Manager agreements - Secure access to completed documents with agreement sets - Enable cloud storage providers for document uploads - Reprocess agreements for new data points, such as custom extractions - Manage parties, obligations, agreement sets, and agreement types |
| Contract managers | Contract managers are assigned permissions by an administrator, either explicitly or with a permission profile.  This role has full access to Agreement Manager features, including the agreements in the account:  - View all agreements in this account - Organize and manage all agreements - Upload up to 1,000 files at a time  **Restriction:** Contract managers have no access to Admin menu functionality, such as user and group management. | - Document management, including:   - Data reviews for extracted attributes and values   - Agreement ingestion and uploads   - Reprocessing for new data points and extractions   - Sharing and securing access to agreements with sets - Party management, including:   - Managing agreement hierarchies   - Merging similar parties - Analytics and reporting, including:   - Managing custom extractions   - Tracking obligations and renewals   - Reporting on agreements, obligations, renewals, and party data |
| Contract viewers | Contract viewers are assigned permissions by an administrator, either explicitly or with a permission profile. This role has limited access to Agreement Manager agreements and features, including:  - View all agreements in this account - Upload up to 1,000 files at a time (optional)  **Restriction:** Contract viewers only have access to view and download agreements in the account. This role typically does not require bulk upload permissions. | - Upload single agreements to Agreement Manager - Verify agreement details, such as renewal terms, payment terms, and key dates |

See the [Capabilities by Agreement Manager Permissions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=vhx1743523538507.html&_LANG=enus "Look up the available capabilities for each Agreement Manager permission.") article to learn more about Agreement Manager access.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
The Insights bar is an interactive deck of cards on the Agreement Manager homepage that surfaces relevant, actionable insights and prompts. These cards include links to reports or next steps.

During Agreement Manager onboarding, administrators are prompted to assign a contract manager if one hasn't already been assigned:![A snippet of the Agreement Manager homepage that shows the Insights bar, including cards about upcoming renewals and a reprocessing prompt.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Insights-bar_admin-prompt-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)

Other prompts are displayed for both administrators and contract managers:

- **Agreement set prompt:** Administrators and contract managers are prompted to secure
  sensitive documents by creating agreement sets.![A screenshot of an Insights card that prompts the user to create an agreement set.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Insights-bar_Agreement-set-prompt.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)Use the Create Sets option to separate
  sensitive agreements into secure agreement sets.
- **Reprocessing prompt:** Administrators and contract managers are prompted to run the latest AI model and reprocess agreements for new extractions.![A screenshot of an Insights card that prompts the user to run the latest AI model.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator-Insights-bar_Reprocessing-prompt.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYyODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.f5pIP8DOfhqOMvUSNgt4nRV1jNB4eMiGP6XVebYamKA&_LANG=enus)Use the Run Update option to reprocess your agreements for new insights and extractions.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
Agreement sets are named groups of agreements that can be shared with users and groups. These sets give administrators and contract managers a granular way to control access to agreements.

For example, a contract manager can organize agreements for productivity and data privacy by creating an agreement set. Once created, the contract manager now has an efficient way to grant access to the appropriate users and groups.

Consider this pain point:

- The contract manager oversees thousands of sales agreements. They need an efficient way to grant
  access to a subset of these agreements.
- The renewals team needs access to all master service agreements (MSAs) with upcoming expirations
  and no auto-renewal terms. The U.S. sales team needs access to all MSAs under
  U.S. jurisdiction.
- The contract manager creates agreement sets to grant access to the relevant agreements for each team.

See the [Agreement Set Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=zed1730843285476.html&_LANG=enus "Read about agreement set management including how to use sets to control access to agreements. This topic answers the question: What are agreement sets and how can I use them?") article to learn more about using this feature to control access to your agreements in Agreement Manager.

title: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
heading_path: Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles
text:
Administrators can manage group membership by adding and removing users from a group. Groups are managed from the Admin menu, where the administrator can:

- Add a user to an existing group
- Remove a user from an existing group
- Create a new group
- Add and update users

Note: The Bulk Add and Bulk Update functions are described in the Docusign eSignature Admin guide. See the [User Bulk Actions](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=mxm1583277431469.html) topic for more information.

See the [Docusign Account Administration -
Groups](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=cuv1583277363488.html) article to learn more about creating and managing groups for your
account.

title: Natural Language Search Queries
text:
Read about how natural language search queries, including components of the
Search Results view.

Natural language (NL) queries offer an intuitive and efficient way for you to find
agreement information. Enter a question or phrase into the search field on the Completed Documents page. The query returns a direct answer and a list of relevant agreements.

Important: Depending on the nature of the question posed, not all queries yield both direct answers and a list of agreements. Some queries may only provide a list of relevant agreements.

![A snippet of the Completed Documents view that shows an example search question to locate an amendment for a specific party.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Example-question-with-dropdown.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed Documents view that shows an example search question to locate an amendment for a specific party.")

This type of search is more robust than traditional keyword searches. With this search,
you can:

- **Search in your own words:** NL processing supports a more intuitive and
  human-like search experience.
- **Find answers faster:** NL queries return lists of relevant agreements and direct answers to your questions.
- **Make more impactful decisions:** Gain insights as you search, to inform strategies and
  build stronger relationships with clients and vendors.

Tip: Ask a complex question to get a direct
answer and a list of agreement lists that match the query. For example, if you asked "What is the
value of my purchase agreements with Company A"? The search results would include:

- A direct answer to your question (the total contract value for your purchase
  agreements with Company A)
- A list of purchase agreements with Company A

title: Natural Language Search Queries
text:
Starting in August 2025, the NL search function is available in beta. When you access the
Completed page, a clickable hotspot is displayed in the search field.

Select the hotspot to view messaging related to the beta:![A snippet of the Completed page that shows the Join Beta option in a callout.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Join-Beta-callout.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed page that shows the Join Beta option in a callout.")Join the beta to ask questions or type key phrases, in your own words, to get
answers about your agreement data. Select Join Beta.

A message displays and you are prompted to review and accept the beta terms to get started:![A screenshot of the message box that prompts you to accept beta terms to get started.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Accept-beta-terms-message.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the message box that prompts you to accept beta terms to get started.")Review the terms and select Accept to join the beta.

The message box closes and your request to join the beta is processed. You now have access to the natural language search function.

title: Natural Language Search Queries
text:
The query returns a direct answer and a list of relevant agreements. The document count is updated based on your search query.

Important: The natural language search does not support the use of filters together with questions. If you apply filters to the agreement list table, you cannot enter a search question.

![A screenshot of the Completed Documents page that shows a direct answer and a list of relevant agreements for an NL query.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Example-search-results.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Completed Documents page that shows a direct answer and a list of relevant agreements for an NL query.")

Note: The query considers all agreement statuses when generating results - unless you specify a specific status. For example, search for all your active agreements with a specific party.

The primary components of the NL search query results:

- **Search criteria and detected filters:** Shows the question that you entered
  and any filters that were detected while generating the results. In this
  example, the Agreement Type,
  Parties, and Currency Code
  filters were detected:![A snippet of the Search Results view that shows the search question and detected filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Search-Results_top-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Search Results view that shows the search question and detected filters.")

  The search detects filters in your agreements and generates an answer
  to explain the results.
- **Answer section:** Displays a direct answer to the entered question. In this
  example, the search located 7 statement of work (SOW) agreements with Fontara that total 72,870 USD:![A snippet of the search results view that shows a generated answer that explains the query results.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Search-Results_answer-section.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the search results view that shows a generated answer that explains the query results.")

  This section also includes messaging related to how the answer was generated. In this example, the answer is generated with AI and includes agreements with a specified contract value.
- **Feedback mechanism:** Provides a way to rate the quality of the generated answer. Use
  the Rate as helpful (thumbs up) and Rate as unhelpful (thumbs down) icons to rate the answer:![A snippet of the search results view that highlights the feedback buttons.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Search-Results_Feedback-Mechanisms.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the search results view that highlights the feedback buttons.")

  Your feedback helps improve the accuracy and quality of the NL
  processing.

title: Natural Language Search Queries
text:
6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the search results view that highlights the feedback buttons.")

  Your feedback helps improve the accuracy and quality of the NL
  processing.

  Tip: Select the Copy this
  answer icon to copy the generated answer to your clipboard for use
  in another application. For example, when creating forecasting and budget
  readouts.![A snippet of the search results view that highlights the Copy this answer icon located in the answer section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Search-Results_Copy-this-answer.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the search results view that highlights the Copy this answer icon located in the answer section.")
- **Agreement sources:** Displays the agreements that matched the detected filters. These filters
  were identified based on the search question and were used to locate relevant
  agreements. In this example, you have two SOWs with Fontara: ![A screenshot of the Agreement sources section that shows the agreements that matched the search query.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/NL-Search_Search-Results_agreements-list.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.k3ZQVo5kkyIE6dOh9t9Y1DSVwMkNKLacj4YstfTs69k&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement sources section that shows the agreements that matched the search query.")

Tip: If you routinely search for the same type of agreements or agreement data, save your search criteria for future use. See the [Save Search Criteria for Future Use](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskc38121a1-bbf8-4da8-8ed7-b364991f7e50.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to save the search criteria for the queries that you frequently perform.") topic to learn more about the saved search feature.

title: Natural Language Search Queries
text:
As you enter a question into the search field, a dropdown of "quick" answers displays.
You can select a quick answer or view the results for your question. The search
supports questions related to these agreement attributes (fields) and data
points:

- Agreement Type
- Currency Code
- Effective Date
- Expiration Data
- Governing Law
- Party Name
- Renewal-related
  - Auto Renewal (Y/N)
  - Renewal Notice Period
  - Renewal Term
  - Renewal Type
- Status
- Termination for Cause - Notice Period
- Termination for Convenience - Notice Period
- Title
- Total Contract Value

title: Edit Smart Filters for an Agreement Set
heading_path: Edit Smart Filters for an Agreement Set
text:
Learn how to update the smart filters for an agreement set.

Contract managers and any users who are assigned the Organize and manage all agreements permission can create and update agreement sets.

Smart filters are used to add and remove agreements to sets based on filter values. This topic reviews the steps to update the smart filters for an agreement set.

Tip: During set creation, you have the choice to add smart filters to the set or skip the step. If you skipped this step during set creation, the Add filters option is displayed in the Smart filters column for the set:![A snippet of the All agreement sets view that highlights the Add filters option in the Smart filters column.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_edit-smart-filters_Add-filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc0MTYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.b7zR4puYpOJglg2n8wrGFKRHHhWadwvgvVBLpHJ3A2Q&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the All agreement sets view that highlights the Add filters option in the Smart filters column.")

Select Add filters to create a recurring rule for the set by applying smart filters.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents page is displayed.
4. Expand the Settings (gear) menu located in the top right and select the Sets option:

   ![A screenshot of the Settings (gear) menu on the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Sets option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-sets_entry-point_Manage-sets-action-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc0MTYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.b7zR4puYpOJglg2n8wrGFKRHHhWadwvgvVBLpHJ3A2Q&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Settings (gear) menu on the Agreement Manager homepage that highlights the Sets option.")

   The Agreement sets page opens. The All agreement sets view is displayed by default. The table lists the sets that were either shared with or created by the logged-in user.
5. Locate the set that you want to update and choose to add or edit the set's smart filters:

   ![A snippet of the All agreement sets view that highlights the Add filters button and shows the Edit details option in the More actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_edit-smart-filters-or-Add-filters-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc0MTYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.b7zR4puYpOJglg2n8wrGFKRHHhWadwvgvVBLpHJ3A2Q&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the All agreement sets view that highlights the Add filters button and shows the Edit details option in the More actions menu.")

   - Expand the More actions (three dots) menu for the set that you want to update and select Edit smart filters.
   - Select the Add filters option for the set to which you want to add smart filters.

   The Edit smart filters page opens. The agreements that match the existing smart filters are displayed in the table.

   Tip: Select the Clear smart filters option in the top-right corner to clear existing filters and reset the page.

title: Edit Smart Filters for an Agreement Set
heading_path: Edit Smart Filters for an Agreement Set
text:
s. The agreements that match the existing smart filters are displayed in the table.

   Tip: Select the Clear smart filters option in the top-right corner to clear existing filters and reset the page.

   ![A screenshot of the Edit smart filters page that highlights the smart filter options and the Save changes button.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_Edit-smart-filters-page.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc0MTYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.b7zR4puYpOJglg2n8wrGFKRHHhWadwvgvVBLpHJ3A2Q&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Edit smart filters page that highlights the smart filter options and the Save changes button.")

   Agreements are added to the set if they match the fields specified in your filters. Agreements are selected if they match conditions across all filters. If you selected multiple values for a filter, the agreement must match only one of the selected values to be added in the set.
6. Update the existing filters or apply new smart filters to the agreement set:
   1. Expand the filter that you want to update or add to the set.

      Tip: Select the Filters option to access additional filters, including custom fields that are enabled for AI detection. Locate the filter that you want to apply from the Available section:![A snippet of the Filters dialog box that shows the search field and a list of available filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_create-new-set_step-2All-Filters-snippet.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc0MTYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.b7zR4puYpOJglg2n8wrGFKRHHhWadwvgvVBLpHJ3A2Q&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Filters dialog box that shows the search field and a list of available filters.")
   2. Select or enter a value for the filter.
   3. Select the Apply option.

      The agreements that match the filters that you applied are listed in the table.

      Tip: Use the Show or Hide Fields (toggle) icon to customize the table. For example, display the columns that are associated with the applied filters to verify the appropriateness of the agreements for the set.
   4. Continue applying filters until the list is representative of the set's purpose.
7. Save your changes before leaving the page. Select the Save changes option.

   The Save changes? dialog box opens.
8. Select Save changes.

   The dialog box closes. Agreements will be added and removed from the set based on the applied smart filters.

   You are returned to the Agreement sets page. The updated filters are displayed in the Smart filters column for the set.
9. Return to the Agreement Manager homepage. Select Completed from the breadcrumb navigation at the top of the page.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed.

You have successfully updated the smart filters for a selected agreement set.

title: Apply Filters to Locate Agreements for Specific Parties
heading_path: Apply Filters to Locate Agreements for Specific Parties
text:
This topic answers the question: How can I see agreements for a specific party? Learn how to use filters to locate agreements for a specific party.

Instead of performing a keyword search, you can apply filters to the agreement list table to find the relevant agreements. In this example, use the Parties filter to locate agreements for a specific party.

Important: When using the Parties filter, select the relevant party
and choose the appropriate role from the Party Role
dropdown. If you do not know the role, accept the default value, All.

Tip: See the [View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=ghx1734749900921.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to view all the agreements that are tied to a specific party or party group.") topic to complete this task from the party hub.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Completed Documents view opens. A list of documents to which the logged-in user has access is displayed in the table. The total document count is displayed in the bottom right. This count is updated when you perform a search or apply filters.
4. Expand (click) the Filters option and select the Parties filter:

   ![A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the Parties option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Filters-menu_Parties_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzOTEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hisayA92QJp_RMIsRE3iLnB_hVm0ajByl9IXKyGZhDI&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the Parties option.")
5. Select the relevant party and role:

   ![A screenshot of the expanded Parties filter that shows a search term and selected parties.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-table_Parties_Tally-Inc-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzOTEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hisayA92QJp_RMIsRE3iLnB_hVm0ajByl9IXKyGZhDI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the expanded Parties filter that shows a search term and selected parties.")
   - Enter a name in the Search field. As you enter the name, the list is updated to display parties matching the keyword.
   - Select the relevant party.
   - The Party Role defaults to All. Update the role as needed.

     Expand the Party Role dropdown and select the appropriate role. Choose from: Buyer, Seller, or Other.

     Important: When using the Parties filter, you must also select a
     Party Role. If you do not know
     which role to select, accept the default value, All.
   - Select Apply.

   The agreements that match the applied filter are displayed in the table.

   Tip: If you routinely search for the same type of agreements or agreement data, save your search criteria for future use. See the [Save Search Criteria for Future Use](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskc38121a1-bbf8-4da8-8ed7-b364991f7e50.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to save the search criteria for the queries that you frequently perform.") topic to learn more about the saved search feature.
6. Further refine the agreement list table:

   - Use the sorting arrows to sort the agreement list. For example, sort the table by Total Contract Value, Effective Date, or Expiration Date.
   - Apply additional filters.

   Tip:

title: Apply Filters to Locate Agreements for Specific Parties
heading_path: Apply Filters to Locate Agreements for Specific Parties
text:
nt list table:

   - Use the sorting arrows to sort the agreement list. For example, sort the table by Total Contract Value, Effective Date, or Expiration Date.
   - Apply additional filters.

   Tip:

   Use the Status filter to filter the agreement list table by agreement status. For example, choose to view only Active agreements that match the current search criteria and filters: ![A screenshot of the Status filter that shows the selected Active options, including Expiring Soon and Renewing Soon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-statuses_Status-filter_Active-selected.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzOTEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hisayA92QJp_RMIsRE3iLnB_hVm0ajByl9IXKyGZhDI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Status filter that shows the selected Active options, including Expiring Soon and Renewing Soon.") See the [Agreement Statuses](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con6a3bd080-da17-4d1c-a92a-b9b9340c44fd.html&_LANG=enus "Read about agreement statuses, including how they are calculated, visibility within Agreement Manager, and which types of statuses are being tracked.") topic to learn more about this feature.

   Repeat this process until you locate the relevant agreements.

   Note: After locating the relevant agreements, choose to download selected agreements or export agreement data. See these support articles to learn more about these options:
   - [Download Documents from the Agreement List Table](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=ach1724363496037.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: How do I download agreements from Agreement Manager?")
   - [Export Data from the Agreement List Table](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=pqf1724363438241.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to export agreement data to a CSV file for selected agreements.")

You have successfully used filters to locate agreements for specific parties.

title: Refresh Agreements for New Data Points
heading_path: Refresh Agreements for New Data Points
text:
Learn how to reprocess a group of selected agreements to surface new data points. For
example, to surface custom agreement types or fields within your agreements.

Additional attributes and insight become available when an updated AI model is released or when custom types and fields are created. These values are surfaced in new agreements, however, your historical documents must be reprocessed to surface the new data.

Use the Update function to reprocess selected agreements for new standard and custom data:

![A screenshot of the Update Details option and a callout that promotes this feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reprocessing_Completed-page_Update-Details_callout.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Update Details option and a callout that promotes this feature.")

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed. Perform a search and apply filters
   to locate the relevant agreements.![A snippet of the Completed page that highlights the search field and available filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Navigator_Completed-documents_search-field-and-filters-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed page that highlights the search field and available filters.")
4. Find the agreements that you want to process for new data points:
   1. Enter a keyword or search string in the search field and select Enter.
   2. Use the filters to refine the list of search results. Expand the Filters option, select the relevant filter, choose a value, and select the Apply option.

   The agreements that match your search criteria and applied filters are displayed in the table. The document count reflects the entered search criteria and applied filters
5. Select the agreements that you want to process:
   - Select individual agreements.
   - Select the Choose all checkbox from the header row to select all the agreements on that page of results.

     Tip: The Choose all option only selects agreements on the current page of search results. It does not select any agreements on subsequent pages of results.
   - Select the Select all that match your filters link to select all the agreements in the table that match your applied filters.

     Tip: The Select all that match your filters option is only available if filters are applied to the agreement list table.This option is not available if you enter search criteria.

   When one or more documents is selected, additional options are displayed, including the Update Details option.

   Note: A callout box opens and you are prompted to get the latest data and insights for your selected agreements: ![A screenshot of the Update Details option and a callout that promotes this feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reprocessing_Completed-page_Update-Details_callout.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Update Details option and a callout that promotes this feature.")Select the OK option to continue.
6. Expand the Update dropdown and choose to refresh the agreements for Standard Data or Custom Data:

title: Refresh Agreements for New Data Points
heading_path: Refresh Agreements for New Data Points
text:
Update Details option and a callout that promotes this feature.")Select the OK option to continue.
6. Expand the Update dropdown and choose to refresh the agreements for Standard Data or Custom Data:

   ![A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the Update dropdown and options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reprocessing_Completed-page_Update-Details_expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed Documents page that highlights the Update dropdown and options.")

   - Select the Standard Data option.

     The Update AI version dialog box opens. Select Start Update to initiate the reprocessing job.

     The dialog box closes and a confirmation message is displayed.
   - Select the Custom Data option.

     A reprocessing job is initiated and your selected agreements are processed for custom agreement types and fields. A confirmation message is displayed.

   Note: The Information marker is displayed when one or more of your selected agreements are already up to date: ![A snippet of the Completed page that shows the Update option and the expanded Information marker.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reprocessing_Completed-page_Upeate-Details_Information-marker_expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed page that shows the Update option and the expanded Information marker.")This message is meant to save you time and resources by letting you know when reprocessing is not necessary. From the Information marker, select the More (arrow) option to view additional details.

   A confirmation message opens and confirms that the selected files are being processed for new data. Use the View Progress option to view
   results of the processing job.
7. Select View Progress from the message box:

   ![A screenshot of the message box that indicates the files are being processed for new data.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Refresh-custom-data_processing-message_View-Progress.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the message box that indicates the files are being processed for new data.")The job details page opens. The Processing status and Job details are displayed for the processing job.![A screenshot of the job details page for the reprocessing job, including the Processing status and Job details.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Refresh-custom-data_processing-job-details.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the job details page for the reprocessing job, including the Processing status and Job details.")

title: Refresh Agreements for New Data Points
heading_path: Refresh Agreements for New Data Points
text:
FmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the job details page for the reprocessing job, including the Processing status and Job details.")

   Note: The Uploads and Processing Status function gives you access to job details for agreement uploads and processing jobs. This job monitoring hub provides a centralized location to view and track the status of these jobs. Access this function from the Settings (gear) menu on the Completed Documents page:![A screenshot of the Completed Documents view that shows the Uploads and Processing Status option highlighted in the Settings menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-view_Actions_Monitor-All-Jobs-option.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4ODIsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tb8qjiLN9Rm-bDoTS9Sx9N9lyqryHTeQV4zc5AHkCjs&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Completed Documents view that shows the Uploads and Processing Status option highlighted in the Settings menu.")See the [Job Monitoring for Agreement Uploads and Processing](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=ahg1742251814403.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the job monitoring hub that is used to track the progress for agreement uploads and processing jobs.") topic to learn more about the job monitoring hub.
8. Review the job's status and details as needed:
   - Perform a keyword search to locate processing status details for a specific file. Enter search criteria in the Search for a file name field and select a file from the type-ahead dropdown or press [Enter].
   - Apply filters to sort the list of files by Status and Error Message.
   - Select the View File option to view the corresponding file from the Agreement preview page.

     Note: The View File option takes you out of the job monitoring hub. Use these steps to return to the job monitoring hub from the Agreement preview page:
     - Select the Close (x) icon from the top-left corner of the Agreement preview page. The Agreement Manager homepage opens.
     - Expand the Settings (gear) menu and select the Uploads and Processing Status option. The job monitoring hub opens and the All jobs page is displayed.
     - Select the Processing tab. The All jobs page updates and the Processing agreements view is displayed.
     - Locate the relevant processing job and select the View details option. The job details page opens, and the Processing status and Job details are displayed.
9. Return to the Agreement Manager homepage. Select Close (x) from the top-right corner to return to the previous page.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed view is displayed.

You have successfully reprocessed selected agreements for new data.

title: Complete a Data Review for Extracted Obligations
heading_path: Complete a Data Review for Extracted Obligations
text:
Learn how to complete a data review to verify the obligations that were surfaced in your agreements.

During processing, key attributes and field values are surfaced in your agreements. These data points are used to extract obligations from your agreements. Currently, these types of obligations are extracted from your agreements:

- Payment
- Renewal
- Termination

Obligations are surfaced in English (U.S.) agreements only. The AI model that processes obligations is run from a U.S. server and can only process English agreements in this region.

Tip: See the *Obligations surfaced with AI* section in the [Obligation Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=csm1727128259486.html&_LANG=enus "Read about obligation management, including how to use this functionality to capture, track, and fulfill your agreement obligations. This topic answers the question: How can I find and track my agreement obligations?") topic to learn more about extracted obligations.

Reviews are necessary to validate the data that is surfaced in your agreements, both attribute values and obligations. These reviews are essential for accurate reporting, forecasting, contract management, and other business purposes.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Insights from the global header.

   The Insights hub opens and the Overview is displayed.
3. Select Obligations from the navigation pane on the left.

   The Obligations dashboard view opens. The dashboard provides a visual summary of all the obligations associated with agreements in the account.

   Remember: You can only view obligations for the agreements to which you have access.

   ![A screenshot of the Obligations dashboard that shows available reports and filter options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Obligations dashboard that shows available reports and filter options.")

   Update one of the obligation reports to locate the obligations that you want to review. Both reports provide a list of obligations that match the applied filters.

   The Obligations by type report includes all the surfaced and manually created obligations for your agreements.
4. Access the detailed report view for the Obligations by type chart.
   - Select the chart heading.
   - Expand the More actions (ellipsis) menu and select View Report:![A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows the View Report, View as table, and Download as png options in the report actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_Expanded-Actions-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows the View Report, View as table, and Download as png options in the report actions menu.")

   The detailed report view opens for the selected chart. The table displays the obligations that are represented in the chart.

   ![A screenshot of the Obligations by type report that shows obligations grouped by type and listed in the table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Obligations_Obligations-by-type_report-view.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Obligations by type report that shows obligations grouped by type and listed in the table.")

title: Complete a Data Review for Extracted Obligations
heading_path: Complete a Data Review for Extracted Obligations
text:
WFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Obligations by type report that shows obligations grouped by type and listed in the table.")

   Tip: ![An image of the spark icon used to denote the use of AI.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/AI-Spark-icon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "An image of the spark icon used to denote the use of AI.") The spark icon indicates that the agreement contains suggested values. Review, edit, and approve these values to ensure accurate agreement data for reporting, forecasting, and other business purposes.
5. Apply filters to refine the obligation list as needed:

   ![A snippet of the Obligations by type report that shows the available filters, such as due date, parties, and status.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Obligations_Obligations-by-type-report_filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Obligations by type report that shows the available filters, such as due date, parties, and status.")

   1. Expand a filter.
   2. Select or enter a filter value.
   3. Select the Apply option.

The obligations that match the applied filters are displayed in the table.

6. Select (click) the obligation that you want to review.

   The Agreement preview page opens for the selected obligation. The obligation details pane is displayed.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement preview page that shows the obligation details in the pane on the left.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Obligations_Agreement-preview_obligation-detail-pane.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement preview page that shows the obligation details in the pane on the left.")

   Review and update or approve all the attribute values that display the spark icon.
7. Place the pane into *edit* mode:
   - Select the Edit (pencil) icon.
   - Select the Review All option.

   Note: You must have Organize and manage all agreements access to perform data reviews. For all other users, the Edit (pencil) icon and Review All button are grayed out.

   The Edit Obligation view displays and the attribute fields are opened for edits.
8. Accept or edit the suggested values until all the attributes are reviewed and approved.

   ![A snippet of the Edit Obligation pane that highlights a suggested value within the agreement.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Obligation_Data-review_highlighted-in-agreement.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Edit Obligation pane that highlights a suggested value within the agreement.")

   1. Compare the suggested attribute values against the data in the agreement. Select (click) an attribute to view ("jump-to") the suggested value within the agreement.

      Tip: The "jump-to" feature is only available for fields with a spark icon.

      The value is highlighted within the agreement and a list of suggested values is displayed.
   2. Select the Accept AI Suggestion (checkmark) icon if the value is *correct*.

title: Complete a Data Review for Extracted Obligations
heading_path: Complete a Data Review for Extracted Obligations
text:
s with a spark icon.

      The value is highlighted within the agreement and a list of suggested values is displayed.
   2. Select the Accept AI Suggestion (checkmark) icon if the value is *correct*.

      Note: After you accept an AI suggestion, a checkmark icon is displayed next to the value. For example:![A snippet of the Edit Obligation pane that shows a checkmark next an extracted value to indicate the field was reviewed.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Obligation_data-review_accepted-AI-suggestion_checkmark.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY2NDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9._F8B0Ovy8rjX7-CO42xYiUgBcX2jXVstpHZxr0F8VDU&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Edit Obligation pane that shows a checkmark next an extracted value to indicate the field was reviewed.")
   3. Enter the correct value if the suggestion is *incorrect* or *missing*.
   4. Repeat this step until all the suggested values are reviewed and approved.
9. Select the Save option at the bottom of the pane.

   The obligation details are saved. The pane is reverted to read-only mode.
10. Select the Back option located in the top-left corner of
    the page.

    You are returned to the Obligations by type report. The
    spark icon no longer displays next to the obligation that you reviewed.
11. Continue reviewing the extracted obligations as needed.

You have successfully completed a data review for an extracted obligation.

title: Typical Agreement Manager Roles and Use Cases
heading_path: Typical Agreement Manager Roles and Use Cases
text:
This topic answers the question: Who uses Agreement Manager and what are example use cases?

All organizations can benefit from the features that Agreement Manager offers. The target audience for this feature includes two primary user roles and one administrator role.

| **Roles** | **Example use cases** |
| --- | --- |
| Administrators | - Manage user and group access - Manage access to Agreement Manager agreements - Manage user access to bulk upload agreements - Manage user access to manage agreement sets, agreement types, obligation types, and custom fields - Enable cloud storage providers from the Docusign App Center |
| Analyzers (Contract Managers) | - Manage documents, including understanding agreement data and reviewing, updating, and verifying AI-assisted insights - Create agreement sets to manage access to groups of agreements - Create agreement types and custom fields to support business use cases - Create obligation types to support organizational and departmental use cases - Analyze agreements for upcoming renewal opportunities and obligations; assess trends within a group of agreements - Set up renewal notice email notifications and subscribe to reports - Analyze contractual relationships - Perform bulk ingestion - Manage parties to ensure party normalization |
| Preparers (Contract Viewers) | - Upload single agreements to Agreement Manager - Verify agreement data, such as renewals and payment terms |

Important: Account administrators have full, secure access to Agreement Manager features by default, excluding access to view agreements in the account. They are responsible for granting Agreement Manager permissions and access to users and groups.

Agreement Manager permissions include:

- View all agreements in this account: authorizes users or groups to view and download all agreements in the account (to which they have access).
- Organize and manage all agreements: authorizes users or groups to view, edit, download, and delete all agreements in the account. This permission level also grants access to manage agreement sets and attributes, like agreement types and fields.
- Upload up to 1,000 files at a time: gives users access to bulk upload up to 1,000 files at a time to Agreement Manager. This toggle is turned on (blue) at the user-level.

See the [Agreement Manager Permissions, Profiles, and Roles](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=eut1712157553977.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the available Agreement Manager permissions, including how users and groups are granted access to Agreement Manager agreements and example roles for each permission.") article to learn more about Agreement Manager access.

title: View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups
heading_path: View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups
text:
Learn how to view all the agreements that are tied to a specific party or party group.

The "party hub" displays a unified summary of all agreements and obligations that are tied to a party or party group. Access the party hub from various places within Agreement Manager, including:

- The Parties column (Completed Documents view)
- The Details pane (Agreement preview page)
- The Name column (Parties view)

Note: This topic reviews the steps to access the party hub from
the Completed Documents view. You can also search for and
select the relevant party from the Parties page.

![A snippet of the Parties page that highlights the Search parties field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Parties-page_Search-parties-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Parties page that highlights the Search parties field.")

- Go to Home  >  Agreements and select All from the PARTIES section in the navigation pane.
- Enter search criteria in the Search parties
  field.
- Select a party from the search results.

The party hub opens for the selected party or group.

**Access the party hub from the Completed Documents view:**

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens. The Inbox view is displayed by default.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Completed Documents view opens. Filter this view for a specific party.
4. Filter the agreement list table for a specific party:

   ![A screenshot of the Parties filter that shows the Search field, Party Role dropdown, and the party list.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-table_Parties-dialog-box.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Parties filter that shows the Search field, Party Role dropdown, and the party list.")

   1. Expand the Filters option and select the Parties filter.
   2. Enter a keyword or search string in the Search field.

      As you enter search criteria, the list of parties updates to match the keyword.
   3. Select the relevant party.

      Important: When using the Parties filter, you must also select a
      Party Role. If you do not know
      which role to select, accept the default value, All.
   4. Apply the Party Role filter to view agreements where the selected party plays a specific role. If you do not know which role to select, accept the default value, All.

      Select a role from the Party Role dropdown. Choose from: Buyer, Seller, or Other.
   5. Select the Apply option.

   The table updates and agreements that are tied to the selected party or group are displayed. The names in the Parties column are clickable and link directly to the party hub.

   ![A snippet of the Completed Documents view that highlights the Parties column as an entry point for the party hub.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Entry-point_Completed-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed Documents view that highlights the Parties column as an entry point for the party hub.")
5. Select a name from the Parties column.

   The party hub opens for the selected party or group. The Overview tab is displayed by default.

**View the Agreements list:**

6. Select the Agreements tab:

title: View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups
heading_path: View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups
text:
Select a name from the Parties column.

   The party hub opens for the selected party or group. The Overview tab is displayed by default.

**View the Agreements list:**

6. Select the Agreements tab:

   ![A snippet of the party hub that highlights the Overview, Agreements, and Obligations tabs.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_highlighted-tabs.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the party hub that highlights the Overview, Agreements, and Obligations tabs.")

   The Agreements tab opens and all the agreements that are tied to the selected party or group are listed.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreements tab that shows the agreements that are tied to the selected party or group.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Agreements-tab.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreements tab that shows the agreements that are tied to the selected party or group.")

   Tip: Use the Favorites (star) icon to "star" your most active, time-sensitive, or high-value parties and groups. Each user can add up to 50 parties and groups to their Starred list.

   Your "favorite" parties and groups are listed under the Starred tab on the Parties page.

**Filter and customize the Agreements list:**

7. Apply additional filters to locate relevant agreements.

   Tip:

   Use the Status filter to filter the agreement list table by agreement status. For example, choose to view only Active agreements that match the current search criteria and filters: ![A screenshot of the Status filter that shows the selected Active options, including Expiring Soon and Renewing Soon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-statuses_Status-filter_Active-selected.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Status filter that shows the selected Active options, including Expiring Soon and Renewing Soon.") See the [Agreement Statuses](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con6a3bd080-da17-4d1c-a92a-b9b9340c44fd.html&_LANG=enus "Read about agreement statuses, including how they are calculated, visibility within Agreement Manager, and which types of statuses are being tracked.") topic to learn more about this feature.

   Tip: Select (click) an agreement to view details, obligations, and agreement sets for the agreement. The Agreement preview opens.

   Review the agreement and select the Close (x) icon from the top left to return to the party hub.
8. Customize the table data as needed:

   ![A screenshot of the Show or Hide Fields dialog box that shows the columns you can choose to display in the agreements table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Customize-columns.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc4MDksInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.AC8vVSf_-2QBmOtn31UX-GVUkVru8oVhzfnTrzhG_fk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Show or Hide Fields dialog box that shows the columns you can choose to display in the agreements table.")

   1. Select the Show or Hide Fields (gear) icon from the right-side of the page.

title: View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups
heading_path: View Agreements for Selected Parties and Groups
text:
hot of the Show or Hide Fields dialog box that shows the columns you can choose to display in the agreements table.")

   1. Select the Show or Hide Fields (gear) icon from the right-side of the page.

      The Show or Hide Fields dialog box opens. These fields represent the columns in the table.
   2. Select the toggles to turn the associated field on (blue) or off (white).
