   The Smart filters step updates and the available filters are displayed.
8. Complete the Smart filters step to add agreements to the set automatically based on the applied filters:

   ![A snippet of the Smart filters step that highlights the available filters, including the Agreement Type and Parties filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_create-new-set_step-2Apply-filters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTczMjAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.LmZcInbj68rfCvIlZZvD7xM2xXjMNjU-hXdUQrogvRA&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Smart filters step that highlights the available filters, including the Agreement Type and Parties filters.")

   1. Expand the filter that you want to apply.

      Tip: Select the Filters option to access additional filters, including custom fields that are enabled for AI detection. Locate the filter that you want to apply from the Available list.![A snippet of the Filters dialog box that shows the search field and a list of available filters.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_create-new-set_step-2All-Filters-snippet.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTczMjAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.LmZcInbj68rfCvIlZZvD7xM2xXjMNjU-hXdUQrogvRA&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Filters dialog box that shows the search field and a list of available filters.") As you apply filters, they are added to the Applied section. Select the Save option to save your filters.
   2. Select or enter a value for the filter.
   3. Select Apply.

      The agreements that match the filters that you applied are listed in the table.
   4. Continue applying filters until the list is representative of the set's purpose.
   5. Select Next.

   The next step of the process, *People with access*, is displayed.
9. Complete the People with access step to share the agreement set with users and groups:

   ![A snippet of the third step that shows the users and groups with whom the set is being shared, including the assigned access level.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-set-management_create-new-set_step-3-access.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTczMjAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.LmZcInbj68rfCvIlZZvD7xM2xXjMNjU-hXdUQrogvRA&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the third step that shows the users and groups with whom the set is being shared, including the assigned access level.")

   1. Search for and select the user or group with whom you want to share the set.

      Enter a name in the Add user or group search field and select the name from the type-ahead dropdown list.

      Important:

      The Notify users by email option is selected by default. Leave this checkbox selected to notify users that an agreement set was shared with them.

title: Create an Agreement Set
text:
the type-ahead dropdown list.

      Important:

      The Notify users by email option is selected by default. Leave this checkbox selected to notify users that an agreement set was shared with them.

      If you de-select this option, users are not notified of the shared agreement set.
   2. Expand the Access dropdown and select the appropriate access level for agreements in the set.

      Choices are: View, Edit, and Manage.

      Assign an access level for each of the selected users and groups.
10. Select the Create Set option.

    You are returned to the All agreement sets view. The new agreement set is displayed in the table. When new agreements match the smart filters, they are added to the set automatically.

    If an agreement's attribute values are updated and no longer match the filters, it is removed from the set dynamically. For example, if the agreement type is updated and the agreement no longer matches the applied smart filters.

    Important: **Creating a set without smart filters**

    If the agreement set was created without smart filters, the next step is to add agreements to the set. Review these topics to learn more about adding agreements to sets without smart filters:

    - [Add Agreements to Sets Based on Attribute Values](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=txb1736186243024.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to apply filters to locate agreements to add to an agreement set. This topic answers the question: How do I control access to agreements based on attribute values?")
    - [Add Individual Agreements to Existing Agreement Sets](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=rdi1736186285124.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to add agreements to an existing set from various places within Agreement Manager. This topic answers the question: How do I add additional agreements to an existing set?")

You have successfully created an agreement set, including applying smart filters and sharing the set with others.

title: Use Case: Give Users Access to the Bulk Upload Function
heading_path: Use Case: Give Users Access to the Bulk Upload Function
text:
This topic answers the question: How do I give users access to bulk upload files to
Agreement Manager? Learn how to grant users access to bulk upload agreements to
Agreement Manager.

The Upload function is available to
all Agreement Manager users. With this function, users can upload up to five third-party
documents. However, to upload more than five documents, you need an extra
permission.

The *bulk upload* permission is granted by an administrator from the account administration
pages. Once granted, users can upload up to 1,000 files at a time to Agreement Manager.
Additionally, this permission also gives users access to upload documents from
third-party cloud storage providers.

Note: The *bulk upload* permission is set at the
user-level. This permission is not available at the group-level. Keep in mind
that user and group permissions are managed at the account-level as opposed to
the organization-level.

1. Log in to your Docusign account using administrator
   credentials.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Admin from the global header.

   The Admin page opens.

   Important: User and group permissions are managed at the *account*-level. Make sure that you are updating records from Accounts administration instead of Organization administration.If your organization has multiple accounts, verify that you are updating the correct account. If necessary, select Accounts from the pane on the left and choose the appropriate account.
3. Select Users from the USERS AND
   GROUPS section in the navigation pane on the left.

   Note: The bulk upload permission is not available at the
   group level. Only users can be assigned this access.

   The Users view opens.
4. Locate the user to whom you want to grant bulk upload permissions:

   1. Expand the dropdown at the top of the page and select
      Name to search for users by name. You can
      also search by email address.
   2. Enter the user's name in the Enter Keyword
      field.
   3. Select Search.

   The table displays users matching the search criteria that you entered.
5. Expand the Actions button for the user that you want to
   update and select the Manage Agreement Manager Access
   option.

   The User Profile view opens for the selected user. The
   Agreement Manager Access tab is displayed by default.
6. Turn on the Upload up to 1,000 files at a time toggle
   (blue position) from the Agreement Manager access section.

   By turning this toggle on, you are granting the user access to upload up to 1,000 files at
   a time to Agreement Manager.

   Note: Turn off this toggle (gray position) to revoke the
   user's access to bulk upload agreements to Agreement Manager.
7. Select Save Changes.

   Next, go to the audit log to verify the changes.
8. Select Audit Logs from the AUDITING
   section in the navigation pane.

   The Audit Logs view opens. The audit log table displays records of
   changes to your account.
9. Locate the change in the table to verify the user's settings were successfully
   updated.

title: Monitor and Report on Obligations
text:
Learn how to monitor and report on obligations from the Obligations dashboard, including subscribing to receive notifications. This topic answers the question: How do I report on my obligations?

The Obligations dashboard provides a visual summary of your agreement obligations through the use of bar and pie charts. After applying filters, you can further drill down to a detailed report view for any of the dashboard charts.

Note: Subscribe to receive daily report notifications about your agreement obligations. This feature is available from the detailed report view. Review the [Subscribe to Receive Report Notifications](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=wfw1734545937270.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to set up one-time or recurring email reports for yourself or others to receive notifications about your obligations, renewals, or agreements.") topic to learn more about this feature.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Insights from the global header.

   The Insights hub opens and the Overview is displayed.
3. Select Obligations from the navigation pane on the left.

   The Obligations dashboard opens.

   ![A screenshot of the Obligations dashboard that shows available reports and filter options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Obligations dashboard that shows available reports and filter options.")
4. Filter the Obligations dashboard to locate upcoming obligations:

   ![A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows the filter options, including Due Date, Obligation Type, Parties, and Obligation Owner.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_Filter-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows the filter options, including Due Date, Obligation Type, Parties, and Obligation Owner.")

   - Expand the Due Date filter, choose a time period, and select Apply. Choices are: Today, Next 7 Days, Next 14 Days, Next 30 Days, and Next 6 Months.

     You can also select Custom Date Range and enter a specific date range. Choose from Between, Before, or After and complete the necessary date fields.
   - Expand the Obligation Type filter, choose the type of obligations
     that you want to view, and select Apply For example,
     filter for renewal, payment, or termination obligations.
   - Expand the Parties filter, choose the relevant parties and party role, and select Apply.

     ![A screenshot of the Parties filter that shows a selected party and party role options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Obligations-dashboard_Report-view_Parties-filter_Party-role_expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Parties filter that shows a selected party and party role options.")

     Important: If you choose to filter the dashboard by Parties, you must select a Party role for the selected party or parties. You can select Obligated and Benefiting if you are unsure of the role.

     The dashboard updates to reflect the obligations that are tied to the selected parties and party role.
   - Expand the Obligation Owner filter and select a name to view obligations that are assigned to a specific user.

title: Monitor and Report on Obligations
text:
tes to reflect the obligations that are tied to the selected parties and party role.
   - Expand the Obligation Owner filter and select a name to view obligations that are assigned to a specific user.

   The Obligations dashboard updates and the data that matched the applied filters is reflected in the charts.

   ![A screenshot of the Obligations dashboard that was filtered to show payment-related obligations.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_Filtered-by-Type.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Obligations dashboard that was filtered to show payment-related obligations.")
5. Review the dashboard charts: Obligations by due date and Obligations by type.
   - Hover your cursor over a segment or bar to view the number of obligations represented in that part of the chart:![A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows an information box for one of the segments in the chart.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_hover-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows an information box for one of the segments in the chart.")
   - Expand the More actions (ellipsis) menu and select View as table to display a list view of the obligations in the chart:![A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows an example of the table view for one of the charts.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_Table-view-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Obligations dashboard that shows an example of the table view for one of the charts.")
6. Go to the detailed report view for an obligation chart. Select the chart title or expand the More actions (three dots) menu and select the View Report option.

   The detailed report view opens for the selected chart. The obligations represented in the chart are displayed in the table.

   ![A screenshot of the detailed report view for the Obligations by due date chart.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Obligations-Dashboard_Detailed-report-view.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the detailed report view for the Obligations by due date chart.")
7. Review the table to verify that the report contains the relevant obligations.

   Use the available filters to refine the obligation list as needed or select Clear All to clear the existing filters.

   The detailed report view provides two additional filter options: Obligation Status and Agreement Name.
8. Customize the column order for the table:

title: Monitor and Report on Obligations
text:
select Clear All to clear the existing filters.

   The detailed report view provides two additional filter options: Obligation Status and Agreement Name.
8. Customize the column order for the table:

   ![A screenshot of the Customize columns dialog box that shows the columns you can choose to display in the agreements table.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Party-hub_Overview-dashboard_Customize-columns.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Customize columns dialog box that shows the columns you can choose to display in the agreements table.")

   1. Select the Customize columns (toggle) icon.

      The Customize columns dialog box opens. These fields represent the columns in the table.
   2. Select the toggles to turn the associated field on (blue) or off (white).
   3. Re-order the columns as needed. Hover the cursor over the Reorder (dots) icon for the column that you want to move. Drag it to the appropriate position.
   4. Select the Save option.

   Continue applying filters and customizing the table data as needed.
9. Download or save the report:

   ![A snippet of the report view that highlights the More actions (three dots) menu used to download or save a report.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Report-view_Dropdown-expanded.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the report view that highlights the More actions (three dots) menu used to download or save a report.")

   - Expand the More actions (three dots) menu in the top right and select
     the Download option.

     The associated report is
     downloaded to your local Downloads folder.
   - Expand the More actions (three dots) menu and select the Save option. The Save Report dialog box opens.

     - Enter a unique name for the report in the Report name field. The field defaults to the name of the selected report.
     - Enter a description about the report's purpose in the Description field.
     - Select the Save option.The report is saved to the Custom tab on the Reports view.

   Note: **Downloading reports to CSV files**

   When downloading reports to CSV files from the Insights reporting hub, there is an agreement limit of 25,000 agreements for all IAM reports. This count includes your custom reports.

   **Suggested workaround:** Adjust the report filters to run the report in batches until all the relevant agreements are downloaded. For example, run the report in batches according to varying date ranges. Once downloaded, combine the data into one CSV file.
10. Set up one-time and recurring email reports for yourself and others. Select the Manage Notification (bell) icon and complete the Create subscription dialog box:

    ![A screenshot of the Create subscription dialog box that is used to subscribe to report notifications.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Create-Subscription.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Create subscription dialog box that is used to subscribe to report notifications.")

    Note: When you create a subscription, you have the option to add individual users and groups. Once created, the subscription is displayed in the Manage report subscriptions dialog box for any individual users who were added. Currently, the subscription is not visible to users if they were added as part of a group.

title: Monitor and Report on Obligations
text:
scription is displayed in the Manage report subscriptions dialog box for any individual users who were added. Currently, the subscription is not visible to users if they were added as part of a group.

    See the [Subscribe to Receive Report Notifications](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=wfw1734545937270.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to set up one-time or recurring email reports for yourself or others to receive notifications about your obligations, renewals, or agreements.") topic to learn more about this feature.
11. Add the report to Your Favorites list. Select the Favorite (star) icon located in the top-right corner:

    ![A snippet of a detailed report view that highlights the Favorite (star) icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreements-dashboard_Report-details_Favorite-icon-selected_generic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of a detailed report view that highlights the Favorite (star) icon.")Your starred dashboards and reports are displayed in the Your Favorites section on the Overview dashboard.
12. Return to the Obligations dashboard. Select Obligations from the breadcrumb navigation at the top of the page:

    ![A snippet of the Obligations by type report that highlights the breadcrumb navigation.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Report-dashboard_Review-view_breadcrumb-nav-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcwMjMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.pLEqLRDqXURXSqdAgX-QjFt2e9mB5OyThDW751qjkHY&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Obligations by type report that highlights the breadcrumb navigation.")

    You are returned to the Obligations dashboard.

You have successfully reviewed the obligation monitoring and reporting features of the reporting hub.

title: View the Account-Level Activity Log
text:
Learn how to view the account-level Activity Log that records and logs events related to all the agreements in an account.

The account-level Activity Log captures and logs events related to all the agreements in an account. See the [Agreement Manager Activity Logs](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=pne1747684858805.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the account- and agreement-level activity logs, including the types of events that are captured in the log.") support topic to learn more about the events captured in this audit log.

Note: Access to the account-level Activity Log is dependent on your assigned Agreement Manager permission. Only users with Organize and manage all agreements permission can view this audit log.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed.
4. Expand the Settings (gear) menu from the right-side of the page and select the View Activity Log option:

   ![A snippet of the Completed Documents view that shows the View Activity Log highlighted in the Settings (gear) menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Account-audit_Actions_View-Activity-Log.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc5MzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tt_brBM6awj5qIsr8RJ9eFnxuh3Yw0RqC05V1KL8P5o&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the Completed Documents view that shows the View Activity Log highlighted in the Settings (gear) menu.")

   The Activity Log opens and a list of account-level events are displayed. These events are displayed in reverse chronological order with the most recent at the top.

   ![A screenshot of the account-level Activity Log that logs events related to all the agreements in the account.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Accountlevel-Activity-Log--example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc5MzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tt_brBM6awj5qIsr8RJ9eFnxuh3Yw0RqC05V1KL8P5o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the account-level Activity Log that logs events related to all the agreements in the account.")

   Note: The first 200 logged events are displayed in the table. Pagination is only available for the first 200 audit events. If the table contains more than 200 events, you are prompted to download the CSV:![A screenshot of the dialog box that prompts you to download the CSV to view all the events.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Activity-Log_Prompt-to-download-to-csv.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc5MzMsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.Tt_brBM6awj5qIsr8RJ9eFnxuh3Yw0RqC05V1KL8P5o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the dialog box that prompts you to download the CSV to view all the events.")
5. Select the sorting arrows in the column headers to sort the table by DATE, RESOURCE, USER ACTION, and FIELDS.
6. Review the table data to locate the relevant event information for all the agreements in the account. Details related to these user-performed events are recorded in the log:

   - Access changes (agreements and agreement sets)
   - Agreement downloads
   - Agreement set operations
   - Attribute updates for select standard fields
   - Agreement views
   - Document uploads
7. Select the Download CSV option.

   The CSV file is downloaded to your local Downloads folder.
8. Return to the Agreement Manager homepage. Select the Close (x) icon from the top-right corner.

   You are returned to the Agreement Manager homepage. The Completed Documents view is displayed.

title: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
heading_path: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
text:
This topic answers the question: Where can I see a list of the Agreement Manager limitations and considerations associated with this release?

The table displays the known limitations and considerations for this Agreement Manager release, including high-level descriptions.

Note: Agreement Manager will improve and evolve over time.

title: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
heading_path: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
text:
release?

The table displays the known limitations and considerations for this Agreement Manager release, including high-level descriptions.

Note: Agreement Manager will improve and evolve over time.

| **Limitations and Considerations**  (including regional expansion limitations) | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| **Data may be processed in a separate region** | During agreement processing, your data may be processed outside of the geographic region where your account is provisioned. See Docusign’s [Subprocessor List](https://www.docusign.com/trust/privacy/subprocessors-list) for details on processing locations. |
| **Agreement Manager AI models support agreements in select languages** | The AI models that power Agreement Manager currently support agreements in Brazilian-Portuguese, English, French, German, Japanese, and Spanish. See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") topic for additional information. |
| **Agreement Manager features and AI-assisted insights vary by region and language** | Agreement Manager offers different sets of features and AI-assisted insights for customer accounts. These offerings are dependent on the region to which the account is provisioned and the agreement language.  Support for additional features and AI-assisted insights will be rolled out to different regions and languages on an ongoing basis.  See the support matrix on the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus "Read about language support and regional availability for Agreement Manager AI models and features.") article for additional information. |
| **Agreement Manager AI-assisted insights accuracy and relevance vary by region and language** | The accuracy and relevant of AI-assisted insights may vary depending on the agreement language and customer use case.  Customers should always review AI-assisted insights for accuracy and to determine whether the extracted data point is appropriate for their particular circumstances. |
| **Agreement Manager has ingestion thresholds for Docusign historical completed agreements** | When customers purchase an Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) plan with Agreement Manager, their historical completed documents are auto-ingested by default.  The ingestion thresholds for Docusign historical completed agreements are:  - 500,000 (North American customers) - 100,000 (International customers)  Important: If your document count exceeds the ingestion threshold, contact your Docusign account representative to submit a special request. |
| **Ingestion and upload limitations** | When uploading or ingesting documents to Agreement Manager:  - Files must be less than 100 MB each - File names must contain fewer than 255 characters - Only supported file types can be uploaded   See the [Agreement Uploads and Ingestion](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=rrs1712255668350.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: What are my upload options for Agreement Manager, including limitations and required permissions?") article to learn more about these limitations. |
| **Agreement Manager is not fully compatible with Docusign CLM** | Connectivity between CLM and Agreement Manager is expected in early 2026. |
| **Agreement Manager is issued at the account level** | Customers with multiple eSignature accounts will receive one instance of Agreement Manager for each account. |
| **Agreement Manager FedRAMP and GovRAMP limitations** | For customers in regulated industries, Agreement Manager is FedRAMP and GovRAMP authorized:  - FedRAMP (Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program) authorizes Cloud Service Providers (CSPs) for federal agencies - GovRAMP (Government Risk and Authorization Management Program) authorizes CSPs for state, local, and tribal governments  Both frameworks standardize cloud security assessments and compliance.  Restriction: The Agreement Manager email ingestion feature is not supported for FedRAMP and GovRAMP accounts. |
| **Agreement Manager users cannot choose which documents are automatically ingested from eSignature** | All Docusign historical completed agreements are ingested automatically upon provisioning. Users cannot select specific documents or subsets of documents to be auto-ingested into Agreement Manager. |
| **Agreement Manager only displays completed agreements** | Agreement Manager does not display *in-flight* agreements. Note: Customers can manually upload any agreement to Agreement Manager. These agreements may or may not be *completed*. |
| **Granting group permissions for the “Everyone” group has no effect** | Generally, all groups can be granted permissions to view or manage all agreements in Agreement Manager for the account. However, this does not apply to the "Everyone" group. Regardless of whether the user interface (UI) allows administrators to grant permissions for this group, there is no effect. |
| **Sharing agreements with the “Everyone” group does not have any effect** | When sharing agreements, users can select users and groups in the account to grant them view, edit, or manage access. This works for any user or group in the account except for the “Everyone” group, even though that group is selectable in the UI. |
| **Agreement Manager does not support duplicate agreement detection** | Agreement Manager does not recognize when duplicate agreements have been ingested or uploaded to the repository. If the same agreement was uploaded twice, users with the Can Manage permission can delete agreements manually, as needed. |

title: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
heading_path: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
Limitation: "Dropdown" attributes (fields) with pre-populated value sets
text:
For attributes (fields) that use dropdowns with pre-populated value sets, only those values are surfaced in your agreements. Agreement processing extracts an attribute value only if it matches one of the values in the dropdown.

When processing cannot locate the value within the agreement, the extracted value is *Other*. For example, if an agreement's payment term is 50 days, the surfaced Payment Term value is *Other*:

![A screenshot of the Party Term filter that shows the pre-populated value set for the attribute (field).](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Payment-term-filter_All-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTc5MjYsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.VDpvy3iIISftWNcK54zEi3nAJODy9gQIOEH6JqLnRd4&_LANG=enus)

This limitation applies to these attributes (fields) and values:

| Attribute (Field) | Value Set |
| --- | --- |
| Assignment (Change of Control) | No, or consent required; Yes, notice required; Yes, restrictions apply; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (General) | No, or consent required; Yes; Yes, with conditions |
| Assignment (Termination Rights) | Yes |
| Employment Type | Fixed Term; Full Time; Intern; Part Time |
| Late Fees Apply | Yes; No |
| NDA Type | Mutual; One Way |
| Party Role | Buyer, Seller |
| Payment Term | 15 days; 30 days; 45 days; 60 days; 7 days; 90 days; >90 days; On Receipt; Other; Under 7 days |
| Renewal Type | Auto-Renew; Evergreen; Fixed Term; Renewal Option; Unspecified |

title: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
heading_path: General Limitations and Considerations for Agreement Manager
text:
When downloading reports to CSV files from the Insights reporting hub, there is an agreement limit of 25,000 agreements for all IAM reports. This count includes your custom reports.

**Suggested workaround:** Adjust the report filters to run the report in batches until all the relevant agreements are downloaded. For example, run the report in batches according to varying date ranges. Once downloaded, combine the data into one CSV file.

Note: The eSignature reports have a different set of limitations. See the [Using Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=wou1578456440763.html) article to learn more about eSignature reports for senders and signers.

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
Read about the Insights hub, including an overview of the available dashboards and reports.

The Insights hub helps administrators and users to gain valuable insights into their Docusign account. The hub offers:

- Centralized access to all reports and dashboards
- Personalized views based on user roles, preferences, and favorites
- Quick navigation tools, such as a search bar and frequently accessed links
- Actual time updates and summaries of key metrics

Select Insights from the global header to access the hub. The Insights menu opens and the Overview view is displayed:

![A screenshot of the Insights page that highlights the main components: Overview, Dashboards, and Reports.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports-page_components-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

The primary components of the Insights hub are displayed in the navigation pane on the left:

- Overview
  - Provides access to recently viewed and starred
    (favorite) reports
  - Links to weekly insights and suggested
    reports
  - Links to other Docusign
    insights, such as upcoming renewals, envelope
    metrics, and custom dashboard and reports
  - Provides Resources to
    suggest features and access help
    documentation
- Dashboards
  - Collections of reports that help show a bigger picture of a specific focus area
  - Provide a visual overview or summary for quick insights
- Reports
  - Individual data visualizations, such as charts or graphs
  - Built and populated using the agreement data that was surfaced during processing
  - Provide a detailed and structured view of data for review, documentation, and analyses

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
As new or updated AI models are released, the previously ingested agreements can be processed again to surface these data points. Depending on the type of new insights that are available, users can choose to:

- Opt in for reprocessing from the Track obligations badge (obligation-related attributes and insights)
- Reprocess all the outdated agreements for the account (new or updated AI model)
- Reprocess selected agreements (custom agreement types and fields)

Note: See the [Agreement Manager Reprocessing Experience](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con44590246-0f0e-43b4-9692-caadb57335ac.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the Agreement Manager reprocessing experience, including its purpose, trigger points, and job size considerations.") article to learn more about these reprocessing features.

Processing happens in the background. While it does not impact your current experience, processing may take some time depending on the number and size of agreements. Once started, processing cannot be canceled.

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
The Overview dashboard is the landing page for the
Insights hub. The dashboard
is updated in actual time to provide personalized,
actionable insights at a glance.![A screenshot of the Insights hub that displays the Overview dashboard.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Insights-reporting-hub_Overview_cropped.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

Key features include:

- **Search bar:** used to search for reports and dashboards by name.
- **Your Recents:** displays a list of your recently accessed reports.
- **Your Favorites:** provides access to your starred reports and dashboards.
- **Suggested Reports (Beta):** provides AI-generated custom report recommendations based on the
  custom fields created in the account.

  Important: The Suggested
  Reports feature requires a minimum of
  five data points. Custom or standard fields that
  are located on at least five agreements are
  included when generating suggested
  reports.
- **Weekly Insights:** displays the agreement counts for all the agreements in the account, including newly ingested and expiring agreements.
- **Review your agreements:** shows a quick view into your agreements, including agreements by
  renewal dates and agreement types.
- **Explore Docusign Insights:** prompts you to explore additional insights, such as:

  - Discover key metrics on your agreements (Review Upcoming Renewal)
  - Discover key metrics on your envelopes (Review Envelope Dashboard)
  - Customize your dashboard to fit your needs (Create custom dashboards)
  - Customize your reports to fit your (Create custom reports)
- **Resources:** provides tools to suggest features and access help documentation.

**Your Favorites**

Your "starred" dashboards and reports are displayed in the Your Favorites list on the Overview dashboard:

![A snippet of the Overview dashboard that highlights the Your Favorites section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reporting-hub_Overview_Your-Favorties_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

This feature gives you quick access to the insights that you regularly track. Use the Favorite (star) icon to add dashboards and reports to Your Favorites list:

![A snippet of a detailed report view that highlights the Favorite (star) icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreements-dashboard_Report-details_Favorite-icon-selected_generic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)Select the Favorite (star) icon again to remove the dashboard or report from the Your Favorites list.

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
The available Dashboards are displayed in the navigation pane on the left-side of the page. These dashboards provide visual summaries of the document and envelope activity for your account.

Each dashboard is a collection of individual reports or data visualizations, such as bar charts and graphs. The collection, or dashboard, provides a visual overview or summary for a particular focus area, like agreements, obligations, or renewals.

![A snippet of the Insights page that highlights the available dashboards in the pane on the left-side of the page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Dashboards_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

Use these dashboards to view the document and envelope activity for your account:

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

Use these dashboards to view the document and envelope activity for your account:

| **Dashboard** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| My dashboard | This dashboard provides an overview of your envelope activity and environmental savings for your organization's account.   - All users can use the My dashboard view to see activity data on their own envelopes. - See the [My Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=fhl1661468469364.html) article to learn more about this dashboard. |
| Administrator dashboard | This dashboard provides a look at key metrics on sent envelope activity across all the users in the account and offers performance analytics.   - Available to administrators with full administrative access and delegated administrators with *Reporting* permission. - See the [Administrator Dashboard for Performance Analytics](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=zre1674502893268.html) article to learn more about this dashboard. |
| Agreements | This dashboard gives users a visual summary of all executed and completed agreements in the account and contains top-level insights and other agreement-related charts.   - Agreement insights, such as All agreements   Expiring agreements, and   Renewing agreements. - Filters to sort the dashboard by Agreement Type,   Parties,   Sets, and Time   Period; including the Filters option to refine the dashboard   further. - Access the report view and agreements list for any of the top-level insights and report   charts.   See the [Agreements Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=bec1702945765624.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: Where can I find data visualizations and reports for all the agreements in my Docusign account?") article to learn more about this dashboard. |
| Obligations | This dashboard provides a visual overview of the obligations for the agreements in the account.   - Obligations surfaced with AI and manually created obligations are included in the dashboard. - Payment, renewal, and termination obligations are surfaced with AI. - Filter the dashboard by Due Date, Obligation Type, Parties, and Obligation Owner. - Report views and obligation lists are available for any of the dashboard charts.   Restriction: Obligations are surfaced in English (U.S.) agreements only. The AI model that processes obligations is run from a U.S. server and can only process English agreements in this region.  If your language and region are not supported, manually create the obligations to include this information in dashboards, reports, and other insights.  See these support articles to learn more about obligation management:  - [Obligation Management](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=csm1727128259486.html&_LANG=enus "Read about obligation management, including how to use this functionality to capture, track, and fulfill your agreement obligations. This topic answers the question: How can I find and track my agreement obligations?") - [Manually Create an Obligation](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=rrf1727128588540.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create an obligation from the Agreement preview page for a selected agreement.")  See the [Obligations Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=qal1734545813030.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the Obligations dashboard, including available reports and filter options.") article to learn more about this dashboard. |
| Renewals | This dashboard displays renewal data based on the attribute (field) values surfaced in the agreements in your account.   - Filterable charts and an agreement list table that displays the agreements that match applied filters. - Users can sign up for biweekly renewal notice email notifications from the dashboard. - Report view and agreement lists are available for the renewal charts.   See the [Renewals Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=vir1712251054892.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: What does the Renewals dashboard show me and how does it work? Read about the Renewals dashboard, including how to use the charts to filter for agreements and available sorting options.") article to learn more about this dashboard. |
| Requests | This dashboard displays your completed Agreement Desk requests for the last 30 days, including:  - Completed requests by type - Completed requests by owner  Filter the dashboard by Completed date and Request type. |

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
displays your completed Agreement Desk requests for the last 30 days, including:  - Completed requests by type - Completed requests by owner  Filter the dashboard by Completed date and Request type. |

View the detailed report view for any of the dashboard charts (reports) and insights for expanded reporting options, including:

- Customize the table data
- View the relevant agreement or obligation list for the insight or chart
- View the agreement or obligation in the Agreement preview page
- Download the report
- Save applied filters and table data to create a custom report
- Subscribe to receive report notifications
- Add the report to Your Favorites list

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
heading_path: Bar charts and stacked bar charts
text:
Depending on the number of data points, the dashboard bar charts have two viewing options:

- **Bar chart view:** Shows a single metric per category for each time bucket. Each bar represents the category's total. For example, the number of agreements by duration:

  ![A screenshot of a dashboard chart that shows the Bar Chart view.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/IAM-Dashboards-Reports_Bar-chart-view_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)
- **Stacked bar chart view:** Shows the same totals, but each bar is segmented to show the
  composition by a second field. For example, the
  number of agreements by duration, broken down by
  agreement type:

  ![A screenshot of a dashboard chart that shows the Stacked Bar Chart view.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/IAM-Dashboards-Reports_Stacked_bar-chart-view_example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

The Stacked Bar Chart view is available when the report configuration includes a second field or data point. For example, a report that shows upcoming renewals by month with an agreement type breakdown.

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
When users run reports, they see information from their own account activity. Account administrators see all account-level activity. The available reports, including custom reports, are grouped under the tabs on the Reports view.

![A snippet of the Reports view that shows the report categories, including recent, custom, and downloaded reports.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Reports-view_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

Reports are grouped under these categories:

- Recents: Recently accessed reports
- All Envelope: All reports
- Envelope: Envelope-related reports
- Recipient: Recipient-related reports
- Usage: Activity, verification, usage, template, and web form reports
- Custom: User-created custom reports
- Downloads: Downloaded reports
- Web forms: Document and field-level data reports

Tip: The Reports view is searchable by name and description. Enter search criteria in the Find Reports field to locate the relevant report. ![A snippet of the Reports view that highlights the Find reports field and the related search results.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Reports-view_search-example-snippet.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

The table updates as you enter search criteria.

For reporting on specific content, use these types of reports:

- [Standard reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=cnm1581459649387.html) that provide information about envelopes recipients, and account activity.
- [Document data reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=mxa1694124283123.html) that focus on the field-level data in your eSignature agreements.

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
When downloading reports to CSV files from the Insights reporting hub, there is an agreement limit of 25,000 agreements for all IAM reports. This count includes your custom reports.

**Suggested workaround:** Adjust the report filters to run the report in batches until all the relevant agreements are downloaded. For example, run the report in batches according to varying date ranges. Once downloaded, combine the data into one CSV file.

Note: The eSignature reports have a different set of limitations. See the [Using Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=cnu1642812012214&topicId=wou1578456440763.html) article to learn more about eSignature reports for senders and signers.

title: IAM Dashboards and Reports
text:
Custom dashboards and reports give you control over the agreement insights that you want to see:![A snippet of the Insights page that highlights the Custom Dashboards section in the navigation pane on the left.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Dashboards-Reports_Custom-Dashboards_left-nav_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

- *Customizable dashboards* can be created from scratch or built from an existing template.
  You can create up to 100 custom dashboards. Each dashboard can display up to
  20 custom or standard reports.
- *Customizable reports* can be created from scratch by choosing the data, metrics, and
  visualization options for the report. This data includes custom and
  standard fields. Custom reports can also be created by updating and saving
  an existing report.

  Tip: Create a custom report based on an AI-generated recommendation. Choose a recommendation from the Suggested Reports (Beta) section on the Overview dashboard. From the report view, use the Save option to create a new custom report:![A snippet of the report view for an AI-generated report that highlights the Save option in the More actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Insights-reporting_suggested-report_save-from-report-view.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTY4NjcsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.XA0tAlKADUumPFOJrl5_qaiVnUVsAOh6nJZHwoq-hmw&_LANG=enus)

These insights can help you and your organization make faster and smarter decisions. See the
[Custom Dashboards and Reports](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conac48cc6c-d92c-4187-a733-08968c218a74.html&_LANG=enus "Read about custom dashboards and reports, including use cases and limitations.") article to learn more about customizing dashboards
and reports.

title: Use Case: Filter Your Agreements By Contract Value and Expiration Date
heading_path: Use Case: Filter Your Agreements By Contract Value and Expiration Date
text:
This topic answers the question: How can I use filters to view agreements by value and expiration date for a specific customer?

As a contract viewer, you want to provide a list of agreement values to a sales or operations manager for reporting purposes. Use the available filters to sort agreements by value, expiration date, and customers.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens. The Inbox view is displayed by default.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed.
4. Select the Sort items (arrows) icon associated with the Total Contract Value column heading.

   Agreements in the table are sorted by value. Further refine the document list to view all agreements for a specific customer.
5. Expand the Filter option and select the Parties filter.
6. Enter the name of your customer in the Search field.
7. Choose the relevant party or alias group from the list and select Apply.

   The agreements that are tied to the selected party or alias group are displayed in the table. The table is sorted by total contract value.

   Further refine the table by sorting the table by expiration date.
8. Select the sorting arrows associated with the Expiration Date column heading.

   The agreements are reordered in the table and sorted by value and expiration date. Use this information for sales and operation reporting as needed.

You have successfully viewed agreements for a specific customer, sorted by value and expiration date.

title: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
heading_path: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
text:
Learn how to combine search methods and filters to locate relevant agreements. This topic answers the question: How do I perform a keyword search and apply filters to find my completed agreements?

When you perform a keyword search, the search reviews the contents of the agreements to look for the keyword. When you use filters, the agreements are filtered based on surfaced attributes and field values.

Often, it is more effective to perform a keyword search and then apply filters to locate specific agreements.

Tip: If you routinely search for the same type of agreements or agreement data, save your search criteria for future use. See the [Save Search Criteria for Future Use](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskc38121a1-bbf8-4da8-8ed7-b364991f7e50.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to save the search criteria for the queries that you frequently perform.") topic to learn more about the saved search feature.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed. The documents to which the logged-in user has access are listed in the table. The total document count is displayed the bottom right. This count is updated when you perform a search or apply filters.

   ![A screenshot of the Completed Documents page that shows a list of documents to which the logged-in user has access.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-view_updated-with-document-count.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Completed Documents page that shows a list of documents to which the logged-in user has access.")
4. Use the search field to locate the relevant agreements:

   ![A snippet of the type-ahead dropdown that shows the search history, suggested questions, and recent documents.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-table_Search_typeahead-dropdown.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the type-ahead dropdown that shows the search history, suggested questions, and recent documents.")

   1. Click in the search field. A dropdown opens and your search history and recent documents are displayed.

      Tip: Access your Saved Searches from the dropdown to run an existing query. See the [Save Search Criteria for Future Use](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tskc38121a1-bbf8-4da8-8ed7-b364991f7e50.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to save the search criteria for the queries that you frequently perform.") topic to learn more about this feature.
   2. Enter a keyword or phrase in the search field.

      As you enter a keyword in the search field, suggestions are displayed in the dropdown.
   3. Select a suggestion from the dropdown or press the [Enter] key.

   Important: Keyword searches are different from applying filters. The search reviews the contents of agreements, while the filters display agreements based on surfaced attributes and field values.

   The agreements that contain the keyword or phrase are displayed in the table. In this example, agreements containing *force majeure* are displayed in the table:

title: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
heading_path: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
text:
rfaced attributes and field values.

   The agreements that contain the keyword or phrase are displayed in the table. In this example, agreements containing *force majeure* are displayed in the table:

   ![A snippet of the agreement list table that shows the search results for agreements that have "force majeure".](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Perform-keyword-search_force-majeure-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the agreement list table that shows the search results for agreements that have \"force majeure\".")

   Tip: The keyword search automatically includes synonyms and related concepts in the
   search results. Select the related terms link to view
   additional information: ![A snippet of the agreement list table that shows query results and the Show related terms dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Search_Keyword-search_Related-terms-dialog.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the agreement list table that shows query results and the Show related terms dialog box.") The Related terms toggle is turned on (blue
   position) by default. Select the toggle to turn this feature off (white
   position).
5. Use the filters to refine the list of search results:

   ![A snippet of the agreement list table that shows highlights the expanded Filters menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Keyword-search-filters_Filter-dropdown_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the agreement list table that shows highlights the expanded Filters menu.")

   1. Select the Filters option.
   2. Locate the filter that you want to apply:

      - Search for the filter. Enter a keyword in the Filter by field and select a value from the results list.
      - Select a filter from the list of default filters, including: Sets, Status, Parties, Agreement Type, and AI Suggestions.
      - Use the All Filters option to locate the relevant filter from a list of all available filters.

      For example, use the Agreement Type filter to locate *force majeure* terms within a specific agreement type:

      ![A screenshot of the Agreement Type filter that shows a selected value.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Filter-search-results-by-Type-filter_MSA-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Type filter that shows a selected value.")
   3. Choose the relevant filter values or enter a date range.
   4. Select the Apply option.

   Tip: A number displays next to filter values to indicate the number of agreements that match the corresponding value.

   The filter closes and master service agreements (MSAs) containing *force majeure* terms are displayed in the table.

title: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
heading_path: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
text:
values to indicate the number of agreements that match the corresponding value.

   The filter closes and master service agreements (MSAs) containing *force majeure* terms are displayed in the table.

   ![A snippet of the agreement list table that shows MSAs that contain force majeure terms.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Completed-documents-table_Search-with-keyword-and-filter.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the agreement list table that shows MSAs that contain force majeure terms.")
6. Continue to apply filters to refine the agreement list table as needed.

   Note:

   Use the Status filter to filter the agreement list table by agreement status. For example, choose to view only Active agreements that match the current search criteria and filters: ![A screenshot of the Status filter that shows the selected Active options, including Expiring Soon and Renewing Soon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Agreement-statuses_Status-filter_Active-selected.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Status filter that shows the selected Active options, including Expiring Soon and Renewing Soon.") See the [Agreement Statuses](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=con6a3bd080-da17-4d1c-a92a-b9b9340c44fd.html&_LANG=enus "Read about agreement statuses, including how they are calculated, visibility within Agreement Manager, and which types of statuses are being tracked.") topic to learn more about this feature.

   The agreement list table updates and the agreements that matched the entered keyword or phrase are displayed. Repeat this process until you locate the relevant agreements.

   Note: After locating the relevant agreements, choose to download selected agreements or export agreement data. See these support articles to learn more about these options:
   - [Download Documents from the Agreement List Table](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=ach1724363496037.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: How do I download agreements from Agreement Manager?")
   - [Export Data from the Agreement List Table](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=pqf1724363438241.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to export agreement data to a CSV file for selected agreements.")
7. Use the feedback icons to rate your search experience:

   ![A screenshot of the feedback mechanism that gives users the chance to rate the quality of the search results.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/In-app-saerch-feedback_generic-dialog-box.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.WsbaaKodCvui07hBbd1XdbCoQNII4qZmpfrhTRJFWu0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the feedback mechanism that gives users the chance to rate the quality of the search results.")

   1. Choose the appropriate feedback icon. Select either the Rate as helpful (thumbs up) icon or the Rate as unhelpful (thumbs down) icon.

      The Share your reason to help us improve dialog box opens.
   2. Select a reason for choosing the rating. You can select more than one reason. The choices are: Complete, Relevant, Accurate, and Other.
   3. Enter additional details in the Comments text box.
   4. Select the Submit option.

      Tip: Choose the Skip option to submit your rating without providing any additional information. Your rating is submitted for review.

title: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
heading_path: Perform a Search and Apply Filters to Locate Agreements
text:
ls in the Comments text box.
   4. Select the Submit option.

      Tip: Choose the Skip option to submit your rating without providing any additional information. Your rating is submitted for review.

   The dialog box closes and your feedback is submitted to Docusign.
8. If necessary, reset the search field and clear the applied filters to perform a new query.
   1. Select the Clear Search (X) icon located in the search field to clear the search criteria.
   2. For applied filters, select the Delete (X) icon in the filter to clear any selected values.

You have successfully located agreements by using a combination of keyword searches and applied filters.

title: Onboarding Callouts for First-Time Users
text:
This topic answers the question: Is there an onboarding experience for first-time users? Read about the walk-through experience for first-time Agreement Manager users.

Agreement Manager functionality is accessed from your Docusign account. Log in to Docusign and select Agreements from the global header.

The Docusign Agreements page opens. The Inbox view is displayed by default.

Select the Completed option from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane to access Agreement Manager:

![A screenshot of the Docusign Agreements page that highlights the Completed option in the navigation pane on the left.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Onboarding_first-time-user.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwNzAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hJIL1rSA9dZSGhVfivtztD3qjanbmuf43nCWOt1W_ao&_LANG=enus)

When new users first access Agreement Manager, a series of onboarding callouts is displayed.

title: Onboarding Callouts for First-Time Users
text:
As a new user, a series of onboarding callouts is displayed when you first access Agreement Manager. These callouts provide a quick tour of Agreement Manager and walk you through a guided flow.

Select Next to review each of the callouts or select Skip All to close the dialog boxes:

![A screenshot of the first onboarding callout that points out that you are viewing documents.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Onboarding_first-time-user_callout-1.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTYwNzAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.hJIL1rSA9dZSGhVfivtztD3qjanbmuf43nCWOt1W_ao&_LANG=enus)

This callout points out that you are viewing Documents, which are the individual files from your completed agreements.

Tip: Switch to Envelopes to view signatures and agreement history.

Select Next to launch the guided flow. This flow gives you a quick tour of Agreement Manager functionality. Review the table to learn more about each callout.

| **Callout** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that points out a list of all completed agreements. | This callout highlights the File Name column. A list of your completed agreements is displayed. |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that points out that key data points were surfaced in your agreements. | This callout points out that key data points were surfaced in your agreements. You can review and edit this data at any time. |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that points out the Parties filter. | This callout highlights the Parties filter. Use this filter to view agreements for a specific party. |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that points out renewing contracts and provides a link to the Renewals dashboard. | This callout highlights your renewing contracts and provides a link to the Renewals dashboard. |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that prompts you to surface suggested attribute values in your agreements. | This callout prompts you to surface suggested attribute (field) values in your agreements. Tip: Select OK to surface key data points in your document contents. |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that prompts you to review the suggested field values that were surfaced in your agreements. | This callout points out that key data points were suggested based on your document contents. You are prompted to review the suggestions. Tip: Select Review to continue to the Details pane on the Agreement preview page. |
| A screenshot of an onboarding callout that prompts you to review the suggested field values that were surfaced in your agreements. | This callout points out that key details were suggested based on your document contents. You are prompted to verify the suggested field values. Note: This callout points to the AI-Assisted badge in the Details pane on the Agreement preview page. |

At the last callout, select OK. The callout closes. You are currently on the Agreement preview page. From here, you can:

- Select Review All and perform a data review to validate the suggested attribute (field) values. See the [Validate Extracted Field Values (Complete a Data Review)](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=yqq1702945693043.html&_LANG=enus "This topic answers the question: How can I make sure that the suggested attribute (field) values are accurate? Learn how to complete a data review to verify suggested field values.") article to learn more about reviewing suggested values.
- Select Close (X) from the top-left corner to return to the Completed Documents page.

title: Report Notifications and Subscriptions
text:
Read about the notification and subscription features and how they can help you proactively manage your agreements, obligations, and renewals.

Use the *Subscriptions* feature to sign up for report notifications. You can subscribe to receive email reports for any of the reports found on the Agreements, Obligations, and Renewals dashboards. You can also subscribe to receive email reports for custom reports.

The *Subscription* feature is accessed from the detailed report view for a dashboard chart or insight:

![A snippet of the detailed report view that highlights the Subscription feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Subscriptions_Subscribe-highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcxMDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.3orTEDscBaALhMhqcT_UbjQtB-4p2qjrT3F0gKK2r-Y&_LANG=enus "A snippet of the detailed report view that highlights the Subscription feature.")

Apply filters and customize the table until the data that you want to track is displayed in the table.

Tip: If you made changes to the report, use the Save option to create a custom report. Expand the dropdown and select Save:![A snippet of an agreement dashboard report that shows the Save option in the dropdown.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Agreements-Dashboard_Dashboard-report_Save-as.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcxMDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.3orTEDscBaALhMhqcT_UbjQtB-4p2qjrT3F0gKK2r-Y&_LANG=enus "A snippet of an agreement dashboard report that shows the Save option in the dropdown.")

Once saved, access the report from the Custom tab located under the Reports view.

Complete the Create subscription dialog box to set up one-time or recurring email reports for yourself and others:

![A screenshot of the Create subscription dialog box that shows the subscription configuration fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/Reports_Create-Subscription.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcxMDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.3orTEDscBaALhMhqcT_UbjQtB-4p2qjrT3F0gKK2r-Y&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Create subscription dialog box that shows the subscription configuration fields.")

Note: When you create a subscription, you have the option to add individual users and groups. Once created, the subscription is displayed in the Manage report subscriptions dialog box for any individual users who were added. Currently, the subscription is not visible to users if they were added as part of a group.

See the [Subscribe to Receive Report Notifications](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=wfw1734545937270.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to set up one-time or recurring email reports for yourself or others to receive notifications about your obligations, renewals, or agreements.") topic to learn more about subscribing to receive email reports.

title: Report Notifications and Subscriptions
text:
Docusign provides email notifications for all account-related updates, including updates related to your agreements in Agreement Manager. Notification settings give you control over the email notifications that you receive.

The Notification Preferences page is accessed from the My Preferences option in the user profile menu. By default, all the notification types in the Completed Agreements section are enabled:![A screenshot of the Notification Preferences page that highlights the selected notification types for completed agreements.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/pqz1702943441912/page/images/My-preferences_Notification-Preferences_For-Completed-Agreements_highlighted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE3OTcxMDAsInNoZWFmIjoicHF6MTcwMjk0MzQ0MTkxMiJ9.3orTEDscBaALhMhqcT_UbjQtB-4p2qjrT3F0gKK2r-Y&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Notification Preferences page that highlights the selected notification types for completed agreements.")

Deselect a checkbox if you no longer want to receive email notifications for the corresponding notification type.

Tip: Periodically review your Notification Preferences to ensure that you are receiving the relevant email notifications. Additional notification types will be added in the future.

See the [Customize Notification Settings for Your Completed Agreements](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=tsk155b1ed7-7b45-43cd-be92-2a5279630c0f.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to customize your email notification settings from the Notification Preferences page.") topic for steps to update your notification preferences.

title: Use Case: View Active Agreements for a Customer
heading_path: Use Case: View Active Agreements for a Customer
text:
This topic answers the question: How can I view active agreements for a specific party? Learn how to find all the active agreements for a specific customer.

As a contract viewer, you want to view all active agreements for a specific customer and include this information in the monthly sales report. Locate this information from the party hub.

1. Log in to your Docusign account.

   The Docusign Home page opens.
2. Select Agreements from the global header.

   The Docusign Agreements page opens. The Inbox view is displayed by default.
3. Select Completed from the AGREEMENTS section in the navigation pane.

   The Agreement Manager homepage opens and the Completed Documents view is displayed. Filter this view for a specific party.
4. Expand the Filters option and select the Parties filter.
5. Search for and select the party or party group from the list. Select the Apply option.

   The agreements that are tied to the selected party or alias group are displayed in the table.
6. Select a name from the Parties column.
